<script>
var PROXY = 'https://api.airpiv.com';

function escHtml(s) {
  var d = document.createElement('div');
  d.textContent = s || '';
  return d.innerHTML;
}

var params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
var code = params.get('code');
if (!code) {
  var pathMatch = window.location.pathname.match(/\/airport\/([^\/]+)\/?$/);
  if (pathMatch) code = decodeURIComponent(pathMatch[1]);
}

if (!code) {
  renderNotFound();
} else {
  fetch(PROXY + '/airports/' + encodeURIComponent(code))
    .then(function(r){ return r.json(); })
    .then(function(j){
      if (!j.ok || !j.airport) { renderNotFound(); return; }
      renderAirport(j.airport, j.routes || []);
    })
    .catch(function(){ renderNotFound(); });
}

function renderNotFound() {
  document.getElementById('airport-content').innerHTML =
    '<a href="/" class="back-link">← Zurück zur Startseite</a>' +
    '<h1>Flughafen nicht gefunden</h1>' +
    '<p style="color:var(--tx3)">Für diesen Flughafen sind aktuell keine Flugrouten verfügbar.</p>' +
    '<a href="/" class="btn-t" style="display:inline-flex;margin-top:12px">← Flüge suchen</a>';
}

// [LOCALIZATION-FIX] نفس قائمة التصحيح المستخدمة في flight-route.html
// بالظبط — بتصحح اسم المدينة بالألماني الصحيح بناءً على كود المطار
// الحقيقي (IATA)، مش تخمين من النص نفسه. أي كود مش موجود في القائمة
// بيسيب النص زي ما هو (آمن).
var GERMAN_CITY_NAMES = {
  BER: 'Berlin', MUC: 'München', FRA: 'Frankfurt', HAM: 'Hamburg', DUS: 'Düsseldorf',
  CGN: 'Köln', STR: 'Stuttgart', HAJ: 'Hannover', LEJ: 'Leipzig', NUE: 'Nürnberg',
  DTM: 'Dortmund', BRE: 'Bremen', VIE: 'Wien', ZRH: 'Zürich', GVA: 'Genf',
  LHR: 'London', LGW: 'London', STN: 'London', LTN: 'London', CDG: 'Paris', ORY: 'Paris',
  FCO: 'Rom', CIA: 'Rom', MXP: 'Mailand', LIN: 'Mailand', VCE: 'Venedig', NAP: 'Neapel',
  MAD: 'Madrid', BCN: 'Barcelona', VLC: 'Valencia', SVQ: 'Sevilla', AGP: 'Málaga',
  LIS: 'Lissabon', OPO: 'Porto', AMS: 'Amsterdam', BRU: 'Brüssel', LUX: 'Luxemburg',
  CPH: 'Kopenhagen', OSL: 'Oslo', ARN: 'Stockholm', HEL: 'Helsinki', DUB: 'Dublin',
  WAW: 'Warschau', KRK: 'Krakau', PRG: 'Prag', BUD: 'Budapest', ATH: 'Athen',
  IST: 'Istanbul', SAW: 'Istanbul', CAI: 'Kairo', DXB: 'Dubai', DOH: 'Doha',
  BKK: 'Bangkok', SIN: 'Singapur', HKG: 'Hongkong', NRT: 'Tokio', HND: 'Tokio',
  JFK: 'New York', EWR: 'New York', LAX: 'Los Angeles', SFO: 'San Francisco',
  MIA: 'Miami', YYZ: 'Toronto', GRU: 'São Paulo', CPT: 'Kapstadt', JNB: 'Johannesburg',
  SYD: 'Sydney', MEL: 'Melbourne', DBV: 'Dubrovnik', SPU: 'Split', ZAG: 'Zagreb',
};
function germanizeCity(name, iata) {
  return (iata && GERMAN_CITY_NAMES[iata]) || name;
}

function renderAirport(airport, routes) {
  // [LOCALIZATION-FIX] يتصحّح مرة واحدة هنا — airport.code هو نفس
  // الـ IATA الحقيقي بتاع المطار ده بالظبط، فمفيش أي تخمين هنا.
  airport.city = germanizeCity(airport.city, airport.code);
  routes.forEach(function (r) {
    r.origin_city = germanizeCity(r.origin_city, r.origin_iata);
    r.destination_city = germanizeCity(r.destination_city, r.destination_iata);
  });

  // [CONTENT-VARIATION-FIX] Real signal: haul-type mix. An airport
  // serving only short-haul routes vs one with long-haul connections
  // represents a genuinely different traveler intent (weekend trips vs
  // intercontinental travel) — the copy reflects that real distinction.
  var hasLongHaul = routes.some(function(r) { return r.haul_type === 'long-haul'; });
  var title, description;
  if (routes.length === 1) {
    title = 'Flughafen ' + airport.code + ' — Direktflug ab ' + airport.city;
    description = 'Der Flughafen ' + airport.code + ' in ' + airport.city + ' bietet eine Direktverbindung. Preis vergleichen und buchen mit Airpiv.';
  } else if (hasLongHaul) {
    title = 'Flughafen ' + airport.code + ' (' + airport.city + ') — Kurz- & Langstrecke';
    description = 'Vom Flughafen ' + airport.code + ' in ' + airport.city + ' aus erreichst du sowohl europäische als auch interkontinentale Ziele. Alle Strecken im Vergleich.';
  } else {
    title = 'Flughafen ' + airport.code + ' (' + airport.city + ') — alle Strecken';
    description = routes.length + ' Flugverbindungen ab und nach ' + airport.city + ' (' + airport.code + '). Vergleiche alle Strecken und Preise mit Airpiv.';
  }
  var url = 'https://airpiv.com/airport/' + encodeURIComponent(airport.code);

  document.getElementById('page-title').textContent = title + ' | Airpiv';
  document.getElementById('page-description').setAttribute('content', description);
  document.getElementById('page-canonical').setAttribute('href', url);
  document.getElementById('og-title').setAttribute('content', title);
  document.getElementById('og-description').setAttribute('content', description);
  document.getElementById('og-url').setAttribute('content', url);
  var enUrl = 'https://airpiv.com/en/airport/' + encodeURIComponent(airport.code);
  document.getElementById('hreflang-de').setAttribute('href', url);
  document.getElementById('hreflang-en').setAttribute('href', enUrl);
  document.getElementById('hreflang-default').setAttribute('href', url);

  var introText = 'Der Flughafen ' + airport.code + ' bedient ' + airport.city + '. Hier findest du alle Flugrouten, die Airpiv für diesen Flughafen anbietet — vergleiche Preise und buche direkt.';

  // [BREADCRUMB] Home → Country → City → Airport — the full 4-level
  // chain. Each segment degrades independently (missing country_code or
  // city_slug just skips that link) rather than ever showing a broken
  // href.
  var breadcrumbHtml = '<nav class="breadcrumb" aria-label="Breadcrumb"><a href="/">Startseite</a><span>›</span>';
  if (airport.country) {
    breadcrumbHtml += '<a href="/country/' + encodeURIComponent(airport.country) + '">' + escHtml(airport.country) + '</a><span>›</span>';
  }
  if (airport.city_slug) {
    breadcrumbHtml += '<a href="/city/' + encodeURIComponent(airport.city_slug) + '">' + escHtml(airport.city) + '</a><span>›</span>';
  }
  breadcrumbHtml += '<span>' + escHtml(airport.code) + '</span></nav>';

  // [AIRPORT-FACTS] Real, computed facts from the actual routes data —
  // never fabricated airport trivia (no made-up terminal counts, runway
  // length, etc. that this system has no way of verifying).
  var fromCount = routes.filter(function(r) { return r.origin_iata === airport.code; }).length;
  var toCount = routes.filter(function(r) { return r.destination_iata === airport.code; }).length;
  var factsHtml = '<div class="airport-facts">' +
    '<div class="airport-fact"><div class="airport-fact-val">' + routes.length + '</div><div class="airport-fact-lbl">Strecken</div></div>' +
    '<div class="airport-fact"><div class="airport-fact-val">' + fromCount + '</div><div class="airport-fact-lbl">Abflüge</div></div>' +
    '<div class="airport-fact"><div class="airport-fact-val">' + toCount + '</div><div class="airport-fact-lbl">Ankünfte</div></div>' +
  '</div>';

  function haulLabel(r) {
    if (!r.haul_type) return '';
    return r.haul_type === 'long-haul' ? 'Langstrecke' : 'Kurzstrecke';
  }
  function routeCardHtml(r) {
    var hl = haulLabel(r);
    return '<a class="airport-route-card" href="/flights/' + encodeURIComponent(r.slug) + '">' +
      escHtml(r.origin_city) + '<span class="arrow">→</span>' + escHtml(r.destination_city) +
      (hl ? '<span class="haul-tag">' + hl + '</span>' : '') +
    '</a>';
  }

  var fromRoutes = routes.filter(function(r) { return r.origin_iata === airport.code; });
  var toRoutes = routes.filter(function(r) { return r.destination_iata === airport.code; });

  var fromSectionHtml = fromRoutes.length
    ? '<section class="airport-routes-section"><h2>Abflüge von ' + escHtml(airport.code) + '</h2><div class="airport-route-grid">' + fromRoutes.map(routeCardHtml).join('') + '</div></section>'
    : '';
  var toSectionHtml = toRoutes.length
    ? '<section class="airport-routes-section"><h2>Ankünfte in ' + escHtml(airport.code) + '</h2><div class="airport-route-grid">' + toRoutes.map(routeCardHtml).join('') + '</div></section>'
    : '';

  document.getElementById('airport-content').innerHTML =
    breadcrumbHtml +
    '<h1>' + escHtml(title) + '</h1>' +
    '<div class="airport-hero">' +
      '<div class="airport-hero-code">' + escHtml(airport.code) + '</div>' +
      '<div class="airport-hero-city">' + escHtml(airport.city) + '</div>' +
      '<div class="airport-hero-sub">Flughafen</div>' +
      factsHtml +
    '</div>' +
    '<section><p>' + escHtml(introText) + '</p></section>' +
    fromSectionHtml +
    toSectionHtml;

  var breadcrumbList = [{ "@type": "ListItem", "position": 1, "name": "Startseite", "item": "https://airpiv.com/" }];
  var pos = 2;
  if (airport.country) { breadcrumbList.push({ "@type": "ListItem", "position": pos++, "name": airport.country, "item": "https://airpiv.com/country/" + airport.country }); }
  if (airport.city_slug) { breadcrumbList.push({ "@type": "ListItem", "position": pos++, "name": airport.city, "item": "https://airpiv.com/city/" + airport.city_slug }); }
  breadcrumbList.push({ "@type": "ListItem", "position": pos, "name": airport.code, "item": url });

  document.getElementById('airport-schema').textContent = JSON.stringify({
    "@context": "https://schema.org",
    "@type": "Airport",
    "name": title,
    "iataCode": airport.code,
    "url": url,
    "breadcrumb": { "@type": "BreadcrumbList", "itemListElement": breadcrumbList }
  });
}
</script>

</body>
</html>

"+t("consent_required"),"error")}doBflowBooking()}else bflowStep<4&&(bflowStep++,bflowRender())}// [SLOW-CONFIRM-POLL-FIX] Previously, an "already processing" (409)
// response from /confirm-payment made the frontend re-call that SAME
// heavy endpoint (Stripe session lookup + Duffel order creation) up to 3
// times, 2s apart — only 6s of patience total. Under real load (search
// alone was observed taking 4.7s–10.7s, /route-price up to 11s in
// production logs), the actual booking can easily still be in progress
// past that window: the customer's payment had already succeeded, the
// booking was quietly completing seconds later, but the person was shown
// a scary failure message and never saw the confirmation screen. This
// polls /booking-status/:sessionId instead — an in-memory lookup with
// zero Stripe/Duffel calls, safe to check frequently — until the booking
// actually resolves (booked or failed), then makes exactly one final
// /confirm-payment call, which by then returns instantly (the original
// request has released its lock either way) and reuses the existing,
// already-tested success/failure rendering path unchanged.
// [PROCESSING-BANNER] A fixed banner at the top of the page, visible for
// the entire post-payment wait (which can genuinely take up to ~40
// seconds while the real airline confirms the booking) — before this,
// the customer only ever saw one initial toast that disappeared after a
// couple of seconds, then nothing, with no visible sign anything was
// still happening until either the confirmation screen or a final
// error/timeout message showed up.
function showBookingProcessingBanner(){
  var b=document.getElementById("booking-processing-banner");
  if(!b){
    b=document.createElement("div");
    b.id="booking-processing-banner";
    b.style.cssText="position:fixed;top:0;left:0;right:0;z-index:999998;background:var(--teal,#00a991);color:#fff;padding:10px 16px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:10px;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;box-shadow:0 2px 10px rgba(0,0,0,.15)";
    b.innerHTML='<span style="width:14px;height:14px;border:2px solid rgba(255,255,255,.4);border-top-color:#fff;border-radius:50%;display:inline-block;animation:spin 0.8s linear infinite"></span><span id="booking-processing-banner-txt"></span>';
    document.body.appendChild(b);
  }
  var txt=document.getElementById("booking-processing-banner-txt");
  if(txt)txt.textContent=tL("Deine Buchung wird bestätigt …","Confirming your booking …","جارٍ تأكيد حجزك …","Confirmando tu reserva …","Confirmation de votre réservation en cours …","Conferma della prenotazione in corso …","Je boeking wordt bevestigd …");
  b.style.display="flex";
}
function hideBookingProcessingBanner(){
  var b=document.getElementById("booking-processing-banner");
  if(b)b.style.display="none";
}
function pollBookingStatus(sessionId,attempt){
  var maxAttempts=20; // ~40s of polling — generous enough for the slow periods seen in production, and cheap since no external APIs are touched
  fetch(PROXY+"/booking-status/"+encodeURIComponent(sessionId)).then(function(r){return r.json()}).then(function(s){
    if(s.ok&&s.status==="booked"){
      // Safe to re-call: the original request already finished and
      // released its lock, entry.duffel_order_id is already set, so this
      // returns the idempotent {already:true,...} path instantly and
      // reuses the existing, already-tested success rendering unchanged.
      // Routed through checkStripeReturnAfterBooked() rather than calling
      // checkStripeReturn() directly — see [TIGHT-LOOP-FIX] there for why.
      checkStripeReturnAfterBooked(sessionId,0);
    }else if(s.ok&&s.status==="failed"){
      hideBookingProcessingBanner();
      // [SAFETY] Rendered directly from this lightweight status response
      // — deliberately NOT re-calling /confirm-payment here, since a
      // failed booking (e.g. price drift, already refunded) retrying the
      // real booking endpoint could re-attempt the booking or a second
      // refund. Same wording as the direct booking_failed_after_payment
      // path in checkStripeReturn, for a consistent message either way.
      var r=s.refunded?"Der Flugpreis hat sich kurzfristig geändert oder das Angebot ist nicht mehr verfügbar. Deine Zahlung wurde vollständig zurückerstattet — du kannst sofort erneut suchen und buchen.":"Die Buchung konnte leider nicht abgeschlossen werden. Bitte kontaktiere unseren Support — wir kümmern uns sofort um deine Zahlung.";
      fwLog("error",{msg:"booking_failed_after_payment (poll): "+(s.error||""),refunded:s.refunded});
      alert((s.refunded?"↩️ ":"⚠️ ")+r);
      showToast((s.refunded?"↩️ ":"⚠️ ")+r,"error");
    }else if(attempt<maxAttempts){
      setTimeout(function(){pollBookingStatus(sessionId,attempt+1)},2000);
    }else{
      hideBookingProcessingBanner();
      // Payment via Stripe definitely succeeded (that's how we got here) —
      // this is reassurance, not a failure, since we simply ran out of
      // patience waiting for our own backend to finish under load.
      showToast("⏳ "+tL("Deine Zahlung wurde bestätigt — wir schließen deine Buchung gerade ab. Bitte sieh in ein paar Minuten unter „Meine Buchungen\u201c nach oder prüfe deine E-Mail.","Your payment was confirmed — we're still finalizing your booking. Please check „My Bookings\u201c in a few minutes or your email.","تم تأكيد الدفع بنجاح — جارٍ إنهاء الحجز حالياً. يرجى مراجعة \"حجوزاتي\" بعد قليل أو التحقق من بريدك الإلكتروني.","Tu pago ha sido confirmado — estamos terminando de procesar tu reserva. Consulta „Mis reservas“ en unos minutos o revisa tu correo.","Votre paiement a été confirmé — nous finalisons votre réservation. Consultez « Mes réservations » dans quelques minutes ou vérifiez vos e-mails.","Il tuo pagamento è stato confermato — stiamo completando la tua prenotazione. Controlla „Le mie prenotazioni“ tra qualche minuto o la tua email.","Je betaling is bevestigd — we ronden je boeking nog af. Kijk over een paar minuten bij „Mijn boekingen“ of check je e-mail."),"info");
    }
  }).catch(function(){
    if(attempt<maxAttempts)setTimeout(function(){pollBookingStatus(sessionId,attempt+1)},2000);
  });
}
function checkStripeReturn(e){var n=e;if(!n){var a=new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);n=a.get("session_id")}if(n){try{window.history.replaceState({},document.title,window.location.origin+window.location.pathname)}catch(e){}showBookingProcessingBanner();var o=null;try{o=JSON.parse(sessionStorage.getItem("fw_pending_booking")||"null")}catch(e){}showToast("⏳ "+t("pay_verifying"),"info"),fetch(PROXY+"/confirm-payment",{method:"POST",headers:{"Content-Type":"application/json"},body:JSON.stringify({session_id:n})}).then(function(e){return e.json()}).then(function(e){if(e.ok){hideBookingProcessingBanner();try{sessionStorage.removeItem("fw_pending_booking")}catch(e){}trackEvent("purchase",{transaction_id:n,value:o?o.customerTotal:0,currency:"EUR"}),trackEvent("payment_success",{transaction_id:n,value:o?o.customerTotal:0,currency:"EUR"}),trackEvent("booking_completed",{transaction_id:n,value:o?o.customerTotal:0,currency:"EUR"}),loyaltySyncFromServer(function(){if(o&&!e.already){var t=Math.max(0,Math.round((loyaltyData.points||0)-(o.pointsBeforeBooking||loyaltyData.points||0)));t>0&&setTimeout(function(){showToast("🏆 +"+t+" Treuepunkte verdient!","success")},2e3)}}),fetch(PROXY+"/booking-confirmation?session_id="+encodeURIComponent(n)).then(function(e){return e.json()}).then(function(t){if(t.ok&&t.order)showConfirmation(orderToBookingData(t.order,t.booking));else{var n=o?{orig:o.orig,dest:o.dest,price:o.basePrice}:{};showConfirmation({reference:e.booking_reference||e.order_id,orderId:e.order_id,offer:n,passengers:o?o.paxList:[],basePrice:o?o.basePrice:0,extrasPrice:o?o.extrasPrice:0,totalPrice:o?o.customerTotal:e.total_amount||0})}}).catch(function(){var t=o?{orig:o.orig,dest:o.dest,price:o.basePrice}:{};showConfirmation({reference:e.booking_reference||e.order_id,orderId:e.order_id,offer:t,passengers:o?o.paxList:[],basePrice:o?o.basePrice:0,extrasPrice:o?o.extrasPrice:0,totalPrice:o?o.customerTotal:e.total_amount||0})})}else if(e.booking_failed_after_payment){hideBookingProcessingBanner();var a="";try{e.duffel_errors&&e.duffel_errors.length?a=e.duffel_errors.map(function(e){return e.message||e.title||""}).join(" | "):e.details&&e.details.length&&(a=e.details.map(function(e){return e.message||e.title||""}).join(" | "))}catch(e){}fwLog("error",{msg:"booking_failed_after_payment: "+a,refunded:e.refunded});trackEvent("payment_failed",{transaction_id:n,reason:a||"unknown",refunded:!!e.refunded});(e.duffel_errors&&e.duffel_errors.length||e.details&&e.details.length)&&trackEvent("duffel_error",{transaction_id:n,message:a});
  // [STALE-OFFER-REQUEST-FIX] Duffel rejects booking a SECOND offer from
  // an offer_request that already produced one successful booking — even
  // a different fare/tariff card, since they all share the same
  // offer_request under the hood. This happens when a customer revisits
  // an old results page/tab (or hits Back) after already booking once,
  // and picks another offer from that same, now-"spent" search — the
  // page still looks perfectly clickable, so nothing warned them. The
  // generic "contact support" message was actively misleading here since
  // the refund already succeeded and there's nothing support needs to
  // fix — the one and only thing needed is a fresh search.
  var isStaleOfferRequest=false;
  try{
    var errsArr=(e.duffel_errors&&e.duffel_errors.length)?e.duffel_errors:(e.details||[]);
    isStaleOfferRequest=errsArr.some(function(d){return d&&"offer_request_already_booked"===d.code});
  }catch(e){}
  var r;
  if(isStaleOfferRequest)r=tL("Diese Suchergebnisse wurden bereits für eine andere Buchung verwendet. Deine Zahlung wurde vollständig zurückerstattet — wir starten jetzt automatisch eine neue Suche für dich.","These search results were already used for another booking. Your payment was fully refunded — we're starting a fresh search for you now.","نتائج البحث دي كانت مستخدمة في حجز تاني بالفعل. تم استرداد المبلغ بالكامل — جارٍ البحث من جديد تلقائياً.","Estos resultados de búsqueda ya se usaron para otra reserva. Tu pago ha sido reembolsado por completo — estamos iniciando automáticamente una nueva búsqueda para ti.","Ces résultats de recherche ont déjà été utilisés pour une autre réservation. Votre paiement a été intégralement remboursé — nous lançons automatiquement une nouvelle recherche pour vous.","Questi risultati di ricerca sono già stati utilizzati per un'altra prenotazione. Il tuo pagamento è stato rimborsato integralmente — stiamo avviando automaticamente una nuova ricerca per te.","Deze zoekresultaten zijn al gebruikt voor een andere boeking. Je betaling is volledig terugbetaald — we starten nu automatisch een nieuwe zoekopdracht voor je.");else r=e.refunded?"Der Flugpreis hat sich kurzfristig geändert oder das Angebot ist nicht mehr verfügbar. Deine Zahlung wurde vollständig zurückerstattet — du kannst sofort erneut suchen und buchen.":"Die Buchung konnte leider nicht abgeschlossen werden. Bitte kontaktiere unseren Support — wir kümmern uns sofort um deine Zahlung.";
  alert((e.refunded?"↩️ ":"⚠️ ")+r),showToast((e.refunded?"↩️ ":"⚠️ ")+r,"error");
  if(isStaleOfferRequest){closeBflow();setTimeout(function(){doSearch()},400)}
}else if(e.processing){pollBookingStatus(n,0)}else{hideBookingProcessingBanner();showToast("❌ "+(e.error||t("pay_not_confirmed")),"error")}}).catch(function(){hideBookingProcessingBanner();showToast("❌ "+t("pay_not_confirmed"),"error")})}}
// [TIGHT-LOOP-FIX] checkStripeReturn(sessionId) is also called directly by
// pollBookingStatus's "booked" branch, once /booking-status already
// confirmed the booking is done. If /confirm-payment STILL answers
// "processing" at that exact moment (the process that just finished —
// our own earlier request, or the Stripe webhook — hasn't released its
// short-lived lock yet by this exact millisecond), the line above used
// to call pollBookingStatus(n,0) again with NO delay: that immediately
// re-checked /booking-status, saw "booked" again (a status that never
// reverts), called checkStripeReturn again, got "processing" again, and
// repeated — a tight loop bursting requests every ~100ms until the lock
// happened to free up, instead of respecting either function's intended
// pacing. checkStripeReturnAfterBooked() is the same call, but on a
// genuine "processing" reply here it waits a short fixed beat and stops
// after a small bounded number of tries, rather than restarting a full,
// undelayed 40s poll cycle.
function checkStripeReturnAfterBooked(sessionId,attempt){
  attempt=attempt||0;
  var maxAttempts=6; // ~6s of headroom — plenty for a lock that's already about to free up
  fetch(PROXY+"/confirm-payment",{method:"POST",headers:{"Content-Type":"application/json"},body:JSON.stringify({session_id:sessionId})}).then(function(r){return r.json()}).then(function(e){
    if(e.processing&&attempt<maxAttempts){
      setTimeout(function(){checkStripeReturnAfterBooked(sessionId,attempt+1)},1000);
    }else{
      // Resolved (success, a genuine failure, or attempts exhausted) —
      // hand off to the normal, already-tested rendering path, which
      // will make one more instant confirm-payment call and render
      // whatever it gets back.
      checkStripeReturn(sessionId);
    }
  }).catch(function(){
    if(attempt<maxAttempts)setTimeout(function(){checkStripeReturnAfterBooked(sessionId,attempt+1)},1000);
    else checkStripeReturn(sessionId);
  });
}function doBflowBooking(){var e=document.getElementById("bflow-btn"),n=e?e.innerHTML:"";e&&(e.disabled=!0,e.innerHTML='<span style="animation:spin 1s linear infinite;display:inline-block">⟳</span> i&&(i.disabled=!1,i.innerHTML='<span id="bflow-btn-txt">'+tL("Erneut versuchen","Try again","حاول مرة أخرى","Reintentar","Réessayer","Riprova","Opnieuw proberen")+"</span>"),void showToast("⚠️ Wir suchen aktuelle Angebote für dich."),"info"),closeBflow(),setTimeout(function(){doSearch()},300)):(i&&(i.disabled=!1),showToast("❌ "+(t.error||"Zahlung konnte nicht gestartet werden"),"error"))}).catch(function(e){i&&(i.disabled=!1,i.innerHTML='<span id="bflow-btn-txt">Erneut versuchen</span>'),showToast("❌ Verbindungsfehler — bitte erneut versuchen","error"),fwLog("error",{msg:e?e.message:"Checkout network error"})})})}function openPriceChanged(e,n){var // [SEARCH-INTEGRITY-FIX] Typing over an already-selected airport left the
// OLD fromI/toI code silently in place — doSearch() would then search
// using that stale, invisible selection instead of respecting that the
// visible field no longer matches any real airport. Every keystroke now
// invalidates the prior pick immediately; only choosing a suggestion
// (pickAC) restores a valid code. This does not run on focus (only on
// actual typing), so simply re-opening an already-filled field never
// wipes out a valid existing selection.

  // [QUICK-SEARCH-DATE-FIX] qs() is used by every "quick pick" card/chip
  // (Beliebte Ziele, Top Strecken) to jump straight into a real search —
  // but it never set a departure (or, for round-trip, return) date, so
  // doSearch()'s own validation correctly blocked every one of these
  // clicks with "Abflugdatum fehlt", even though the person just tapped
  // a specific route expecting real results immediately. Fill in a
  // sensible default trip (three weeks out, one week long — the same
  // representative near-future date the server already uses when
  // computing a route's "ab €" starting price) only when no date is
  // already chosen, so a person who DID already pick dates keeps them.

window.location.origin+window.location.pathname+"?ref="+referralCodeFor(e)}function handleUrlAutoSearch(prefillPromise){try{var pathMatch=window.location.pathname.match(/^\/search\/([A-Za-z]{3})-([A-Za-z]{3})$/);var params=new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);var fromCode=pathMatch?pathMatch[1]:params.get("from");var toCode=pathMatch?pathMatch[2]:params.get("to");if(!fromCode||!toCode)return;
  // [ROUTE-LINK-DEFAULT] القرار المقصود: أي رابط جاي بـ from+to (زي رابط
  // "Jetzt Flüge suchen" في صفحة المسار) بيفتح بحث "ذهاب فقط" افتراضياً —
  // ده تصميم مقصود مش باج. ?trip= يفضل موجود كمخرج صريح لأي استخدام
  // مستقبلي (إيميل، تنبيه سعر، إلخ) يحتاج نوع تاني.
  var requestedTrip=params.get("trip");
  trip=(requestedTrip==="rr"||requestedTrip==="mc")?requestedTrip:"ow";
  var tripSelEl=document.getElementById("trip-sel");
  if(tripSelEl)tripSelEl.value=trip;
  if(typeof setTripSel==="function")setTripSel(trip);
  // [URL-AUTOSEARCH-DATE-FIX] doSearch() bails with a "missing date" nudge
  // (showHelper()) whenever calDepDate is unset — which it always was here,
  // since a bare /search/FROM-TO link (or a refresh of one) carries no date
  // and only prefillDateFromUrl()'s ?depart= param sets it. That made the
  // nudge pop up on every single load/refresh instead of ever actually
  // searching. Same fallback qs() already uses for quick-pick cards: default
  // to three weeks out (one week return trip) only when nothing was chosen.
  if(!calDepDate){
    var uasDep=new Date();
    uasDep.setDate(uasDep.getDate()+21);
    var uasDepStr=uasDep.toISOString().slice(0,10);
    var uasDepEl=document.getElementById("dep-date");
    if(uasDepEl)uasDepEl.value=uasDepStr;
    calDepDate=uasDepStr;
    var uasDepDisp=document.getElementById("dep-disp");
    if(uasDepDisp){uasDepDisp.textContent=fmtDate(uasDepStr);uasDepDisp.classList.remove("empty");}
  }
  if("rr"===trip&&!calRetDate){
    var uasRet=new Date();
    uasRet.setDate(uasRet.getDate()+28);
    var uasRetStr=uasRet.toISOString().slice(0,10);
    var uasRetEl=document.getElementById("ret-date");
    if(uasRetEl)uasRetEl.value=uasRetStr;
    calRetDate=uasRetStr;
    var uasRetDisp=document.getElementById("ret-disp");
    if(uasRetDisp){uasRetDisp.textContent=fmtDate(uasRetStr);uasRetDisp.classList.remove("empty");}
  }
  // [NO-SILENT-AUTOSEARCH-FIX] A refresh or back/forward navigation to
  // this exact URL must NEVER re-run the search on its own — only an
  // actual fresh visit (a shared link, a click from the route-page CTA)
  // does. The Navigation Timing API is the standard way to tell these
  // apart; the browser reports "reload" or "back_forward" distinctly
  // from "navigate" (a real new visit), which a bare pathname check
  // can't distinguish on its own.
  var navEntries=performance.getEntriesByType&&performance.getEntriesByType("navigation");
  var navType=navEntries&&navEntries[0]&&navEntries[0].type;
  var isFreshVisit=navType!=="reload"&&navType!=="back_forward";
  if(isFreshVisit){
    prefillPromise.then(function(){doSearch();});
  }
  // [CLEAN-SEARCH-URL] A legacy ?from=&to= link self-heals to the clean
  // /search/FROM-TO form via replaceState and *stays* there — bookmarkable
  // and shareable. This normalization always happens regardless of
  // isFreshVisit above; only the auto-search itself is gated.
  if(!pathMatch){
    history.replaceState({},document.title,"/search/"+fromCode.toUpperCase()+"-"+toCode.toUpperCase());
  }
  }catch(e){}}

function focusFieldAfterMiniSearchClose(fieldId){
  closeMiniSearch();
  setTimeout(function(){
    window.scrollTo({top:0,behavior:"smooth"});
    setTimeout(function(){var el=document.getElementById(fieldId);if(el){el.focus();el.select()}},600);
  },100);
}

function toggleFilterSidebarBtn(btn){
  var sb=document.getElementById("sidebar");
  if(!sb)return;
  if(sb.style.display==="block"){sb.style.display="none";btn.textContent="⚙️ Filter"}
  else{sb.style.display="block";btn.textContent="✕ Filter schließen"}
}
function toggleFilterSidebarChip(btn){
  var sb=document.getElementById("sidebar");
  if(!sb)return;
  if(sb.style.display==="block"){sb.style.display="none";btn.classList.remove("active")}
  else{sb.style.display="block";btn.classList.add("active")}
}
function handleFromInput(el){acTypeReset("from");acS("from",el.value)}
function handleFromFocus(el){closeOtherAcDrops("from");acS("from",el.value);scrollFieldIntoView(el)}
function handleToInput(el){acTypeReset("to");acS("to",el.value)}
function handleToFocus(el){closeOtherAcDrops("to");acS("to",el.value);scrollFieldIntoView(el)}
function handlePriceSliderInput(el){
  var pval=document.getElementById("pval");
  if(pval)pval.textContent="€"+el.value;
  el.setAttribute("aria-valuenow",el.value);
  applyF();
}
function handleRpPriceSliderInput(el){
  var pval2=document.getElementById("pval2");
  if(pval2)pval2.textContent="€"+el.value;
  var fPrice=document.getElementById("f-price");
  if(fPrice)fPrice.value=el.value;
  el.setAttribute("aria-valuenow",el.value);
  applyRpF();
}
function clearComplianceError(el){
  var w=el.closest(".compliance-wrap");
  if(w)w.classList.remove("required-err");
}

  document.addEventListener("click",function(e){
    var el=e.target.closest("[data-fn]");
    if(!el)return;
    if(el.hasAttribute("data-stop-prop"))e.stopPropagation();
    if(el.hasAttribute("data-pd"))e.preventDefault();
    var closePgId=el.getAttribute("data-close-pg");
    if(closePgId)closePg(closePgId);
    var fn=window[el.getAttribute("data-fn")];
    if(typeof fn==="function"){
      var jsonArgs=el.getAttribute("data-fn-json");
      if(jsonArgs!==null){
        try{fn.apply(null,JSON.parse(jsonArgs))}catch(e){}
      }else{
        var arg=el.getAttribute("data-fn-arg");
        var arg2=el.getAttribute("data-fn-arg2");
        if(arg==="$el")arg=el;
        if(arg===null)fn();else if(arg2===null)fn(arg);else fn(arg,arg2);
      }
    }
    var then=el.getAttribute("data-then");
    if(then)then.split(",").forEach(function(name){
      var f=window[name];
      if(typeof f==="function")f();
    });
  });
  function bindFieldEventDispatch(eventName,attrPrefix){
  document.addEventListener(eventName,function(e){
    var el=e.target.closest("["+attrPrefix+"-fn]");
    if(!el)return;
    var fn=window[el.getAttribute(attrPrefix+"-fn")];
    if(typeof fn!=="function")return;
    var arg=el.getAttribute(attrPrefix+"-arg");
    var arg2=el.getAttribute(attrPrefix+"-arg2");
    if(arg==="$el")arg=el;else if(arg==="$val")arg=el.value;
    if(arg2==="$el")arg2=el;else if(arg2==="$val")arg2=el.value;
    if(arg===null)fn();else if(arg2===null)fn(arg);else fn(arg,arg2);
  });
}
bindFieldEventDispatch("input","data-oninput");
bindFieldEventDispatch("change","data-onchange");
bindFieldEventDispatch("focusin","data-onfocus");
bindFieldEventDispatch("focusout","data-onblur");

/* [LCP-MAIN-THREAD-FIX] تأجيل تحميل ودجت الشات لحد ما الصفحة تخلص تحميلها بالكامل، بدل ما يشتغل فورًا مع باقي الكود ويستهلك وقت معالجة في نفس لحظة قياس LCP. */
if (document.readyState === 'complete') { _initBrevoWidget(); }
else { window.addEventListener('load', _initBrevoWidget); }
// [DYNAMIC-DEST-PRICES] The homepage "Beliebte Ziele" cards and the "Alle
// Ziele" page both shipped with static, illustrative "ab €XX" figures —
// fine as a placeholder but not a real price. Every price element now
// carries a data-code attribute (the destination's IATA code) via the
// "dyn-price" class; this fetches the real current cheapest fare for
// BER→code from the same /route-price endpoint the individual route pages
// already use (server-side cached 6h, so repeat visits are cheap), then
// updates every matching element (a code can appear in both the homepage
// preview and the full "Alle Ziele" list — both get updated together).
// Each code is only requested once no matter how many places it appears.
// On failure or a route with no live offers, the original static price is
// left in place rather than showing a broken/blank value.
// [PRICE-MATCH-FIX] The exact departure_date each destination's cached
// "ab €X" price was actually computed for — /route-price caches for up
// to 6h, so "today + 21 days" computed independently at click-time (by
// qs()'s own default) could land on a different calendar date than the
// one the displayed price used, especially near a day boundary. That
// mismatch is exactly why the price shown here and the price the search
// results then showed could disagree — not a rounding issue, a genuinely
// different date being searched. Populated as each price loads; qsHome()
// below uses it to force the search onto the SAME date the price came
// from whenever we have it.
var DEST_PRICE_DATES = {};

// [THROTTLE-FIX] كانت كل الوجهات الـ12 بتتطلب من Duffel في نفس اللحظة
// بالظبط — ده سبب تباطؤ ملحوظ (كل طلب كان بياخد من 2.2 لـ3.5 ثانية،
// بيزيد كل ما الطلبات المتزامنة زادت) خصوصاً أول ما الكاش يُمسح أو
// ينتهي. دلوقتي بتتبعت على دفعات صغيرة (3 في المرة)، الدفعة الجاية
// بتتبعت بس بعد ما اللي قبلها يخلص — نفس عدد الطلبات الإجمالي، بس
// موزّع بدل ما يضرب Duffel كله مرة واحدة.
function fetchPriceForCode(code) {
  var group = document.querySelectorAll('.dyn-price[data-code="' + code + '"]');
  group.forEach(function (t) { t.classList.add('loading'); });
  return fetch(PROXY + '/route-price?from=' + encodeURIComponent(HOME_ORIGIN.code) + '&to=' + encodeURIComponent(code))
    .then(function (r) { return r.json(); })
    .then(function (d) {
      group.forEach(function (t) { t.classList.remove('loading'); });
      if (!d || !d.ok || !d.price) return; // keep static fallback price
      if (d.departure_date) DEST_PRICE_DATES[code] = d.departure_date;
      var val = fmt(d.price);
      group.forEach(function (t) {
        t.textContent = val;
        t.classList.add('price-updated');
        t.addEventListener('animationend', function handler() {
          t.classList.remove('price-updated');
          t.removeEventListener('animationend', handler);
        });
      });
    })
    .catch(function () {
      group.forEach(function (t) { t.classList.remove('loading'); });
    });
}

function loadDestinationPrices() {
  var seen = {};
  var codes = [];
  document.querySelectorAll('.dyn-price[data-code]').forEach(function (el) {
    var code = el.getAttribute('data-code');
    if (!code || seen[code]) return;
    seen[code] = true;
    codes.push(code);
  });

  var BATCH_SIZE = 3;
  var i = 0;
  function nextBatch() {
    if (i >= codes.length) return;
    var batch = codes.slice(i, i + BATCH_SIZE);
    i += BATCH_SIZE;
    Promise.all(batch.map(fetchPriceForCode)).then(nextBatch);
  }
  nextBatch();
}
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', loadDestinationPrices);

// [NEAREST-AIRPORT] Every "quick pick" card/chip (Beliebte Ziele, Top
// Strecken) used to hardcode Berlin as the departure airport for every
// visitor, everywhere — someone in Munich or Vienna tapping "Lissabon"
// got a Berlin→Lisbon search, not a search from wherever they actually
// are. HOME_ORIGIN now defaults to Berlin (safe fallback for denied/
// unavailable location, or a visitor far outside this airport list) and
// is only ever upgraded to something more relevant once geolocation
// actually resolves — never blocks page render, never prompts twice.
// Deliberately a short, hand-picked list of major DACH-region hubs
// (this is a German-market site) rather than all ~80 airports in AP,
// since nearest-of-80 would need real coordinates for every one of them
// (AP only carries names/codes, not lat/lng) — nearest-of-9 major hubs
// is what actually matters for "which airport is realistically closest
// to this visitor" in practice.
var NEARBY_AIRPORTS = [
  { code: 'BER', city: 'Berlin', lat: 52.3667, lng: 13.5033 },
  { code: 'MUC', city: 'München', lat: 48.3538, lng: 11.7861 },
  { code: 'FRA', city: 'Frankfurt', lat: 50.0379, lng: 8.5622 },
  { code: 'HAM', city: 'Hamburg', lat: 53.6304, lng: 9.9882 },
  { code: 'DUS', city: 'Düsseldorf', lat: 51.2895, lng: 6.7668 },
  { code: 'CGN', city: 'Köln', lat: 50.8659, lng: 7.1427 },
  { code: 'STR', city: 'Stuttgart', lat: 48.6899, lng: 9.2220 },
  { code: 'VIE', city: 'Wien', lat: 48.1103, lng: 16.5697 },
  { code: 'ZRH', city: 'Zürich', lat: 47.4647, lng: 8.5492 },
];
var HOME_ORIGIN = { code: 'BER', city: 'Berlin' }; // آمن افتراضياً لحد ما GPS يرجع نتيجة (لو رجع أصلاً)

function haversineKmClient(lat1, lon1, lat2, lon2) {
  var R = 6371, toRad = function (d) { return d * Math.PI / 180; };
  var dLat = toRad(lat2 - lat1), dLon = toRad(lon2 - lon1);
  var a = Math.sin(dLat / 2) * Math.sin(dLat / 2) + Math.cos(toRad(lat1)) * Math.cos(toRad(lat2)) * Math.sin(dLon / 2) * Math.sin(dLon / 2);
  return R * 2 * Math.atan2(Math.sqrt(a), Math.sqrt(1 - a));
}

function detectHomeAirport() {
  if (!('geolocation' in navigator)) return; // المتصفح مش بيدعم الموقع الجغرافي — نفضل على برلين
  navigator.geolocation.getCurrentPosition(
    function (pos) {
      var lat = pos.coords.latitude, lng = pos.coords.longitude;
      var nearest = null, nearestDist = Infinity;
      NEARBY_AIRPORTS.forEach(function (ap) {
        var d = haversineKmClient(lat, lng, ap.lat, ap.lng);
        if (d < nearestDist) { nearestDist = d; nearest = ap; }
      });
      if (nearest && nearest.code !== HOME_ORIGIN.code) {
        HOME_ORIGIN = { code: nearest.code, city: nearest.city };
        renderTopStrecken();     // إعادة رسم المسارات بالمدينة الصح
        loadDestinationPrices(); // إعادة تحميل الأسعار من المطار الصح
      }
    },
    function () { /* المستخدم رفض الإذن أو حصل خطأ — نفضل على برلين بهدوء، من غير ما نزعجه بأي رسالة */ },
    { timeout: 5000, maximumAge: 600000 }
  );
}

// كل الكروت اللي كانت بتنده qs('BER', code, name) بقت بتنده qsHome بدلها،
// عشان تستخدم أقرب مطار حقيقي للمستخدم مش برلين ثابتة.
function qsHome(toCode, toCity) {
  qs(HOME_ORIGIN.code, toCode, toCity);
  // [PRICE-MATCH-FIX] qs() (فوق) بيحط تاريخ افتراضي مستقل (اليوم+21
  // يوم محسوب دلوقتي). لو عندنا التاريخ الحقيقي اللي السعر المعروض في
  // الكارت اتحسب عليه فعلاً (ممكن يكون اتخزّن من ساعات فاتت)، نستبدل
  // بيه — عشان نتيجة البحث تطابق السعر اللي المستخدم شافه بالظبط، مش
  // سعر تاريخ تاني قريب منه بالصدفة.
  var exactDate = DEST_PRICE_DATES[toCode];
  if (exactDate) {
    calDepDate = exactDate;
    var depEl = document.getElementById('dep-date');
    if (depEl) depEl.value = exactDate;
    var depDisp = document.getElementById('dep-disp');
    if (depDisp) { depDisp.textContent = fmtDate(exactDate); depDisp.classList.remove('empty'); }
  }
}

// [TOP-STRECKEN-EXPAND] كانت 6 مسارات ثابتة في HTML، بسعر ثابت، ومربوطة
// ببرلين دايماً. بقت 30 مسار، من غير سعر (السعر مش موجود هنا أصلاً كان
// تقديري ثابت وغير دقيق)، وبتترسم ديناميكياً بأقرب مدينة حقيقية
// للمستخدم كنقطة انطلاق.
var TOP_ROUTES = [
  ['LHR', 'London', 14], ['PMI', 'Mallorca', 8], ['AMS', 'Amsterdam', 10],
  ['FCO', 'Rom', 6], ['VIE', 'Wien', 5], ['MAD', 'Madrid', 7],
  ['BCN', 'Barcelona', 9], ['LIS', 'Lissabon', 4], ['IST', 'Istanbul', 6],
  ['CDG', 'Paris', 11], ['ATH', 'Athen', 3], ['PRG', 'Prag', 5],
  ['BUD', 'Budapest', 4], ['WAW', 'Warschau', 4], ['CPH', 'Kopenhagen', 5],
  ['OSL', 'Oslo', 3], ['ARN', 'Stockholm', 3], ['HEL', 'Helsinki', 2],
  ['DUB', 'Dublin', 4], ['ZRH', 'Zürich', 6], ['MXP', 'Mailand', 5],
  ['NCE', 'Nizza', 3], ['LYS', 'Lyon', 2], ['BRU', 'Brüssel', 5],
  ['LUX', 'Luxemburg', 2], ['SVQ', 'Sevilla', 2], ['VLC', 'Valencia', 3],
  ['NAP', 'Neapel', 3], ['SPU', 'Split', 2], ['DBV', 'Dubrovnik', 2],
];

function renderTopStrecken() {
  var el = document.getElementById('top-strecken-grid');
  if (!el) return;
  el.innerHTML = TOP_ROUTES.map(function (r) {
    var code = r[0], city = r[1], freq = r[2];
    return '<div class="rchip" data-fn="qsHome" data-fn-arg="' + code + '" data-fn-arg2="' + city + '"><div><div class="rname">' +
      HOME_ORIGIN.city + ' → ' + city + '</div><div class="rfreq">' + freq + ' Flüge/Tag</div></div></div>';
  }).join('');
}

document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
  renderTopStrecken();
  detectHomeAirport();
});

// [CTA-VISIBILITY-FIX] زرار البحث العائم للصفحة الرئيسية — بيظهر بس
// لما الشرطين دول يتحققوا مع بعض: (1) المستخدم نزل تحت زرار البحث
// الأساسي (.gobtn) بحيث بقى فوق نطاق الشاشة المرئي، و(2) مفيش صفحة
// نتائج أو نافذة حجز مفتوحة حالياً (عشان مايتعارضش مع الشريط العائم
// التاني اللي بيظهر بعد البحث). بيتفحص كل تمرير بس بأداء خفيف
// (getBoundingClientRect بسيط، من غير أي حسابات تقيلة).
(function () {
  var floatBtn = null;
  var rafPending = false;
  function checkHomeFloatCta() {
    if (!floatBtn) floatBtn = document.getElementById('home-float-cta');
    if (!floatBtn) return;
    var resultsOpen = document.getElementById('results-page') && document.getElementById('results-page').classList.contains('open');
    var bflowOpen = document.getElementById('bflow-ov') && document.getElementById('bflow-ov').classList.contains('open');
    if (resultsOpen || bflowOpen) { floatBtn.classList.remove('visible'); return; }
    var mainBtn = document.querySelector('.gobtn');
    if (!mainBtn) { floatBtn.classList.remove('visible'); return; }
    var rect = mainBtn.getBoundingClientRect();
    // الزرار الأساسي طلع فوق حدود الشاشة (المستخدم عدّاه وهو نازل) —
    // ده بالظبط اللحظة اللي محتاجين فيها الزرار العائم.
    var scrolledPast = rect.bottom < 0;
    floatBtn.classList.toggle('visible', scrolledPast);
  }
  /* [FORCED-REFLOW-FIX] تجميع أحداث السكرول المتلاحقة وتشغيل الفحص مرة واحدة بس قبل كل رسم فريم (requestAnimationFrame)، بدل ما يتنفذ getBoundingClientRect() مع كل حدث سكرول لوحده. */
  function onScroll() {
    if (rafPending) return;
    rafPending = true;
    requestAnimationFrame(function () { rafPending = false; checkHomeFloatCta(); });
  }
  window.addEventListener('scroll', onScroll, { passive: true });
  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', checkHomeFloatCta);
})();

// [INTERNAL-LINKING-SEO-FIX] روابط <a href> حقيقية وقابلة للزحف لأهم
// المسارات المنشورة فعلياً — بتتحمل مرة واحدة، وبتستخدم بيانات حقيقية
// (مش أسماء مطارات مُخترعة). لحد 40 مسار عشان القسم مايبقاش ضخم.
function loadPopularRouteLinks() {
  fetch(PROXY + '/route-pages')
    .then(function (r) { return r.json(); })
    .then(function (j) {
      if (!j.ok || !j.routes || !j.routes.length) return;
      var section = document.getElementById('popular-routes-links-section');
      var container = document.getElementById('popular-routes-links');
      var routes = j.routes.slice(0, 40);
      container.innerHTML = routes.map(function (r) {
        return '<a href="/flights/' + encodeURIComponent(r.slug) + '" style="background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--bd);border-radius:20px;padding:6px 14px;font-size:12.5px;color:var(--tx2);text-decoration:none">' +
          r.origin_city + ' → ' + r.destination_city +
        '</a>';
      }).join('');
      section.style.display = 'block';
    })
    .catch(function () { /* قسم ثانوي — فشله مايأثرش على باقي الصفحة */ });
}
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', loadPopularRouteLinks);

<script>
var PROXY = 'https://api.airpiv.com';

function escHtml(s) {
  var d = document.createElement('div');
  d.textContent = s || '';
  return d.innerHTML;
}

var NOIMG_SVG = '<div class="post-ticket-noimg"><svg width="34" height="34" viewBox="0 0 64 64" fill="none"><path d="M32 10 L48 46 L32 37 L16 46 Z" fill="#0FB5A0" opacity="0.85"/></svg></div>';

fetch(PROXY + '/blog-posts-en')
  .then(function(r){ return r.json(); })
  .then(function(j){
    var grid = document.getElementById('blog-grid');
    if (!j.ok || !j.posts || !j.posts.length) {
      grid.innerHTML = '<div class="jrn-empty">No posts yet — check back soon!</div>';
      return;
    }
    grid.innerHTML = j.posts.map(function(p) {
      var dateStr = p.published_at ? new Date(p.published_at).toLocaleDateString('en-GB', {year:'numeric',month:'long',day:'numeric'}) : '';
      var cover = p.cover_image_url
        ? '<img class="post-ticket-cover" src="' + escHtml(p.cover_image_url) + '" loading="lazy" alt="' + escHtml(p.title) + '">'
        : NOIMG_SVG;
      return '<a class="post-ticket" href="/en/blog/' + encodeURIComponent(p.slug) + '">' +
        cover +
        '<div class="post-ticket-perf" aria-hidden="true"></div>' +
        '<div class="post-ticket-body">' +
          '<span class="post-ticket-eyebrow">Airpiv Journal</span>' +
          '<h2 class="post-ticket-title">' + escHtml(p.title) + '</h2>' +
          (p.excerpt ? '<p class="post-ticket-excerpt">' + escHtml(p.excerpt) + '</p>' : '<span style="flex:1"></span>') +
          '<div class="post-ticket-meta"><span>' + escHtml(p.author || 'Airpiv Team') + '</span><span class="dot">·</span><span>' + dateStr + '</span></div>' +
        '</div>' +
      '</a>';
    }).join('');
  })
  .catch(function(){
    document.getElementById('blog-grid').innerHTML = '<div class="jrn-error">Posts could not be loaded. Please try again later.</div>';
  });
</script>

</body>

    <div><div class="flo"><span style="display:inline-flex;width:26px;height:26px;border-radius:8px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#12C7B0,#0A9384);align-items:center;justify-content:center"><svg width="17" height="17" viewBox="0 0 64 64" fill="none"><path d="M32 14 L46 46 L32 38 L18 46 Z" fill="#0A1822"/></svg></span>Air<span style="color:var(--teal)">piv</span></div><p class="fdes">Find flights no one else can find. 600+ airlines, best prices, full guarantee.</p></div>
    <div class="fcol"><h4>Company</h4><ul><li><a href="/about.html">About us</a></li><li><a href="/en/blog">Blog</a></li></ul></div>
    <div class="fcol"><h4>Support</h4><ul><li><a href="/contact.html">Contact</a></li><li><a href="/privacy.html">Privacy</a></li><li><a href="/terms.html">Terms</a></li></ul></div>
  </div>
  <div class="fbot"><p>© 2026 Airpiv · All rights reserved</p></div>
</div></footer>

<script>
var PROXY = 'https://api.airpiv.com';

function escHtml(s) {
  var d = document.createElement('div');
  d.textContent = s || '';
  return d.innerHTML;
}

var params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
var slug = params.get('slug');
if (!slug) {
  // [CLEAN-BLOG-URL] يدعم الرابط النظيف الجديد /blog/<slug> — بياخد
  // آخر جزء غير فاضي من المسار، أياً كان الجزء اللي قبله بالظبط، بنفس
  // المنطق اللي أصلح مشكلة صفحات المسارات. لسه بيدعم ?slug= القديم
  // كمان (أعلى) لأي روابط قديمة اتفهرست في جوجل أو محفوظة عند الناس.
  var segments = window.location.pathname.split('/').filter(Boolean);
  var last = segments[segments.length - 1] || '';
  if (last && !/\.html?$/i.test(last)) slug = decodeURIComponent(last);
}

if (!slug) {
  renderNotFound();
} else {
  fetch(PROXY + '/blog-posts-en/' + encodeURIComponent(slug))
    .then(function(r){ return r.json(); })
    .then(function(j){
      if (!j.ok || !j.post) { renderNotFound(); return; }
      renderPost(j.post);
    })
    .catch(function(){ renderNotFound(); });
}

function renderNotFound() {
  document.getElementById('post-content').innerHTML =
    '<a href="/en/blog" class="back-link">← Back to blog</a>' +
    '<div class="post-notfound">' +
      '<h1>Post not found</h1>' +
      '<p style="color:var(--tx3)">This blog post doesn\'t exist or has been removed.</p>' +
      '<a href="/en/blog" class="btn-t" style="display:inline-flex;margin-top:16px">← Back to blog</a>' +
    '</div>';
}

function computeReadingTime(html) {
  var text = html.replace(/<[^>]+>/g, ' ');
  var words = text.trim().split(/\s+/).filter(Boolean).length;
  return Math.max(1, Math.round(words / 200));
}

function buildTocAndIds(containerEl) {
  var headings = containerEl.querySelectorAll('h2, h3');
  var items = [];
  var seen = {};
  headings.forEach(function(h) {
    var base = h.textContent.trim().toLowerCase()
      .replace(/[äöüß]/g, function(c){ return {'ä':'ae','ö':'oe','ü':'ue','ß':'ss'}[c]; })
      .replace(/[^a-z0-9\s-]/g, '').trim().replace(/\s+/g, '-') || 'abschnitt';
    var id = base, n = 2;
    while (seen[id]) { id = base + '-' + (n++); }
    seen[id] = true;
    h.id = id;
    items.push({ level: h.tagName.toLowerCase(), text: h.textContent.trim(), id: id });
  });
  return items;
}

// [CONTEXT-DETECTION] قائمة مدن حقيقية معروفة (نفس المدن اللي فعليًا
// موجودة كمسارات في الموقع). بندوّر في نص المقال (العنوان + المحتوى)
// عن أي اسم منهم كـ"كلمة كاملة" — لو لقينا تطابق، بنستخدمه فعليًا
// لربط المقال بمسارات ومقالات بنفس الوجهة. لو مفيش أي مدينة مذكورة
// في المقال، بنرجع لعرض عام (مقالات حديثة / مسارات شائعة) — صريح
// وواضح، مفيش تخمين أو "مطابقة ذكية" غير موجودة فعليًا.
var KNOWN_CITIES = ['Berlin','München','Munich','Frankfurt','Hamburg','Düsseldorf','Cologne','Köln','Stuttgart','Hannover','Leipzig','Nürnberg','Nuremberg','Dortmund','Bremen','Wien','Vienna','Zürich','Zurich','Genf','Geneva','London','Paris','Rom','Rome','Mailand','Milan','Venedig','Venice','Neapel','Naples','Madrid','Barcelona','Valencia','Sevilla','Seville','Malaga','Lissabon','Lisbon','Porto','Amsterdam','Brüssel','Brussels','Luxembourg','Luxembourg','Kopenhagen','Copenhagen','Oslo','Stockholm','Helsinki','Dublin','Warschau','Warsaw','Krakau','Krakow','Prag','Prague','Budapest','Athen','Athens','Istanbul','Kairo','Cairo','Dubai','Doha','Bangkok','Singapore','Singapore','Hong Kong','Hong Kong','Tokio','Tokyo','New York','Los Angeles','San Francisco','Miami','Toronto','São Paulo','Kapstadt','Cape Town','Johannesburg','Sydney','Melbourne','Dubrovnik','Split','Zagreb'];

// [COUNTRY-MAPPING] كل مدينة معروفة مربوطة ببلدها الحقيقي — ده اللي
// بيسمح بمطابقة "نفس الدولة" لما مفيش تطابق مباشر في اسم المدينة
// (مقال عن ميلانو ومقال عن روما، الاتنين إيطاليا — لسه مرتبطين).
var CITY_COUNTRY = {
  'Berlin':'Germany','München':'Germany','Munich':'Germany','Frankfurt':'Germany','Hamburg':'Germany','Düsseldorf':'Germany','Cologne':'Germany','Köln':'Germany','Stuttgart':'Germany','Hannover':'Germany','Leipzig':'Germany','Nürnberg':'Germany','Nuremberg':'Germany','Dortmund':'Germany','Bremen':'Germany',
  'Wien':'Austria','Vienna':'Austria',
  'Zürich':'Switzerland','Zurich':'Switzerland','Genf':'Switzerland','Geneva':'Switzerland',
  'London':'United Kingdom',
  'Paris':'France',
  'Rom':'Italy','Rome':'Italy','Mailand':'Italy','Milan':'Italy','Venedig':'Italy','Venice':'Italy','Neapel':'Italy','Naples':'Italy',
  'Madrid':'Spain','Barcelona':'Spain','Valencia':'Spain','Sevilla':'Spain','Seville':'Spain','Malaga':'Spain',
  'Lissabon':'Portugal','Lisbon':'Portugal','Porto':'Portugal',
  'Amsterdam':'Netherlands',
  'Brüssel':'Belgium','Brussels':'Belgium',
  'Luxembourg':'Luxembourg','Luxembourg':'Luxembourg',
  'Kopenhagen':'Denmark','Copenhagen':'Denmark',
  'Oslo':'Norway','Stockholm':'Sweden','Helsinki':'Finland','Dublin':'Ireland',
  'Warschau':'Poland','Warsaw':'Poland','Krakau':'Poland','Krakow':'Poland',
  'Prag':'Czech Republic','Prague':'Czech Republic','Budapest':'Hungary','Athen':'Greece','Athens':'Greece',
  'Istanbul':'Turkey','Kairo':'Egypt','Cairo':'Egypt','Dubai':'VAE','Doha':'Qatar',
  'Bangkok':'Thailand','Singapore':'Singapore','Singapore':'Singapore','Hong Kong':'Hong Kong','Hong Kong':'Hong Kong','Tokio':'Japan','Tokyo':'Japan',
  'New York':'USA','Los Angeles':'USA','San Francisco':'USA','Miami':'USA',
  'Toronto':'Canada','São Paulo':'Brazil','Kapstadt':'South Africa','Cape Town':'South Africa','Johannesburg':'South Africa',
  'Sydney':'Australia','Melbourne':'Australia','Dubrovnik':'Croatia','Split':'Croatia','Zagreb':'Croatia'
};
function citiesToCountries(cities) {
  var set = {};
  cities.forEach(function(c) { var co = CITY_COUNTRY[c]; if (co) set[co] = true; });
  return Object.keys(set);
}

function detectCitiesInText(text) {
  var found = [];
  KNOWN_CITIES.forEach(function(city) {
    var re = new RegExp('(^|[^a-zA-ZäöüÄÖÜ])' + city.replace(/[.*+?^${}()|[\]\\]/g, '\\$&') + '([^a-zA-ZäöüÄÖÜ]|$)', 'i');
    if (re.test(text)) found.push(city);
  });
  return found;
}


function extractFaq(containerEl) {
  var headings = Array.prototype.slice.call(containerEl.querySelectorAll('h2'));
  var faqHeading = headings.find(function(h) {
    var t = h.textContent.trim().replace(/^[^\wäöüÄÖÜ]+/, ''); // strip a leading emoji/symbol like "❓ FAQ"
    return /^(FAQ|FAQs|Häufig gestellte Fragen|Oft gestellte Fragen|Fragen und Antworten|Wichtige Fragen|Frequently Asked Questions|Questions and Answers)$/i.test(t);
  });
  if (!faqHeading) return { items: [] };

  var items = [];
  var node = faqHeading.nextElementSibling;
  var toRemove = [faqHeading];
  var curQ = null, curA = [];
  function flush() { if (curQ && curA.length) items.push({ question: curQ, answer: curA.join(' ') }); curQ = null; curA = []; }
  while (node && node.tagName !== 'H2') {
    toRemove.push(node);
    if (node.tagName === 'H3') { flush(); curQ = node.textContent.trim(); }
    else if (node.tagName === 'P' && curQ) { curA.push(node.textContent.trim()); }
    node = node.nextElementSibling;
  }
  flush();
  toRemove.forEach(function(n) { n.remove(); });
  return { items: items };
}

function renderPost(post) {
  var url = 'https://airpiv.com/en/blog/' + encodeURIComponent(post.slug);
  var description = post.meta_description || post.excerpt || (post.title + ' — Airpiv Blog');
  var image = post.cover_image_url || 'https://airpiv.com/og-image.png';

  document.getElementById('page-title').textContent = post.title + ' | Airpiv Blog';
  document.getElementById('page-description').setAttribute('content', description);
  document.getElementById('page-canonical').setAttribute('href', url);
  document.getElementById('og-title').setAttribute('content', post.title);
  document.getElementById('og-description').setAttribute('content', description);
  document.getElementById('og-url').setAttribute('content', url);
  document.getElementById('og-image').setAttribute('content', image);
  document.getElementById('twitter-image').setAttribute('content', image);

  var plainText = post.content.replace(/<[^>]+>/g, ' ');
  var wordCount = plainText.trim().split(/\s+/).filter(Boolean).length;
  var readingMin = computeReadingTime(post.content);

  var pubDate = post.published_at ? new Date(post.published_at) : null;
  var updDate = post.updated_at ? new Date(post.updated_at) : null;
  var dateStr = pubDate ? pubDate.toLocaleDateString('en-GB', {year:'numeric',month:'long',day:'numeric'}) : '—';
  var showUpdated = updDate && pubDate && (updDate.getTime() - pubDate.getTime() > 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000);
  var updatedStr = showUpdated ? updDate.toLocaleDateString('en-GB', {year:'numeric',month:'long',day:'numeric'}) : null;

  document.getElementById('breadcrumb-schema').textContent = JSON.stringify({
    "@context": "https://schema.org",
    "@type": "BreadcrumbList",
    "itemListElement": [
      { "@type": "ListItem", "position": 1, "name": "Home", "item": "https://airpiv.com/en/" },
      { "@type": "ListItem", "position": 2, "name": "Blog", "item": "https://airpiv.com/en/blog" },
      { "@type": "ListItem", "position": 3, "name": post.title, "item": url }
    ]
  });

  document.getElementById('article-schema').textContent = JSON.stringify({
    "@context": "https://schema.org",
    "@type": "Article",
    "headline": post.title,
    "description": description,
    "image": image,
    "publisher": {
      "@type": "Organization", "name": "Airpiv", "url": "https://airpiv.com",
      "logo": { "@type": "ImageObject", "url": "https://airpiv.com/airpiv-logo.png" }
    },
    "author": { "@type": "Organization", "name": post.author || "Airpiv Team" },
    "datePublished": post.published_at,
    "dateModified": post.updated_at || post.published_at,
    "mainEntityOfPage": { "@type": "WebPage", "@id": url },
    "articleSection": "Reisetipps",
    "wordCount": wordCount,
    "inLanguage": "en-GB"
  });

  var cover = post.cover_image_url ? '<img class="post-cover" src="' + escHtml(post.cover_image_url) + '" alt="' + escHtml(post.title) + '" loading="lazy">' : '';
  var authorName = post.author || 'Airpiv Team';
  var authorInitial = authorName.trim().charAt(0).toUpperCase();

  document.getElementById('post-content').innerHTML =
    '<nav class="post-breadcrumb" aria-label="Breadcrumb"><a href="/en/">Home</a><span class="sep">\u203a</span><a href="/en/blog">Blog</a><span class="sep">\u203a</span><span class="cur">' + escHtml(post.title) + '</span></nav>' +
    '<div class="pass">' +
      '<div class="pass-strip">' +
        '<div class="pass-strip-brand"><svg width="15" height="15" viewBox="0 0 64 64" fill="none"><path d="M32 10 L48 46 L32 37 L16 46 Z" fill="#0FB5A0"/></svg>Airpiv</div>' +
        '<div class="pass-strip-label">Boarding Pass</div>' +
      '</div>' +
      '<div class="pass-route">' +
        '<div class="pass-route-col">' +
          '<div class="pass-route-eyebrow">From</div>' +
          '<div class="pass-route-from">Airpiv Journal</div>' +
        '</div>' +
        '<div class="pass-route-plane">\u2708</div>' +
        '<div class="pass-route-col">' +
          '<div class="pass-route-eyebrow">To</div>' +
          '<h1 class="pass-route-title">' + escHtml(post.title) + '</h1>' +
        '</div>' +
      '</div>' +
      '<div class="pass-perf" aria-hidden="true"></div>' +
      '<div class="pass-meta">' +
        '<div class="pass-meta-item"><div class="pass-meta-eyebrow">Author</div><div class="pass-meta-val">' + escHtml(authorName) + '</div></div>' +
        '<div class="pass-meta-item"><div class="pass-meta-eyebrow">Published</div><div class="pass-meta-val">' + dateStr + '</div></div>' +
        (updatedStr ? '<div class="pass-meta-item"><div class="pass-meta-eyebrow">Updated</div><div class="pass-meta-val">' + updatedStr + '</div></div>' : '') +
        '<div class="pass-meta-item"><div class="pass-meta-eyebrow">Reading time</div><div class="pass-meta-val">' + readingMin + ' min</div></div>' +
      '</div>' +
    '</div>' +
    cover +
    '<div class="post-share" id="post-share"></div>' +
    '<div id="post-toc-slot"></div>' +
    '<div class="post-body" id="post-body">' + post.content + '</div>' +
    '<div id="post-routes-slot"></div>' +
    '<div id="post-faq-slot"></div>' +
    '<div class="post-author">' +
      '<div class="post-author-av">' + escHtml(authorInitial) + '</div>' +
      '<div>' +
        '<div class="post-author-name">' + escHtml(authorName) + '</div>' +
        '<div class="post-author-role">Airpiv Editorial</div>' +
        '<div class="post-author-bio">Writes for Airpiv about cheap flights, travel planning, and everything that makes flying easier.</div>' +
      '</div>' +
    '</div>' +
    '<div id="post-similar-slot"></div>';

  var bodyEl = document.getElementById('post-body');

  bodyEl.querySelectorAll('img').forEach(function(img) {
    if (!img.hasAttribute('loading')) img.setAttribute('loading', 'lazy');
    if (!img.hasAttribute('alt')) img.setAttribute('alt', post.title);
    img.style.maxWidth = '100%';
    img.style.height = 'auto';
  });

  var tocItems = buildTocAndIds(bodyEl);
  if (tocItems.length >= 2) {
    var tocHtml = '<div class="post-toc"><div class="post-toc-title">\ud83d\udcd1 Table of contents</div><ol>' +
      tocItems.map(function(t) {
        return '<li class="' + (t.level === 'h3' ? 'toc-h3' : '') + '"><a href="#' + t.id + '">' + escHtml(t.text) + '</a></li>';
      }).join('') + '</ol></div>';
    document.getElementById('post-toc-slot').innerHTML = tocHtml;
  }

  var faq = extractFaq(bodyEl);
  if (faq.items.length) {
    var faqHtml = '<div class="post-faq"><h2>Frequently asked questions</h2>' +
      faq.items.map(function(f, i) {
        return '<div class="post-faq-item" data-idx="' + i + '">' +
          '<button class="post-faq-q" onclick="toggleFaq(this)">' + escHtml(f.question) +
            '<svg class="chev" width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.4" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><polyline points="6 9 12 15 18 9"/></svg>' +
          '</button>' +
          '<div class="post-faq-a"><div class="post-faq-a-in">' + escHtml(f.answer) + '</div></div>' +
        '</div>';
      }).join('') + '</div>';
    document.getElementById('post-faq-slot').innerHTML = faqHtml;

    document.getElementById('faq-schema').textContent = JSON.stringify({
      "@context": "https://schema.org",
      "@type": "FAQPage",
      "mainEntity": faq.items.map(function(f) {
        return { "@type": "Question", "name": f.question, "acceptedAnswer": { "@type": "Answer", "text": f.answer } };
      })
    });
  }

  var shareText = encodeURIComponent(post.title);
  var shareUrl = encodeURIComponent(url);
  document.getElementById('post-share').innerHTML =
    '<span class="post-share-lbl">Share</span>' +
    '<a class="post-share-btn" target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://wa.me/?text=' + shareText + '%20' + shareUrl + '" aria-label="WhatsApp"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M12.04 2C6.58 2 2.13 6.45 2.13 11.91c0 1.75.46 3.39 1.26 4.82L2 22l5.42-1.36c1.38.72 2.94 1.13 4.62 1.13 5.46 0 9.91-4.45 9.91-9.91S17.5 2 12.04 2m0 1.67c4.55 0 8.24 3.69 8.24 8.24s-3.69 8.24-8.24 8.24c-1.5 0-2.9-.4-4.11-1.1l-.29-.17-3.06.77.8-2.98-.19-.31a8.18 8.18 0 0 1-1.24-4.37c0-4.63 3.69-8.32 8.24-8.32Z"/></svg></a>' +
    '<a class="post-share-btn" target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://twitter.com/intent/tweet?text=' + shareText + '&url=' + shareUrl + '" aria-label="X"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M18.9 2H22l-7.2 8.2L22.5 22h-6.6l-5.2-6.8L4.6 22H1.5l7.7-8.8L1 2h6.7l4.7 6.2Z"/></svg></a>' +
    '<a class="post-share-btn" target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://www.facebook.com/sharer/sharer.php?u=' + shareUrl + '" aria-label="Facebook"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M22 12a10 10 0 1 0-11.6 9.87v-6.99H7.9V12h2.5V9.8c0-2.47 1.47-3.83 3.72-3.83 1.08 0 2.21.19 2.21.19v2.43h-1.24c-1.23 0-1.61.76-1.61 1.55V12h2.75l-.44 2.88h-2.31v6.99A10 10 0 0 0 22 12"/></svg></a>' +
    '<a class="post-share-btn" target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://www.linkedin.com/sharing/share-offsite/?url=' + shareUrl + '" aria-label="LinkedIn"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M20.45 20.45h-3.55v-5.57c0-1.33-.02-3.03-1.85-3.03-1.85 0-2.14 1.45-2.14 2.94v5.66H9.36V9h3.41v1.56h.05c.48-.9 1.64-1.85 3.38-1.85 3.6 0 4.27 2.37 4.27 5.46zM5.34 7.43a2.06 2.06 0 1 1 0-4.13 2.06 2.06 0 0 1 0 4.13M7.12 20.45H3.56V9h3.56z"/></svg></a>' +
    '<a class="post-share-btn" href="mailto:?subject=' + shareText + '&body=' + shareUrl + '" aria-label="E-Mail"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><rect x="2" y="4" width="20" height="16" rx="2"/><path d="m22 6-10 7L2 6"/></svg></a>' +
    '<button class="post-share-btn post-copy-btn" onclick="copyPostLink(this)" aria-label="Copy link"><span class="post-copy-toast">Copied!</span><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><rect x="9" y="9" width="13" height="13" rx="2"/><path d="M5 15H4a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V4a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h9a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v1"/></svg></button>';

  loadPopularRoutes(post);
  loadSimilarPosts(post);
}

function toggleFaq(btn) {
  var item = btn.closest('.post-faq-item');
  var answer = item.querySelector('.post-faq-a');
  var isOpen = item.classList.contains('open');
  document.querySelectorAll('.post-faq-item.open').forEach(function(el) {
    el.classList.remove('open');
    el.querySelector('.post-faq-a').style.maxHeight = null;
  });
  if (!isOpen) {
    item.classList.add('open');
    answer.style.maxHeight = answer.scrollHeight + 'px';
  }
}

function copyPostLink(btn) {
  var segments = window.location.pathname.split('/').filter(Boolean);
  var pathSlug = segments.length ? segments[segments.length - 1] : '';
  var slugForLink = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search).get('slug') || (!/\.html?$/i.test(pathSlug) ? pathSlug : '');
  var url = 'https://airpiv.com/en/blog/' + encodeURIComponent(slugForLink);
  navigator.clipboard.writeText(url).then(function() {
    var toast = btn.querySelector('.post-copy-toast');
    toast.classList.add('show');
    setTimeout(function() { toast.classList.remove('show'); }, 1600);
  }).catch(function() {});
}

function loadPopularRoutes(post) {
  var detectedCities = detectCitiesInText((post.title || '') + ' ' + (post.content || '').replace(/<[^>]+>/g, ' '));
  fetch(PROXY + '/route-pages')
    .then(function(r){ return r.json(); })
    .then(function(j) {
      if (!j.ok || !j.routes || !j.routes.length) return;
      var routes = j.routes;
      var heading = '\u2708 Popular flight routes';
      var chosen = routes.slice(0, 4);
      if (detectedCities.length) {
        // [ROUTE-PRIORITY-FIX] بيقيّم كل مسار: نقطتين لو الاتنين
        // (المصدر والوجهة) مطابقين لمدن المقال — يعني ده المسار الأساسي
        // اللي المقال نفسه بيتكلم عنه، ولازم يظهر أول واحد دايمًا.
        // نقطة واحدة لو جزء واحد بس مطابق (مسار تاني لنفس مدينة واحدة).
        var scored = routes.map(function(r) {
          var oMatch = detectedCities.some(function(c) { return r.origin_city && r.origin_city.toLowerCase() === c.toLowerCase(); });
          var dMatch = detectedCities.some(function(c) { return r.destination_city && r.destination_city.toLowerCase() === c.toLowerCase(); });
          return { route: r, score: (oMatch ? 1 : 0) + (dMatch ? 1 : 0) };
        }).filter(function(s) { return s.score > 0; });
        if (scored.length) {
          scored.sort(function(a, b) { return b.score - a.score; });
          chosen = scored.map(function(s) { return s.route; }).slice(0, 4);
          heading = '\u2708 Matching flight routes';
        }
      }
      if (!chosen.length) return;
      var html = '<div class="post-routes"><h2>' + heading + '</h2><div class="post-routes-grid">' +
        chosen.map(function(r) {
          return '<a class="post-route-link" href="/en/flights/' + encodeURIComponent(r.slug) + '">' + escHtml(r.origin_city) + ' \u2192 ' + escHtml(r.destination_city) + '</a>';
        }).join('') + '</div></div>';
      document.getElementById('post-routes-slot').innerHTML = html;
    })
    .catch(function(){});
}

function loadSimilarPosts(post) {
  var currentCities = detectCitiesInText((post.title || '') + ' ' + (post.content || '').replace(/<[^>]+>/g, ' '));
  var currentCountries = citiesToCountries(currentCities);
  fetch(PROXY + '/blog-posts-en')
    .then(function(r){ return r.json(); })
    .then(function(j) {
      if (!j.ok || !j.posts) return;
      var others = j.posts.filter(function(p) { return p.slug !== post.slug; });
      var heading = '\ud83d\udcda Similar articles';
      if (currentCities.length) {
        var withMeta = others.map(function(p) {
          var pCities = detectCitiesInText((p.title || '') + ' ' + (p.excerpt || ''));
          var pCountries = citiesToCountries(pCities);
          var cityOverlap = pCities.filter(function(c) { return currentCities.indexOf(c) !== -1; }).length;
          var countryOverlap = pCountries.filter(function(c) { return currentCountries.indexOf(c) !== -1; }).length;
          return { post: p, cityOverlap: cityOverlap, countryOverlap: countryOverlap };
        });
        // مستوى 1: نفس المدينة بالضبط. مستوى 2 (لو مفيش نتيجة): نفس
        // الدولة على الأقل. مستوى 3 (لو لسه مفيش): الترتيب الافتراضي
        // (الأحدث) — صريح إن ده fallback، مش تطابق حقيقي.
        var byCity = withMeta.filter(function(s) { return s.cityOverlap > 0; }).sort(function(a, b) { return b.cityOverlap - a.cityOverlap; });
        var byCountry = withMeta.filter(function(s) { return s.cityOverlap === 0 && s.countryOverlap > 0; }).sort(function(a, b) { return b.countryOverlap - a.countryOverlap; });
        if (byCity.length) { others = byCity.map(function(s) { return s.post; }); heading = '\ud83d\udcda Matching articles for this destination'; }
        else if (byCountry.length) { others = byCountry.map(function(s) { return s.post; }); heading = '\ud83d\udcda More articles from ' + currentCountries[0]; }
      }
      others = others.slice(0, 4);
      if (!others.length) return;
      var html = '<div class="post-similar"><h2>' + heading + '</h2><div class="post-similar-grid">' +
        others.map(function(p) {
          return '<a class="post-similar-card" href="/en/blog/' + encodeURIComponent(p.slug) + '"><div class="post-similar-card-title">' + escHtml(p.title) + '</div></a>';
        }).join('') + '</div></div>';
      document.getElementById('post-similar-slot').innerHTML = html;
    })
    .catch(function(){});
}

(function() {
  var rafPending = false;
  var progressEl = document.getElementById('reading-progress');
  var backBtn = document.getElementById('back-to-top');
  function update() {
    var scrollTop = window.scrollY || document.documentElement.scrollTop;
    var docHeight = document.documentElement.scrollHeight - window.innerHeight;
    var pct = docHeight > 0 ? Math.min(100, (scrollTop / docHeight) * 100) : 0;
    progressEl.style.width = pct + '%';
    backBtn.classList.toggle('show', scrollTop > 500);
  }
  window.addEventListener('scroll', function() {
    if (rafPending) return;
    rafPending = true;
    requestAnimationFrame(function() { rafPending = false; update(); });
  }, { passive: true });
  backBtn.addEventListener('click', function() { window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: 'smooth' }); });
})();
</script>

</body>
</html>
