    <div class="fcol"><h4>Support</h4><ul><li><a href="/contact.html">Kontakt</a></li><li><a href="/privacy.html">Datenschutz</a></li><li><a href="/terms.html">AGB</a></li></ul></div>
  </div>
  <div class="fbot"><p>© 2026 Airpiv · Alle Rechte vorbehalten</p></div>
</div></footer>

<script>
var PROXY = 'https://api.airpiv.com';

function escHtml(s) {
  var d = document.createElement('div');
  d.textContent = s || '';
  return d.innerHTML;
}

var params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
var slug = params.get('slug');
if (!slug) {
  // [CLEAN-BLOG-URL] يدعم الرابط النظيف الجديد /blog/<slug> — بياخد
  // آخر جزء غير فاضي من المسار، أياً كان الجزء اللي قبله بالظبط، بنفس
  // المنطق اللي أصلح مشكلة صفحات المسارات. لسه بيدعم ?slug= القديم
  // كمان (أعلى) لأي روابط قديمة اتفهرست في جوجل أو محفوظة عند الناس.
  var segments = window.location.pathname.split('/').filter(Boolean);
  var last = segments[segments.length - 1] || '';
  if (last && !/\.html?$/i.test(last)) slug = decodeURIComponent(last);
}

if (!slug) {
  renderNotFound();
} else {
  fetch(PROXY + '/blog-posts/' + encodeURIComponent(slug))
    .then(function(r){ return r.json(); })
    .then(function(j){
      if (!j.ok || !j.post) { renderNotFound(); return; }
      renderPost(j.post);
    })
    .catch(function(){ renderNotFound(); });
}

function renderNotFound() {
  document.getElementById('post-content').innerHTML =
    '<a href="/blog.html" class="back-link">← Zurück zum Blog</a>' +
    '<div class="post-notfound">' +
      '<h1>Beitrag nicht gefunden</h1>' +
      '<p style="color:var(--tx3)">Dieser Blog-Beitrag existiert nicht oder wurde entfernt.</p>' +
      '<a href="/blog.html" class="btn-t" style="display:inline-flex;margin-top:16px">← Zum Blog</a>' +
    '</div>';
}

function computeReadingTime(html) {
  var text = html.replace(/<[^>]+>/g, ' ');
  var words = text.trim().split(/\s+/).filter(Boolean).length;
  return Math.max(1, Math.round(words / 200));
}

function buildTocAndIds(containerEl) {
  var headings = containerEl.querySelectorAll('h2, h3');
  var items = [];
  var seen = {};
  headings.forEach(function(h) {
    var base = h.textContent.trim().toLowerCase()
      .replace(/[äöüß]/g, function(c){ return {'ä':'ae','ö':'oe','ü':'ue','ß':'ss'}[c]; })
      .replace(/[^a-z0-9\s-]/g, '').trim().replace(/\s+/g, '-') || 'abschnitt';
    var id = base, n = 2;
    while (seen[id]) { id = base + '-' + (n++); }
    seen[id] = true;
    h.id = id;
    items.push({ level: h.tagName.toLowerCase(), text: h.textContent.trim(), id: id });
  });
  return items;
}

// [CONTEXT-DETECTION] قائمة مدن حقيقية معروفة (نفس المدن اللي فعليًا
// موجودة كمسارات في الموقع). بندوّر في نص المقال (العنوان + المحتوى)
// عن أي اسم منهم كـ"كلمة كاملة" — لو لقينا تطابق، بنستخدمه فعليًا
// لربط المقال بمسارات ومقالات بنفس الوجهة. لو مفيش أي مدينة مذكورة
// في المقال، بنرجع لعرض عام (مقالات حديثة / مسارات شائعة) — صريح
// وواضح، مفيش تخمين أو "مطابقة ذكية" غير موجودة فعليًا.
var KNOWN_CITIES = ['Berlin','München','Munich','Frankfurt','Hamburg','Düsseldorf','Cologne','Köln','Stuttgart','Hannover','Leipzig','Nürnberg','Nuremberg','Dortmund','Bremen','Wien','Vienna','Zürich','Zurich','Genf','Geneva','London','Paris','Rom','Rome','Mailand','Milan','Venedig','Venice','Neapel','Naples','Madrid','Barcelona','Valencia','Sevilla','Seville','Malaga','Lissabon','Lisbon','Porto','Amsterdam','Brüssel','Brussels','Luxemburg','Luxembourg','Kopenhagen','Copenhagen','Oslo','Stockholm','Helsinki','Dublin','Warschau','Warsaw','Krakau','Krakow','Prag','Prague','Budapest','Athen','Athens','Istanbul','Kairo','Cairo','Dubai','Doha','Bangkok','Singapur','Singapore','Hongkong','Hong Kong','Tokio','Tokyo','New York','Los Angeles','San Francisco','Miami','Toronto','São Paulo','Kapstadt','Cape Town','Johannesburg','Sydney','Melbourne','Dubrovnik','Split','Zagreb'];

// [COUNTRY-MAPPING] كل مدينة معروفة مربوطة ببلدها الحقيقي — ده اللي
// بيسمح بمطابقة "نفس الدولة" لما مفيش تطابق مباشر في اسم المدينة
// (مقال عن ميلانو ومقال عن روما، الاتنين إيطاليا — لسه مرتبطين).
var CITY_COUNTRY = {
  'Berlin':'Deutschland','München':'Deutschland','Munich':'Deutschland','Frankfurt':'Deutschland','Hamburg':'Deutschland','Düsseldorf':'Deutschland','Cologne':'Deutschland','Köln':'Deutschland','Stuttgart':'Deutschland','Hannover':'Deutschland','Leipzig':'Deutschland','Nürnberg':'Deutschland','Nuremberg':'Deutschland','Dortmund':'Deutschland','Bremen':'Deutschland',
  'Wien':'Österreich','Vienna':'Österreich',
  'Zürich':'Schweiz','Zurich':'Schweiz','Genf':'Schweiz','Geneva':'Schweiz',
  'London':'Vereinigtes Königreich',
  'Paris':'Frankreich',
  'Rom':'Italien','Rome':'Italien','Mailand':'Italien','Milan':'Italien','Venedig':'Italien','Venice':'Italien','Neapel':'Italien','Naples':'Italien',
  'Madrid':'Spanien','Barcelona':'Spanien','Valencia':'Spanien','Sevilla':'Spanien','Seville':'Spanien','Malaga':'Spanien',
  'Lissabon':'Portugal','Lisbon':'Portugal','Porto':'Portugal',
  'Amsterdam':'Niederlande',
  'Brüssel':'Belgien','Brussels':'Belgien',
  'Luxemburg':'Luxemburg','Luxembourg':'Luxemburg',
  'Kopenhagen':'Dänemark','Copenhagen':'Dänemark',
  'Oslo':'Norwegen','Stockholm':'Schweden','Helsinki':'Finnland','Dublin':'Irland',
  'Warschau':'Polen','Warsaw':'Polen','Krakau':'Polen','Krakow':'Polen',
  'Prag':'Tschechien','Prague':'Tschechien','Budapest':'Ungarn','Athen':'Griechenland','Athens':'Griechenland',
  'Istanbul':'Türkei','Kairo':'Ägypten','Cairo':'Ägypten','Dubai':'VAE','Doha':'Katar',
  'Bangkok':'Thailand','Singapur':'Singapur','Singapore':'Singapur','Hongkong':'Hongkong','Hong Kong':'Hongkong','Tokio':'Japan','Tokyo':'Japan',
  'New York':'USA','Los Angeles':'USA','San Francisco':'USA','Miami':'USA',
  'Toronto':'Kanada','São Paulo':'Brasilien','Kapstadt':'Südafrika','Cape Town':'Südafrika','Johannesburg':'Südafrika',
  'Sydney':'Australien','Melbourne':'Australien','Dubrovnik':'Kroatien','Split':'Kroatien','Zagreb':'Kroatien'
};
function citiesToCountries(cities) {
  var set = {};
  cities.forEach(function(c) { var co = CITY_COUNTRY[c]; if (co) set[co] = true; });
  return Object.keys(set);
}

function detectCitiesInText(text) {
  var found = [];
  KNOWN_CITIES.forEach(function(city) {
    var re = new RegExp('(^|[^a-zA-ZäöüÄÖÜ])' + city.replace(/[.*+?^${}()|[\]\\]/g, '\\$&') + '([^a-zA-ZäöüÄÖÜ]|$)', 'i');
    if (re.test(text)) found.push(city);
  });
  return found;
}


function extractFaq(containerEl) {
  var headings = Array.prototype.slice.call(containerEl.querySelectorAll('h2'));
  var faqHeading = headings.find(function(h) {
    var t = h.textContent.trim().replace(/^[^\wäöüÄÖÜ]+/, ''); // strip a leading emoji/symbol like "❓ FAQ"
    return /^(FAQ|FAQs|Häufig gestellte Fragen|Oft gestellte Fragen|Fragen und Antworten|Wichtige Fragen|Frequently Asked Questions|Questions and Answers)$/i.test(t);
  });
  if (!faqHeading) return { items: [] };

  var items = [];
  var node = faqHeading.nextElementSibling;
  var toRemove = [faqHeading];
  var curQ = null, curA = [];
  function flush() { if (curQ && curA.length) items.push({ question: curQ, answer: curA.join(' ') }); curQ = null; curA = []; }
  while (node && node.tagName !== 'H2') {
    toRemove.push(node);
    if (node.tagName === 'H3') { flush(); curQ = node.textContent.trim(); }
    else if (node.tagName === 'P' && curQ) { curA.push(node.textContent.trim()); }
    node = node.nextElementSibling;
  }
  flush();
  toRemove.forEach(function(n) { n.remove(); });
  return { items: items };
}

function renderPost(post) {
  var url = 'https://airpiv.com/blog/' + encodeURIComponent(post.slug);
  var description = post.meta_description || post.excerpt || (post.title + ' — Airpiv Blog');
  var image = post.cover_image_url || 'https://airpiv.com/og-image.png';

  document.getElementById('page-title').textContent = post.title + ' | Airpiv Blog';
  document.getElementById('page-description').setAttribute('content', description);
  document.getElementById('page-canonical').setAttribute('href', url);
  document.getElementById('og-title').setAttribute('content', post.title);
  document.getElementById('og-description').setAttribute('content', description);
  document.getElementById('og-url').setAttribute('content', url);
  document.getElementById('og-image').setAttribute('content', image);
  document.getElementById('twitter-image').setAttribute('content', image);

  var plainText = post.content.replace(/<[^>]+>/g, ' ');
  var wordCount = plainText.trim().split(/\s+/).filter(Boolean).length;
  var readingMin = computeReadingTime(post.content);

  var pubDate = post.published_at ? new Date(post.published_at) : null;
  var updDate = post.updated_at ? new Date(post.updated_at) : null;
  var dateStr = pubDate ? pubDate.toLocaleDateString('de-DE', {year:'numeric',month:'long',day:'numeric'}) : '—';
  var showUpdated = updDate && pubDate && (updDate.getTime() - pubDate.getTime() > 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000);
  var updatedStr = showUpdated ? updDate.toLocaleDateString('de-DE', {year:'numeric',month:'long',day:'numeric'}) : null;

  document.getElementById('breadcrumb-schema').textContent = JSON.stringify({
    "@context": "https://schema.org",
    "@type": "BreadcrumbList",
    "itemListElement": [
      { "@type": "ListItem", "position": 1, "name": "Startseite", "item": "https://airpiv.com/" },
      { "@type": "ListItem", "position": 2, "name": "Blog", "item": "https://airpiv.com/blog.html" },
      { "@type": "ListItem", "position": 3, "name": post.title, "item": url }
    ]
  });

  document.getElementById('article-schema').textContent = JSON.stringify({
    "@context": "https://schema.org",
    "@type": "Article",
    "headline": post.title,
    "description": description,
    "image": image,
    "publisher": {
      "@type": "Organization", "name": "Airpiv", "url": "https://airpiv.com",
      "logo": { "@type": "ImageObject", "url": "https://airpiv.com/airpiv-logo.png" }
    },
    "author": { "@type": "Organization", "name": post.author || "Airpiv Team" },
    "datePublished": post.published_at,
    "dateModified": post.updated_at || post.published_at,
    "mainEntityOfPage": { "@type": "WebPage", "@id": url },
    "articleSection": "Reisetipps",
    "wordCount": wordCount,
    "inLanguage": "de-DE"
  });

  var cover = post.cover_image_url ? '<img class="post-cover" src="' + escHtml(post.cover_image_url) + '" alt="' + escHtml(post.title) + '" loading="lazy">' : '';
  var authorName = post.author || 'Airpiv Team';
  var authorInitial = authorName.trim().charAt(0).toUpperCase();

  document.getElementById('post-content').innerHTML =
    '<nav class="post-breadcrumb" aria-label="Breadcrumb"><a href="/">Startseite</a><span class="sep">\u203a</span><a href="/blog.html">Blog</a><span class="sep">\u203a</span><span class="cur">' + escHtml(post.title) + '</span></nav>' +
    '<div class="pass">' +
      '<div class="pass-strip">' +
        '<div class="pass-strip-brand"><svg width="15" height="15" viewBox="0 0 64 64" fill="none"><path d="M32 10 L48 46 L32 37 L16 46 Z" fill="#0FB5A0"/></svg>Airpiv</div>' +
        '<div class="pass-strip-label">Boarding Pass</div>' +
      '</div>' +
      '<div class="pass-route">' +
        '<div class="pass-route-col">' +
          '<div class="pass-route-eyebrow">Von</div>' +
          '<div class="pass-route-from">Airpiv Journal</div>' +
        '</div>' +
        '<div class="pass-route-plane">\u2708</div>' +
        '<div class="pass-route-col">' +
          '<div class="pass-route-eyebrow">Zu</div>' +
          '<h1 class="pass-route-title">' + escHtml(post.title) + '</h1>' +
        '</div>' +
      '</div>' +
      '<div class="pass-perf" aria-hidden="true"></div>' +
      '<div class="pass-meta">' +
        '<div class="pass-meta-item"><div class="pass-meta-eyebrow">Autor</div><div class="pass-meta-val">' + escHtml(authorName) + '</div></div>' +
        '<div class="pass-meta-item"><div class="pass-meta-eyebrow">Veröffentlicht</div><div class="pass-meta-val">' + dateStr + '</div></div>' +
        (updatedStr ? '<div class="pass-meta-item"><div class="pass-meta-eyebrow">Aktualisiert</div><div class="pass-meta-val">' + updatedStr + '</div></div>' : '') +
        '<div class="pass-meta-item"><div class="pass-meta-eyebrow">Lesezeit</div><div class="pass-meta-val">' + readingMin + ' Min.</div></div>' +
      '</div>' +
    '</div>' +
    cover +
    '<div class="post-share" id="post-share"></div>' +
    '<div id="post-toc-slot"></div>' +
    '<div class="post-body" id="post-body">' + post.content + '</div>' +
    '<div id="post-routes-slot"></div>' +
    '<div id="post-faq-slot"></div>' +
    '<div class="post-author">' +
      '<div class="post-author-av">' + escHtml(authorInitial) + '</div>' +
      '<div>' +
        '<div class="post-author-name">' + escHtml(authorName) + '</div>' +
        '<div class="post-author-role">Airpiv Redaktion</div>' +
        '<div class="post-author-bio">Schreibt für Airpiv über günstige Flüge, Reiseplanung und alles, was das Fliegen einfacher macht.</div>' +
      '</div>' +
    '</div>' +
    '<div id="post-similar-slot"></div>';

  var bodyEl = document.getElementById('post-body');

  bodyEl.querySelectorAll('img').forEach(function(img) {
    if (!img.hasAttribute('loading')) img.setAttribute('loading', 'lazy');
    if (!img.hasAttribute('alt')) img.setAttribute('alt', post.title);
    img.style.maxWidth = '100%';
    img.style.height = 'auto';
  });

  var tocItems = buildTocAndIds(bodyEl);
  if (tocItems.length >= 2) {
    var tocHtml = '<div class="post-toc"><div class="post-toc-title">\ud83d\udcd1 Inhaltsverzeichnis</div><ol>' +
      tocItems.map(function(t) {
        return '<li class="' + (t.level === 'h3' ? 'toc-h3' : '') + '"><a href="#' + t.id + '">' + escHtml(t.text) + '</a></li>';
      }).join('') + '</ol></div>';
    document.getElementById('post-toc-slot').innerHTML = tocHtml;
  }

  var faq = extractFaq(bodyEl);
  if (faq.items.length) {
    var faqHtml = '<div class="post-faq"><h2>Häufig gestellte Fragen</h2>' +
      faq.items.map(function(f, i) {
        return '<div class="post-faq-item" data-idx="' + i + '">' +
          '<button class="post-faq-q" onclick="toggleFaq(this)">' + escHtml(f.question) +
            '<svg class="chev" width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.4" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><polyline points="6 9 12 15 18 9"/></svg>' +
          '</button>' +
          '<div class="post-faq-a"><div class="post-faq-a-in">' + escHtml(f.answer) + '</div></div>' +
        '</div>';
      }).join('') + '</div>';
    document.getElementById('post-faq-slot').innerHTML = faqHtml;

    document.getElementById('faq-schema').textContent = JSON.stringify({
      "@context": "https://schema.org",
      "@type": "FAQPage",
      "mainEntity": faq.items.map(function(f) {
        return { "@type": "Question", "name": f.question, "acceptedAnswer": { "@type": "Answer", "text": f.answer } };
      })
    });
  }

  var shareText = encodeURIComponent(post.title);
  var shareUrl = encodeURIComponent(url);
  document.getElementById('post-share').innerHTML =
    '<span class="post-share-lbl">Teilen</span>' +
    '<a class="post-share-btn" target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://wa.me/?text=' + shareText + '%20' + shareUrl + '" aria-label="WhatsApp"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M12.04 2C6.58 2 2.13 6.45 2.13 11.91c0 1.75.46 3.39 1.26 4.82L2 22l5.42-1.36c1.38.72 2.94 1.13 4.62 1.13 5.46 0 9.91-4.45 9.91-9.91S17.5 2 12.04 2m0 1.67c4.55 0 8.24 3.69 8.24 8.24s-3.69 8.24-8.24 8.24c-1.5 0-2.9-.4-4.11-1.1l-.29-.17-3.06.77.8-2.98-.19-.31a8.18 8.18 0 0 1-1.24-4.37c0-4.63 3.69-8.32 8.24-8.32Z"/></svg></a>' +
    '<a class="post-share-btn" target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://twitter.com/intent/tweet?text=' + shareText + '&url=' + shareUrl + '" aria-label="X"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M18.9 2H22l-7.2 8.2L22.5 22h-6.6l-5.2-6.8L4.6 22H1.5l7.7-8.8L1 2h6.7l4.7 6.2Z"/></svg></a>' +
    '<a class="post-share-btn" target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://www.facebook.com/sharer/sharer.php?u=' + shareUrl + '" aria-label="Facebook"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M22 12a10 10 0 1 0-11.6 9.87v-6.99H7.9V12h2.5V9.8c0-2.47 1.47-3.83 3.72-3.83 1.08 0 2.21.19 2.21.19v2.43h-1.24c-1.23 0-1.61.76-1.61 1.55V12h2.75l-.44 2.88h-2.31v6.99A10 10 0 0 0 22 12"/></svg></a>' +
    '<a class="post-share-btn" target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://www.linkedin.com/sharing/share-offsite/?url=' + shareUrl + '" aria-label="LinkedIn"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M20.45 20.45h-3.55v-5.57c0-1.33-.02-3.03-1.85-3.03-1.85 0-2.14 1.45-2.14 2.94v5.66H9.36V9h3.41v1.56h.05c.48-.9 1.64-1.85 3.38-1.85 3.6 0 4.27 2.37 4.27 5.46zM5.34 7.43a2.06 2.06 0 1 1 0-4.13 2.06 2.06 0 0 1 0 4.13M7.12 20.45H3.56V9h3.56z"/></svg></a>' +
    '<a class="post-share-btn" href="mailto:?subject=' + shareText + '&body=' + shareUrl + '" aria-label="E-Mail"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><rect x="2" y="4" width="20" height="16" rx="2"/><path d="m22 6-10 7L2 6"/></svg></a>' +
    '<button class="post-share-btn post-copy-btn" onclick="copyPostLink(this)" aria-label="Link kopieren"><span class="post-copy-toast">Kopiert!</span><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><rect x="9" y="9" width="13" height="13" rx="2"/><path d="M5 15H4a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V4a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h9a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v1"/></svg></button>';

  loadPopularRoutes(post);
  loadSimilarPosts(post);
}

function toggleFaq(btn) {
  var item = btn.closest('.post-faq-item');
  var answer = item.querySelector('.post-faq-a');
  var isOpen = item.classList.contains('open');
  document.querySelectorAll('.post-faq-item.open').forEach(function(el) {
    el.classList.remove('open');
    el.querySelector('.post-faq-a').style.maxHeight = null;
  });
  if (!isOpen) {
    item.classList.add('open');
    answer.style.maxHeight = answer.scrollHeight + 'px';
  }
}

function copyPostLink(btn) {
  var segments = window.location.pathname.split('/').filter(Boolean);
  var pathSlug = segments.length ? segments[segments.length - 1] : '';
  var slugForLink = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search).get('slug') || (!/\.html?$/i.test(pathSlug) ? pathSlug : '');
  var url = 'https://airpiv.com/blog/' + encodeURIComponent(slugForLink);
  navigator.clipboard.writeText(url).then(function() {
    var toast = btn.querySelector('.post-copy-toast');
    toast.classList.add('show');
    setTimeout(function() { toast.classList.remove('show'); }, 1600);
  }).catch(function() {});
}

function loadPopularRoutes(post) {
  var detectedCities = detectCitiesInText((post.title || '') + ' ' + (post.content || '').replace(/<[^>]+>/g, ' '));
  fetch(PROXY + '/route-pages')
    .then(function(r){ return r.json(); })
    .then(function(j) {
      if (!j.ok || !j.routes || !j.routes.length) return;
      var routes = j.routes;
      var heading = '\u2708 Beliebte Flugverbindungen';
      var chosen = routes.slice(0, 4);
      if (detectedCities.length) {
        // [ROUTE-PRIORITY-FIX] بيقيّم كل مسار: نقطتين لو الاتنين
        // (المصدر والوجهة) مطابقين لمدن المقال — يعني ده المسار الأساسي
        // اللي المقال نفسه بيتكلم عنه، ولازم يظهر أول واحد دايمًا.
        // نقطة واحدة لو جزء واحد بس مطابق (مسار تاني لنفس مدينة واحدة).
        var scored = routes.map(function(r) {
          var oMatch = detectedCities.some(function(c) { return r.origin_city && r.origin_city.toLowerCase() === c.toLowerCase(); });
          var dMatch = detectedCities.some(function(c) { return r.destination_city && r.destination_city.toLowerCase() === c.toLowerCase(); });
          return { route: r, score: (oMatch ? 1 : 0) + (dMatch ? 1 : 0) };
        }).filter(function(s) { return s.score > 0; });
        if (scored.length) {
          scored.sort(function(a, b) { return b.score - a.score; });
          chosen = scored.map(function(s) { return s.route; }).slice(0, 4);
          heading = '\u2708 Passende Flugverbindungen';
        }
      }
      if (!chosen.length) return;
      var html = '<div class="post-routes"><h2>' + heading + '</h2><div class="post-routes-grid">' +
        chosen.map(function(r) {
          return '<a class="post-route-link" href="/flights/' + encodeURIComponent(r.slug) + '">' + escHtml(r.origin_city) + ' \u2192 ' + escHtml(r.destination_city) + '</a>';
        }).join('') + '</div></div>';
      document.getElementById('post-routes-slot').innerHTML = html;
    })
    .catch(function(){});
}

function loadSimilarPosts(post) {
  var currentCities = detectCitiesInText((post.title || '') + ' ' + (post.content || '').replace(/<[^>]+>/g, ' '));
  var currentCountries = citiesToCountries(currentCities);
  fetch(PROXY + '/blog-posts')
    .then(function(r){ return r.json(); })
    .then(function(j) {
      if (!j.ok || !j.posts) return;
      var others = j.posts.filter(function(p) { return p.slug !== post.slug; });
      var heading = '\ud83d\udcda Ähnliche Artikel';
      if (currentCities.length) {
        var withMeta = others.map(function(p) {
          var pCities = detectCitiesInText((p.title || '') + ' ' + (p.excerpt || ''));
          var pCountries = citiesToCountries(pCities);
          var cityOverlap = pCities.filter(function(c) { return currentCities.indexOf(c) !== -1; }).length;
          var countryOverlap = pCountries.filter(function(c) { return currentCountries.indexOf(c) !== -1; }).length;
          return { post: p, cityOverlap: cityOverlap, countryOverlap: countryOverlap };
        });
        // مستوى 1: نفس المدينة بالضبط. مستوى 2 (لو مفيش نتيجة): نفس
        // الدولة على الأقل. مستوى 3 (لو لسه مفيش): الترتيب الافتراضي
        // (الأحدث) — صريح إن ده fallback، مش تطابق حقيقي.
        var byCity = withMeta.filter(function(s) { return s.cityOverlap > 0; }).sort(function(a, b) { return b.cityOverlap - a.cityOverlap; });
        var byCountry = withMeta.filter(function(s) { return s.cityOverlap === 0 && s.countryOverlap > 0; }).sort(function(a, b) { return b.countryOverlap - a.countryOverlap; });
        if (byCity.length) { others = byCity.map(function(s) { return s.post; }); heading = '\ud83d\udcda Passende Artikel zum gleichen Reiseziel'; }
        else if (byCountry.length) { others = byCountry.map(function(s) { return s.post; }); heading = '\ud83d\udcda Weitere Artikel aus ' + currentCountries[0]; }
      }
      others = others.slice(0, 4);
      if (!others.length) return;
      var html = '<div class="post-similar"><h2>' + heading + '</h2><div class="post-similar-grid">' +
        others.map(function(p) {
          return '<a class="post-similar-card" href="/blog/' + encodeURIComponent(p.slug) + '"><div class="post-similar-card-title">' + escHtml(p.title) + '</div></a>';
        }).join('') + '</div></div>';
      document.getElementById('post-similar-slot').innerHTML = html;
    })
    .catch(function(){});
}

(function() {
  var rafPending = false;
  var progressEl = document.getElementById('reading-progress');
  var backBtn = document.getElementById('back-to-top');
  function update() {
    var scrollTop = window.scrollY || document.documentElement.scrollTop;
    var docHeight = document.documentElement.scrollHeight - window.innerHeight;
    var pct = docHeight > 0 ? Math.min(100, (scrollTop / docHeight) * 100) : 0;
    progressEl.style.width = pct + '%';
    backBtn.classList.toggle('show', scrollTop > 500);
  }
  window.addEventListener('scroll', function() {
    if (rafPending) return;
    rafPending = true;
    requestAnimationFrame(function() { rafPending = false; update(); });
  }, { passive: true });
  backBtn.addEventListener('click', function() { window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: 'smooth' }); });
})();
</script>

</body>
</html>

<script>
var PROXY = 'https://api.airpiv.com';

function escHtml(s) {
  var d = document.createElement('div');
  d.textContent = s || '';
  return d.innerHTML;
}

var NOIMG_SVG = '<div class="post-ticket-noimg"><svg width="34" height="34" viewBox="0 0 64 64" fill="none"><path d="M32 10 L48 46 L32 37 L16 46 Z" fill="#0FB5A0" opacity="0.85"/></svg></div>';

fetch(PROXY + '/blog-posts')
  .then(function(r){ return r.json(); })
  .then(function(j){
    var grid = document.getElementById('blog-grid');
    if (!j.ok || !j.posts || !j.posts.length) {
      grid.innerHTML = '<div class="jrn-empty">Noch keine Beiträge — schau bald wieder vorbei!</div>';
      return;
    }
    grid.innerHTML = j.posts.map(function(p) {
      var dateStr = p.published_at ? new Date(p.published_at).toLocaleDateString('de-DE', {year:'numeric',month:'long',day:'numeric'}) : '';
      var cover = p.cover_image_url
        ? '<img class="post-ticket-cover" src="' + escHtml(p.cover_image_url) + '" loading="lazy" alt="' + escHtml(p.title) + '">'
        : NOIMG_SVG;
      return '<a class="post-ticket" href="/blog/' + encodeURIComponent(p.slug) + '">' +
        cover +
        '<div class="post-ticket-perf" aria-hidden="true"></div>' +
        '<div class="post-ticket-body">' +
          '<span class="post-ticket-eyebrow">Airpiv Journal</span>' +
          '<h2 class="post-ticket-title">' + escHtml(p.title) + '</h2>' +
          (p.excerpt ? '<p class="post-ticket-excerpt">' + escHtml(p.excerpt) + '</p>' : '<span style="flex:1"></span>') +
          '<div class="post-ticket-meta"><span>' + escHtml(p.author || 'Airpiv Team') + '</span><span class="dot">·</span><span>' + dateStr + '</span></div>' +
        '</div>' +
      '</a>';
    }).join('');
  })
  .catch(function(){
    document.getElementById('blog-grid').innerHTML = '<div class="jrn-error">Beiträge konnten nicht geladen werden. Bitte versuche es später erneut.</div>';
  });
</script>

</body>
</html>


==================== FILE: flywise-app/canonical-fix.js ====================
(function(){
  var base='https://airpiv.com';
  // [HREFLANG-CANONICAL-FIX] Each language's URL must be canonical to
  // ITSELF, not silently collapsed back to the bare URL — otherwise the
  // hreflang tags above (which claim /en and /ar are distinct,
  // self-referencing indexable pages) directly contradict the canonical
  // tag, telling Google "ignore the language-specific URL, this is
  // really just the default page" — exactly defeating the purpose of
  // having hreflang tags at all. Canonical is derived from the clean
  // pathname only (never a query string) — matches the no-trailing-slash
  // convention used by every other clean URL on the site (e.g. /city/berlin).
  var path=window.location.pathname;
  var homeVariants=['/en','/ar','/es','/fr','/it','/nl'];
  var canonical=(homeVariants.indexOf(path)!==-1)?base+path:base+'/';
  document.getElementById('canonical-url').setAttribute('href',canonical);
})();

<main>
  <nav class="breadcrumb" aria-label="Breadcrumb"><a href="/">Startseite</a><span>›</span><span>Günstige Flüge</span></nav>
  <h1>Günstige Flüge — alle Strecken im Preisvergleich</h1>
  <p class="sub">Live-Preise aller Airpiv-Strecken, sortiert vom günstigsten Angebot — direkt aus dem echten Preisvergleich, nicht geschätzt.</p>

  <div class="cf-grid" id="cf-grid">
    <p style="color:var(--tx3)">Lade aktuelle Preise…</p>
  </div>

  <!-- [REAL-DATA-ONLY] Diese FAQ bleibt bewusst allgemein und ehrlich —
       keine erfundenen Statistiken ("83% günstiger im März" o.ä.) ohne
       echte Datenbasis. -->
  <section class="cf-faq">
    <h2>Häufig gestellte Fragen zu günstigen Flügen</h2>
    <div class="cf-faq-item"><div class="cf-faq-q">Wie findet Airpiv die günstigsten Preise?</div><div class="cf-faq-a">Airpiv vergleicht in Echtzeit hunderte Airlines für jede Strecke und zeigt dir den tatsächlich günstigsten verfügbaren Preis — keine geschätzten oder veralteten Zahlen.</div></div>
    <div class="cf-faq-item"><div class="cf-faq-q">Sind die angezeigten Preise pro Person?</div><div class="cf-faq-a">Ja, alle Preise auf dieser Seite gelten für einen Erwachsenen in der Economy-Klasse, einfache Strecke, sofern nicht anders angegeben.</div></div>
    <div class="cf-faq-item"><div class="cf-faq-q">Ändern sich die Preise häufig?</div><div class="cf-faq-a">Flugpreise schwanken laufend. Die hier gezeigten Preise werden regelmäßig aktualisiert, der tatsächliche Preis zum Buchungszeitpunkt kann leicht abweichen — die finale Suche zeigt dir immer den aktuellen Preis.</div></div>
  </section>
</main>

<footer><div class="fi2">
  <div class="fgr">
    <div><div class="flo"><span style="display:inline-flex;width:26px;height:26px;border-radius:8px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#12C7B0,#0A9384);align-items:center;justify-content:center"><svg width="17" height="17" viewBox="0 0 64 64" fill="none"><path d="M32 14 L46 46 L32 38 L18 46 Z" fill="#0A1822"/></svg></span>Air<span style="color:var(--teal)">piv</span></div><p class="fdes">Finde Flüge, die sonst niemand findet. 600+ Airlines, beste Preise, volle Garantie.</p></div>
    <div class="fcol"><h4>Unternehmen</h4><ul><li><a href="/about.html">Über uns</a></li><li><a href="/blog.html">Blog</a></li></ul></div>
    <div class="fcol"><h4>Support</h4><ul><li><a href="/contact.html">Kontakt</a></li><li><a href="/privacy.html">Datenschutz</a></li><li><a href="/terms.html">AGB</a></li></ul></div>
  </div>
  <div class="fbot"><p>© 2026 Airpiv · Alle Rechte vorbehalten</p></div>
</div></footer>

<script>
var PROXY = 'https://api.airpiv.com';

function escHtml(s) {
  var d = document.createElement('div');
  d.textContent = s || '';
  return d.innerHTML;
}

// [BATCH-FETCH] نفس أسلوب الصفحة الرئيسية بالظبط — دفعات صغيرة (3 في
// المرة) بدل ما كل المسارات تضرب Duffel مرة واحدة، عشان الصفحة تفضل
// سريعة حتى لو عدد المسارات كبر مستقبلاً.
function fetchPricesInBatches(routes, batchSize, onEach) {
  var i = 0;
  function next() {
    if (i >= routes.length) return Promise.resolve();
    var batch = routes.slice(i, i + batchSize);
    i += batchSize;
    return Promise.all(batch.map(function (r) {
      return fetch(PROXY + '/route-price?from=' + encodeURIComponent(r.origin_iata) + '&to=' + encodeURIComponent(r.destination_iata))
        .then(function (res) { return res.json(); })
        .then(function (d) { onEach(r, d); })
        .catch(function () { onEach(r, null); });
    })).then(next);
  }
  return next();
}

fetch(PROXY + '/route-pages')
  .then(function (r) { return r.json(); })
  .then(function (j) {
    var grid = document.getElementById('cf-grid');
    if (!j.ok || !j.routes || !j.routes.length) {
      grid.innerHTML = '<p style="color:var(--tx3)">Aktuell sind noch keine Strecken verfügbar — schau bald wieder vorbei!</p>';
      return;
    }
    var routes = j.routes;
    var priced = []; // { route, price } — nur Strecken mit einem echten Preis

    grid.innerHTML = routes.map(function (r) {
      return '<a class="cf-card loading" id="cf-card-' + escHtml(r.slug) + '" href="/flights/' + encodeURIComponent(r.slug) + '">' +
        '<div><div class="cf-card-route">' + escHtml(r.origin_city) + ' → ' + escHtml(r.destination_city) + '</div><div class="cf-card-meta">' + escHtml(r.origin_iata) + ' → ' + escHtml(r.destination_iata) + '</div></div>' +
        '<div class="cf-card-price"><div class="cf-card-price-val">…</div><div class="cf-card-price-lbl">wird geladen</div></div>' +
      '</a>';
    }).join('');

    fetchPricesInBatches(routes, 3, function (route, data) {
      var card = document.getElementById('cf-card-' + route.slug);
      if (!card) return;
      card.classList.remove('loading');
      if (data && data.ok && data.price != null) {
        card.querySelector('.cf-card-price-val').textContent = 'ab ' + data.price.toFixed(0) + ' €';
        card.querySelector('.cf-card-price-lbl').textContent = 'pro Person';
        priced.push({ route: route, price: data.price });
      } else {
        card.querySelector('.cf-card-price-val').textContent = '—';
        card.querySelector('.cf-card-price-lbl').textContent = 'Preis in Suche';
      }
    }).then(function () {
      // [REAL-SORT] بعد ما كل الأسعار الحقيقية توصل، نرتب الكروت فعلياً
      // من الأرخص للأغلى — مش ترتيب عشوائي أو حسب ترتيب الإضافة.
      if (!priced.length) return;
      priced.sort(function (a, b) { return a.price - b.price; });
      priced.forEach(function (p, idx) {
        var card = document.getElementById('cf-card-' + p.route.slug);
        if (card) {
          card.querySelector('.cf-card-route').insertAdjacentHTML('afterbegin', '<span class="cf-rank">' + (idx + 1) + '</span>');
          grid.appendChild(card); // إعادة الترتيب الفعلي في الـ DOM
        }
      });

      // [SCHEMA] ItemList حقيقي بالترتيب الفعلي بعد الفرز — مش قايمة ثابتة.
      document.getElementById('page-schema').textContent = JSON.stringify({
        "@context": "https://schema.org",
        "@type": "ItemList",
        "itemListElement": priced.map(function (p, idx) {
          return {
            "@type": "ListItem",
            "position": idx + 1,
            "name": p.route.origin_city + ' → ' + p.route.destination_city,
            "url": "https://airpiv.com/flights/" + p.route.slug
          };
        })
      });
    });
  })
  .catch(function () {
    document.getElementById('cf-grid').innerHTML = '<p style="color:var(--tx3)">Preise konnten nicht geladen werden. Bitte versuche es später erneut.</p>';
  });
</script>

</body>
</html>

<meta property="og:type" content="website">

<meta property="og:description" id="og-description" content="Compare and book cheap flights with Airpiv.">
<meta property="og:url" id="og-url" content="https://airpiv.com/en/city/">
<meta property="og:image" content="https://airpiv.com/og-image.png">

.city-airport-badge:hover{background:rgba(15,181,160,.25)}

    <div><div class="flo"><span style="display:inline-flex;width:26px;height:26px;border-radius:8px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#12C7B0,#0A9384);align-items:center;justify-content:center"><svg width="17" height="17" viewBox="0 0 64 64" fill="none"><path d="M32 14 L46 46 L32 38 L18 46 Z" fill="#0A1822"/></svg></span>Air<span style="color:var(--teal)">piv</span></div><p class="fdes">Find flights no one else can find. 600+ airlines, best prices, full guarantee.</p></div>
    <div class="fcol"><h4>Company</h4><ul><li><a href="/about.html">About us</a></li><li><a href="/blog.html">Blog</a></li></ul></div>
    <div class="fcol"><h4>Support</h4><ul><li><a href="/contact.html">Contact</a></li><li><a href="/privacy.html">Privacy</a></li><li><a href="/terms.html">Terms</a></li></ul></div>

<script>
var PROXY = 'https://api.airpiv.com';

function escHtml(s) {
  var d = document.createElement('div');
  d.textContent = s || '';
  return d.innerHTML;
}

var params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
var slug = params.get('slug');
if (!slug) {
  var pathMatch = window.location.pathname.match(/\/en\/city\/([^\/]+)\/?$/);
  if (pathMatch) slug = decodeURIComponent(pathMatch[1]);
}

if (!slug) {
  renderNotFound();
} else {
  fetch(PROXY + '/cities/' + encodeURIComponent(slug))
    .then(function(r){ return r.json(); })
    .then(function(j){
      if (!j.ok || !j.city) { renderNotFound(); return; }
      renderCity(j.city, j.routes || []);
    })
    .catch(function(){ renderNotFound(); });
}

function renderNotFound() {
  document.getElementById('city-content').innerHTML =
    '<a href="/en/" class="back-link">← Back to homepage</a>' +
    '<h1>City not found</h1>' +
    '<p style="color:var(--tx3)">No flight routes are currently available for this city.</p>' +
    '<a href="/en/" class="btn-t" style="display:inline-flex;margin-top:12px">← Search flights</a>';
}

var ENGLISH_CITY_NAMES = {
  BER: 'Berlin', MUC: 'Munich', FRA: 'Frankfurt', HAM: 'Hamburg', DUS: 'Dusseldorf',
  CGN: 'Cologne', STR: 'Stuttgart', HAJ: 'Hanover', LEJ: 'Leipzig', NUE: 'Nuremberg',
  DTM: 'Dortmund', BRE: 'Bremen', VIE: 'Vienna', ZRH: 'Zurich', GVA: 'Geneva',
  LHR: 'London', LGW: 'London', STN: 'London', LTN: 'London', CDG: 'Paris', ORY: 'Paris',
  FCO: 'Rome', CIA: 'Rome', MXP: 'Milan', LIN: 'Milan', VCE: 'Venice', NAP: 'Naples',
  MAD: 'Madrid', BCN: 'Barcelona', VLC: 'Valencia', SVQ: 'Seville', AGP: 'Malaga',
  LIS: 'Lisbon', OPO: 'Porto', AMS: 'Amsterdam', BRU: 'Brussels', LUX: 'Luxembourg',
  CPH: 'Copenhagen', OSL: 'Oslo', ARN: 'Stockholm', HEL: 'Helsinki', DUB: 'Dublin',
  WAW: 'Warsaw', KRK: 'Krakow', PRG: 'Prague', BUD: 'Budapest', ATH: 'Athens',
  IST: 'Istanbul', SAW: 'Istanbul', CAI: 'Cairo', DXB: 'Dubai', DOH: 'Doha',
  BKK: 'Bangkok', SIN: 'Singapore', HKG: 'Hong Kong', NRT: 'Tokyo', HND: 'Tokyo',
  JFK: 'New York', EWR: 'New York', LAX: 'Los Angeles', SFO: 'San Francisco',
  MIA: 'Miami', YYZ: 'Toronto', GRU: 'São Paulo', CPT: 'Cape Town', JNB: 'Johannesburg',
  SYD: 'Sydney', MEL: 'Melbourne', DBV: 'Dubrovnik', SPU: 'Split', ZAG: 'Zagreb',
};
function anglicizeCity(name, iata) {
  return (iata && ENGLISH_CITY_NAMES[iata]) || name;
}

function renderCity(city, routes) {
  city.name = anglicizeCity(city.name, city.airport_codes && city.airport_codes[0]);
  routes.forEach(function (r) {
    r.origin_city = anglicizeCity(r.origin_city, r.origin_iata);
    r.destination_city = anglicizeCity(r.destination_city, r.destination_iata);
  });

  var title, description;
  var multiAirport = city.airport_codes && city.airport_codes.length > 1;
  if (routes.length === 1) {
    var r = routes[0];
    var otherCity = r.origin_city_slug === city.city_slug ? r.destination_city : r.origin_city;
    title = otherCity + ' ↔ ' + city.name + ' flights';
    description = 'Direct connection between ' + city.name + ' and ' + otherCity + ': compare prices and book cheap flights with Airpiv.';
  } else if (multiAirport) {
    title = 'Flights to ' + city.name + ' — all airports compared';
    description = city.name + ' is served by ' + city.airport_codes.length + ' airports (' + city.airport_codes.join(', ') + '). Compare all routes with Airpiv.';
  } else if (routes.length <= 4) {
    title = city.name + ' flights — ' + routes.length + ' routes compared';
    description = routes.length + ' flight connections to and from ' + city.name + ', compared side by side. Find the cheapest route with Airpiv.';
  } else {
    title = 'Cheap flights to ' + city.name + ' — all routes';
    description = 'Over ' + routes.length + ' flight connections to ' + city.name + '. Compare all destinations and airlines in real time with Airpiv.';
  }
  var url = 'https://airpiv.com/en/city/' + encodeURIComponent(city.city_slug);
  var deUrl = 'https://airpiv.com/city/' + encodeURIComponent(city.city_slug);

  document.getElementById('page-title').textContent = title + ' | Airpiv';
  document.getElementById('page-description').setAttribute('content', description);
  document.getElementById('page-canonical').setAttribute('href', url);
  document.getElementById('og-title').setAttribute('content', title);
  document.getElementById('og-description').setAttribute('content', description);
  document.getElementById('og-url').setAttribute('content', url);
  document.getElementById('hreflang-de').setAttribute('href', deUrl);
  document.getElementById('hreflang-en').setAttribute('href', url);
  document.getElementById('hreflang-default').setAttribute('href', deUrl);

  var introText = 'Discover all flight connections to and from ' + city.name + '. Airpiv compares hundreds of airlines in real time to find the best price for your trip.';

  var breadcrumbHtml = '<nav class="breadcrumb" aria-label="Breadcrumb"><a href="/en/">Home</a><span>›</span>';
  if (city.country_code) {
    breadcrumbHtml += '<a href="/en/country/' + encodeURIComponent(city.country_code) + '">' + escHtml(city.country_code) + '</a><span>›</span>';
  }
  breadcrumbHtml += '<span>' + escHtml(city.name) + '</span></nav>';

  var airportsHtml = (city.airport_codes && city.airport_codes.length)
    ? '<div class="city-hero-airports">' + city.airport_codes.map(function(a) { return '<a href="/en/airport/' + encodeURIComponent(a) + '" class="city-airport-badge">' + escHtml(a) + '</a>'; }).join('') + '</div>'
    : '';

  var fromRoutes = routes.filter(function(r) { return r.origin_city_slug === city.city_slug; });
  var toRoutes = routes.filter(function(r) { return r.destination_city_slug === city.city_slug; });

  function routeCardHtml(r) {
    return '<a class="city-route-card" href="/en/flights/' + encodeURIComponent(r.slug) + '">' +
      escHtml(r.origin_city) + '<span class="arrow">→</span>' + escHtml(r.destination_city) +
    '</a>';
  }

  var fromSectionHtml = fromRoutes.length
    ? '<section class="city-routes-section"><h2>Flights from ' + escHtml(city.name) + '</h2><div class="city-route-grid">' + fromRoutes.map(routeCardHtml).join('') + '</div></section>'
    : '';
  var toSectionHtml = toRoutes.length
    ? '<section class="city-routes-section"><h2>Flights to ' + escHtml(city.name) + '</h2><div class="city-route-grid">' + toRoutes.map(routeCardHtml).join('') + '</div></section>'
    : '';

  document.getElementById('city-content').innerHTML =
    breadcrumbHtml +
    '<h1>' + escHtml(title) + '</h1>' +
    '<div class="city-hero">' +
      '<div class="city-hero-name">✈ ' + escHtml(city.name) + '</div>' +
      '<div class="city-hero-sub">' + routes.length + ' available ' + (routes.length === 1 ? 'route' : 'routes') + '</div>' +
      airportsHtml +
    '</div>' +
    '<section><p>' + escHtml(introText) + '</p></section>' +
    fromSectionHtml +
    toSectionHtml;

  var breadcrumbList = [
    { "@type": "ListItem", "position": 1, "name": "Home", "item": "https://airpiv.com/en/" },
  ];
  if (city.country_code) {
    breadcrumbList.push({ "@type": "ListItem", "position": 2, "name": city.country_code, "item": "https://airpiv.com/en/country/" + city.country_code });
  }
  breadcrumbList.push({ "@type": "ListItem", "position": breadcrumbList.length + 1, "name": city.name, "item": url });

  document.getElementById('city-schema').textContent = JSON.stringify({
    "@context": "https://schema.org",
    "@type": "WebPage",
    "name": title,
    "description": description,
    "url": url,
    "inLanguage": "en",
    "breadcrumb": { "@type": "BreadcrumbList", "itemListElement": breadcrumbList }
  });
}
</script>

</body>
</html>

    <a href="/" class="logo"><picture>
      <source srcset="/airpiv-logo.webp" type="image/webp">
      <img src="/airpiv-logo.png" alt="Airpiv" width="118" height="38">
    </picture></a>
    <div class="navr">
      <a href="/" class="btn-t">Flüge suchen</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</nav>

<main id="city-main">
  <div id="city-content">
    <p style="color:var(--tx3)">Lade Stadt…</p>
  </div>
</main>

<footer><div class="fi2">
  <div class="fgr">
    <div><div class="flo"><span style="display:inline-flex;width:26px;height:26px;border-radius:8px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#12C7B0,#0A9384);align-items:center;justify-content:center"><svg width="17" height="17" viewBox="0 0 64 64" fill="none"><path d="M32 14 L46 46 L32 38 L18 46 Z" fill="#0A1822"/></svg></span>Air<span style="color:var(--teal)">piv</span></div><p class="fdes">Finde Flüge, die sonst niemand findet. 600+ Airlines, beste Preise, volle Garantie.</p></div>
    <div class="fcol"><h4>Unternehmen</h4><ul><li><a href="/about.html">Über uns</a></li><li><a href="/blog.html">Blog</a></li></ul></div>
    <div class="fcol"><h4>Support</h4><ul><li><a href="/contact.html">Kontakt</a></li><li><a href="/privacy.html">Datenschutz</a></li><li><a href="/terms.html">AGB</a></li></ul></div>
  </div>
  <div class="fbot"><p>© 2026 Airpiv · Alle Rechte vorbehalten</p></div>
</div></footer>

<script>
var PROXY = 'https://api.airpiv.com';

function escHtml(s) {
  var d = document.createElement('div');
  d.textContent = s || '';
  return d.innerHTML;
}

var params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
var slug = params.get('slug');
if (!slug) {
  var pathMatch = window.location.pathname.match(/\/city\/([^\/]+)\/?$/);
  if (pathMatch) slug = decodeURIComponent(pathMatch[1]);
}

if (!slug) {
  renderNotFound();
} else {
  fetch(PROXY + '/cities/' + encodeURIComponent(slug))
    .then(function(r){ return r.json(); })
    .then(function(j){
      if (!j.ok || !j.city) { renderNotFound(); return; }
      renderCity(j.city, j.routes || []);
    })
    .catch(function(){ renderNotFound(); });
}

function renderNotFound() {
  document.getElementById('city-content').innerHTML =
    '<a href="/" class="back-link">← Zurück zur Startseite</a>' +
    '<h1>Stadt nicht gefunden</h1>' +
    '<p style="color:var(--tx3)">Für diese Stadt sind aktuell keine Flugrouten verfügbar.</p>' +
    '<a href="/" class="btn-t" style="display:inline-flex;margin-top:12px">← Flüge suchen</a>';
}

// [LOCALIZATION-FIX] نفس قائمة التصحيح المستخدمة في flight-route.html
// بالظبط — بتصحح اسم المدينة بالألماني الصحيح بناءً على كود المطار
// الحقيقي (IATA)، مش تخمين من النص نفسه. أي كود مش موجود في القائمة
// بيسيب النص زي ما هو (آمن).
var GERMAN_CITY_NAMES = {
  BER: 'Berlin', MUC: 'München', FRA: 'Frankfurt', HAM: 'Hamburg', DUS: 'Düsseldorf',
  CGN: 'Köln', STR: 'Stuttgart', HAJ: 'Hannover', LEJ: 'Leipzig', NUE: 'Nürnberg',
  DTM: 'Dortmund', BRE: 'Bremen', VIE: 'Wien', ZRH: 'Zürich', GVA: 'Genf',
  LHR: 'London', LGW: 'London', STN: 'London', LTN: 'London', CDG: 'Paris', ORY: 'Paris',
  FCO: 'Rom', CIA: 'Rom', MXP: 'Mailand', LIN: 'Mailand', VCE: 'Venedig', NAP: 'Neapel',
  MAD: 'Madrid', BCN: 'Barcelona', VLC: 'Valencia', SVQ: 'Sevilla', AGP: 'Málaga',
  LIS: 'Lissabon', OPO: 'Porto', AMS: 'Amsterdam', BRU: 'Brüssel', LUX: 'Luxemburg',
  CPH: 'Kopenhagen', OSL: 'Oslo', ARN: 'Stockholm', HEL: 'Helsinki', DUB: 'Dublin',
  WAW: 'Warschau', KRK: 'Krakau', PRG: 'Prag', BUD: 'Budapest', ATH: 'Athen',
  IST: 'Istanbul', SAW: 'Istanbul', CAI: 'Kairo', DXB: 'Dubai', DOH: 'Doha',
  BKK: 'Bangkok', SIN: 'Singapur', HKG: 'Hongkong', NRT: 'Tokio', HND: 'Tokio',
  JFK: 'New York', EWR: 'New York', LAX: 'Los Angeles', SFO: 'San Francisco',
  MIA: 'Miami', YYZ: 'Toronto', GRU: 'São Paulo', CPT: 'Kapstadt', JNB: 'Johannesburg',
  SYD: 'Sydney', MEL: 'Melbourne', DBV: 'Dubrovnik', SPU: 'Split', ZAG: 'Zagreb',
};
function germanizeCity(name, iata) {
  return (iata && GERMAN_CITY_NAMES[iata]) || name;
}

function renderCity(city, routes) {
  // [LOCALIZATION-FIX] يتصحّح مرة واحدة هنا — كل الاستخدامات التالية
  // في الدالة (العنوان، الوصف، الكروت...) بتاخد القيمة المُصححة تلقائياً.
  city.name = germanizeCity(city.name, city.airport_codes && city.airport_codes[0]);
  routes.forEach(function (r) {
    r.origin_city = germanizeCity(r.origin_city, r.origin_iata);
    r.destination_city = germanizeCity(r.destination_city, r.destination_iata);
  });

  // [CONTENT-VARIATION-FIX] Same principle as country.html, but using
  // two real per-city signals: route count AND airport count. A city
  // served by multiple airports (e.g. London: LHR+LGW) is genuinely a
  // richer, different page than a single-airport city — the copy now
  // reflects that real distinction instead of just substituting the name.
  var title, description;
  var multiAirport = city.airport_codes && city.airport_codes.length > 1;
  if (routes.length === 1) {
    var r = routes[0];
    var otherCity = r.origin_city_slug === city.city_slug ? r.destination_city : r.origin_city;
    title = 'Flug ' + city.name + ' ↔ ' + otherCity;
    description = 'Direktverbindung zwischen ' + city.name + ' und ' + otherCity + ': Preise vergleichen und günstig buchen mit Airpiv.';
  } else if (multiAirport) {
    title = 'Flüge nach ' + city.name + ' — alle Flughäfen im Vergleich';
    description = city.name + ' wird von ' + city.airport_codes.length + ' Flughäfen bedient (' + city.airport_codes.join(', ') + '). Vergleiche alle Strecken mit Airpiv.';
  } else if (routes.length <= 4) {
    title = city.name + ' Flüge — ' + routes.length + ' Strecken im Vergleich';
    description = routes.length + ' Flugverbindungen von und nach ' + city.name + ' im direkten Vergleich. Finde die günstigste Strecke mit Airpiv.';
  } else {
    title = 'Günstige Flüge nach ' + city.name + ' — alle Strecken';
    description = 'Über ' + routes.length + ' Flugverbindungen nach ' + city.name + '. Vergleiche alle Reiseziele und Airlines in Echtzeit mit Airpiv.';
  }
  var url = 'https://airpiv.com/city/' + encodeURIComponent(city.city_slug);

  document.getElementById('page-title').textContent = title + ' | Airpiv';
  document.getElementById('page-description').setAttribute('content', description);
  document.getElementById('page-canonical').setAttribute('href', url);
  document.getElementById('og-title').setAttribute('content', title);
  document.getElementById('og-description').setAttribute('content', description);
  document.getElementById('og-url').setAttribute('content', url);
  var enUrl = 'https://airpiv.com/en/city/' + encodeURIComponent(city.city_slug);
  document.getElementById('hreflang-de').setAttribute('href', url);
  document.getElementById('hreflang-en').setAttribute('href', enUrl);
  document.getElementById('hreflang-default').setAttribute('href', url);

  var introText = city.intro_text || ('Entdecke alle Flugverbindungen von und nach ' + city.name + '. Airpiv vergleicht in Echtzeit hunderte Airlines und findet den besten Preis für deine Reise.');

  // [BREADCRUMB] Home → Country → City — completes the chain started by
  // country.html. Only includes the country segment when the city
  // actually has a country_code on file (older/edge-case cities might
  // not) rather than showing a broken link.
  var breadcrumbHtml = '<nav class="breadcrumb" aria-label="Breadcrumb"><a href="/">Startseite</a><span>›</span>';
  if (city.country_code) {
    breadcrumbHtml += '<a href="/country/' + encodeURIComponent(city.country_code) + '">' + escHtml(city.country_code) + '</a><span>›</span>';
  }
  breadcrumbHtml += '<span>' + escHtml(city.name) + '</span></nav>';

  // [SERVED-AIRPORTS] city.airport_codes grows over time as more routes
  // reveal more airports for the same city (ensureCityExists() appends,
  // never overwrites) — shown as real badges, not a guessed/fixed list.
  var airportsHtml = (city.airport_codes && city.airport_codes.length)
    ? '<div class="city-hero-airports">' + city.airport_codes.map(function(a) { return '<a href="/airport/' + encodeURIComponent(a) + '" class="city-airport-badge">' + escHtml(a) + '</a>'; }).join('') + '</div>'
    : '';

  // [CITY-ROUTES] Split into "from" and "to" — a route where the SAME
  // city is both origin and destination is impossible by construction
  // (a route always connects two different cities), so no special
  // handling needed here unlike the country case.
  var fromRoutes = routes.filter(function(r) { return r.origin_city_slug === city.city_slug; });
  var toRoutes = routes.filter(function(r) { return r.destination_city_slug === city.city_slug; });

  function routeCardHtml(r) {
    return '<a class="city-route-card" href="/flights/' + encodeURIComponent(r.slug) + '">' +
      escHtml(r.origin_city) + '<span class="arrow">→</span>' + escHtml(r.destination_city) +
    '</a>';
  }

  var fromSectionHtml = fromRoutes.length
    ? '<section class="city-routes-section"><h2>Flüge ab ' + escHtml(city.name) + '</h2><div class="city-route-grid">' + fromRoutes.map(routeCardHtml).join('') + '</div></section>'
    : '';
  var toSectionHtml = toRoutes.length
    ? '<section class="city-routes-section"><h2>Flüge nach ' + escHtml(city.name) + '</h2><div class="city-route-grid">' + toRoutes.map(routeCardHtml).join('') + '</div></section>'
    : '';

  document.getElementById('city-content').innerHTML =
    breadcrumbHtml +
    '<h1>' + escHtml(title) + '</h1>' +
    '<div class="city-hero">' +
      '<div class="city-hero-name">✈ ' + escHtml(city.name) + '</div>' +
      '<div class="city-hero-sub">' + routes.length + ' verfügbare ' + (routes.length === 1 ? 'Flugroute' : 'Flugrouten') + '</div>' +
      airportsHtml +
    '</div>' +
    '<section><p>' + escHtml(introText) + '</p></section>' +
    fromSectionHtml +
    toSectionHtml;

  // [BREADCRUMB-SCHEMA] Matches the visible breadcrumb above.
  var breadcrumbList = [
    { "@type": "ListItem", "position": 1, "name": "Startseite", "item": "https://airpiv.com/" },
  ];
  if (city.country_code) {
    breadcrumbList.push({ "@type": "ListItem", "position": 2, "name": city.country_code, "item": "https://airpiv.com/country/" + city.country_code });
  }
  breadcrumbList.push({ "@type": "ListItem", "position": breadcrumbList.length + 1, "name": city.name, "item": url });

  document.getElementById('city-schema').textContent = JSON.stringify({
    "@context": "https://schema.org",
    "@type": "WebPage",
    "name": title,
    "description": description,
    "url": url,
    "breadcrumb": { "@type": "BreadcrumbList", "itemListElement": breadcrumbList }
  });
}
</script>

</body>
</html>

<script>
var PROXY = 'https://api.airpiv.com';

function showToast(msg, type) {
  var t = document.getElementById('toast');
  t.textContent = msg;
  t.className = 'show' + (type ? ' ' + type : '');
  setTimeout(function(){ t.className = ''; }, 3500);
}

function sendCt() {
  var n = document.getElementById('ct-name');
  var e = document.getElementById('ct-email');
  var s = document.getElementById('ct-sub2');
  var m = document.getElementById('ct-msg');
  if (!n.value.trim() || !e.value.trim() || !m.value.trim()) {
    showToast('⚠️ Bitte alle Felder ausfüllen', 'error');
    return;
  }
  if (!/^[^\s@]+@[^\s@]+\.[^\s@]{2,}$/.test(e.value.trim())) {
    showToast('⚠️ Ungültige E-Mail-Adresse', 'error');
    return;
  }
  var sendBtn = document.getElementById('ct-send-btn');
  sendBtn.disabled = true; sendBtn.textContent = '…';
  fetch(PROXY + '/contact', {
    method: 'POST', headers: {'Content-Type':'application/json'},
    body: JSON.stringify({ name: n.value.trim(), email: e.value.trim(), subject: s.value.trim(), message: m.value.trim() })
  }).then(function(r){ return r.json(); }).then(function(j){
    sendBtn.disabled = false; sendBtn.textContent = 'Senden ✉️';
    if (j.ok) {
      showToast('✉️ Gesendet! Wir melden uns bald.', 'success');
      n.value = ''; e.value = ''; s.value = ''; m.value = '';
    } else {
      showToast('❌ ' + (j.error || 'Senden fehlgeschlagen'), 'error');
    }
  }).catch(function(){
    sendBtn.disabled = false; sendBtn.textContent = 'Senden ✉️';
    showToast('❌ Verbindungsfehler. Bitte später erneut versuchen.', 'error');
  });
}

document.getElementById('ct-send-btn').addEventListener('click', sendCt);
</script>

</body>
</html>


==================== FILE: flywise-app/country-en.html ====================
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://api.airpiv.com">
<link rel="dns-prefetch" href="https://api.airpiv.com">
<script async src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/gtag/js?id=G-2K257GSWEM"></script>
<script src="/analytics.js" defer></script>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title id="page-title">Flights | Airpiv</title>
<meta name="description" id="page-description" content="Compare and book cheap flights with Airpiv.">
<meta name="robots" content="index, follow">
<link rel="canonical" id="page-canonical" href="https://airpiv.com/en/country/">
<link rel="alternate" hreflang="de" id="hreflang-de" href="https://airpiv.com/country/">
<link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" id="hreflang-en" href="https://airpiv.com/en/country/">
<link rel="alternate" hreflang="x-default" id="hreflang-default" href="https://airpiv.com/country/">
<meta property="og:type" content="website">
<meta property="og:title" id="og-title" content="Flights | Airpiv">
<meta property="og:description" id="og-description" content="Compare and book cheap flights with Airpiv.">
<meta property="og:url" id="og-url" content="https://airpiv.com/en/country/">
<meta property="og:image" content="https://airpiv.com/og-image.png">
<meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image">

<link rel="icon" href="/favicon.ico" sizes="any">

<script type="application/ld+json" id="country-schema">{}</script>
<style>
.country-hero{background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--navy),var(--navy2));border-radius:18px;padding:32px 24px;margin:24px 0;text-align:center}
.country-hero-name{font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-size:1.8rem;font-weight:800;color:#fff}
.country-hero-sub{color:rgba(255,255,255,.55);font-size:13px;margin-top:6px}
.breadcrumb{display:flex;gap:6px;align-items:center;font-size:12.5px;color:var(--tx3);margin-bottom:14px;flex-wrap:wrap}
.breadcrumb a{color:var(--teal);text-decoration:none}
.breadcrumb a:hover{text-decoration:underline}
.country-routes-section{margin-top:28px}
.country-routes-section h2{font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-size:1.2rem;color:var(--tx);margin-bottom:12px}
.country-route-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:10px}
.country-route-card{display:block;background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--bd);border-radius:10px;padding:13px 15px;font-size:13.5px;font-weight:600;color:var(--tx);text-decoration:none}
.country-route-card:hover{border-color:var(--teal)}
.country-route-card .arrow{color:var(--teal);margin:0 4px}
@media (max-width:480px){.country-route-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<nav class="topnav">
  <div class="navi">
    <a href="/en/" class="logo"><picture>
      <source srcset="/airpiv-logo.webp" type="image/webp">
      <img src="/airpiv-logo.png" alt="Airpiv" width="118" height="38">
    </picture></a>
    <div class="navr">
      <a href="/" class="btn-t">Search flights</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</nav>

<main id="country-main">
  <div id="country-content">
    <p style="color:var(--tx3)">Loading country…</p>
  </div>
</main>

<footer><div class="fi2">
  <div class="fgr">
    <div><div class="flo"><span style="display:inline-flex;width:26px;height:26px;border-radius:8px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#12C7B0,#0A9384);align-items:center;justify-content:center"><svg width="17" height="17" viewBox="0 0 64 64" fill="none"><path d="M32 14 L46 46 L32 38 L18 46 Z" fill="#0A1822"/></svg></span>Air<span style="color:var(--teal)">piv</span></div><p class="fdes">Find flights no one else can find. 600+ airlines, best prices, full guarantee.</p></div>
    <div class="fcol"><h4>Company</h4><ul><li><a href="/about.html">About us</a></li><li><a href="/blog.html">Blog</a></li></ul></div>
    <div class="fcol"><h4>Support</h4><ul><li><a href="/contact.html">Contact</a></li><li><a href="/privacy.html">Privacy</a></li><li><a href="/terms.html">Terms</a></li></ul></div>

<script>
var PROXY = 'https://api.airpiv.com';

function escHtml(s) {
  var d = document.createElement('div');
  d.textContent = s || '';
  return d.innerHTML;
}

var params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
var code = params.get('code');
if (!code) {
  var pathMatch = window.location.pathname.match(/\/en\/country\/([^\/]+)\/?$/);
  if (pathMatch) code = decodeURIComponent(pathMatch[1]);
}

if (!code) {
  renderNotFound();
} else {
  fetch(PROXY + '/countries/' + encodeURIComponent(code))
    .then(function(r){ return r.json(); })
    .then(function(j){
      if (!j.ok || !j.country) { renderNotFound(); return; }
      renderCountry(j.country, j.routes || []);
    })
    .catch(function(){ renderNotFound(); });
}

function renderNotFound() {
  document.getElementById('country-content').innerHTML =
    '<a href="/en/" class="back-link">← Back to homepage</a>' +
    '<h1>Country not found</h1>' +
    '<p style="color:var(--tx3)">No flight routes are currently available for this country.</p>' +
    '<a href="/en/" class="btn-t" style="display:inline-flex;margin-top:12px">← Search flights</a>';
}

var ENGLISH_CITY_NAMES = {
  BER: 'Berlin', MUC: 'Munich', FRA: 'Frankfurt', HAM: 'Hamburg', DUS: 'Dusseldorf',
  CGN: 'Cologne', STR: 'Stuttgart', HAJ: 'Hanover', LEJ: 'Leipzig', NUE: 'Nuremberg',
  DTM: 'Dortmund', BRE: 'Bremen', VIE: 'Vienna', ZRH: 'Zurich', GVA: 'Geneva',
  LHR: 'London', LGW: 'London', STN: 'London', LTN: 'London', CDG: 'Paris', ORY: 'Paris',
  FCO: 'Rome', CIA: 'Rome', MXP: 'Milan', LIN: 'Milan', VCE: 'Venice', NAP: 'Naples',
  MAD: 'Madrid', BCN: 'Barcelona', VLC: 'Valencia', SVQ: 'Seville', AGP: 'Malaga',
  LIS: 'Lisbon', OPO: 'Porto', AMS: 'Amsterdam', BRU: 'Brussels', LUX: 'Luxembourg',
  CPH: 'Copenhagen', OSL: 'Oslo', ARN: 'Stockholm', HEL: 'Helsinki', DUB: 'Dublin',
  WAW: 'Warsaw', KRK: 'Krakow', PRG: 'Prague', BUD: 'Budapest', ATH: 'Athens',
  IST: 'Istanbul', SAW: 'Istanbul', CAI: 'Cairo', DXB: 'Dubai', DOH: 'Doha',
  BKK: 'Bangkok', SIN: 'Singapore', HKG: 'Hong Kong', NRT: 'Tokyo', HND: 'Tokyo',
  JFK: 'New York', EWR: 'New York', LAX: 'Los Angeles', SFO: 'San Francisco',
  MIA: 'Miami', YYZ: 'Toronto', GRU: 'São Paulo', CPT: 'Cape Town', JNB: 'Johannesburg',
  SYD: 'Sydney', MEL: 'Melbourne', DBV: 'Dubrovnik', SPU: 'Split', ZAG: 'Zagreb',
};
function anglicizeCity(name, iata) {
  return (iata && ENGLISH_CITY_NAMES[iata]) || name;
}

// [LOCALIZATION-FIX] country.name from the API is stored/localized in
// German server-side — this maps the same ISO country code to its real
// English name instead. A code not in this list keeps the server's
// value as a safe fallback, same principle as the city map.
var ENGLISH_COUNTRY_NAMES = {
  DE: 'Germany', AT: 'Austria', CH: 'Switzerland', GB: 'United Kingdom',
  FR: 'France', IT: 'Italy', ES: 'Spain', PT: 'Portugal', NL: 'Netherlands',
  BE: 'Belgium', LU: 'Luxembourg', DK: 'Denmark', NO: 'Norway', SE: 'Sweden',
  FI: 'Finland', IE: 'Ireland', PL: 'Poland', CZ: 'Czech Republic', HU: 'Hungary',
  GR: 'Greece', TR: 'Turkey', EG: 'Egypt', AE: 'United Arab Emirates', QA: 'Qatar',
  TH: 'Thailand', SG: 'Singapore', HK: 'Hong Kong', JP: 'Japan', US: 'United States',
  CA: 'Canada', BR: 'Brazil', ZA: 'South Africa', AU: 'Australia', HR: 'Croatia',
};
function anglicizeCountry(name, code) {
  return (code && ENGLISH_COUNTRY_NAMES[code]) || name;
}

function renderCountry(country, routes) {
  country.name = anglicizeCountry(country.name, country.code);
  routes.forEach(function (r) {
    r.origin_city = anglicizeCity(r.origin_city, r.origin_iata);
    r.destination_city = anglicizeCity(r.destination_city, r.destination_iata);
  });

  var title, description;
  if (routes.length === 1) {
    var r = routes[0];
    var otherCity = r.origin_country === country.code ? r.destination_city : r.origin_city;
    title = 'Flights to ' + country.name + ' — ' + otherCity + ' ↔ ' + country.name;
    description = 'Direct connection between ' + otherCity + ' and ' + country.name + ': compare prices and book cheap flights with Airpiv.';
  } else if (routes.length <= 4) {
    title = country.name + ' flights — ' + routes.length + ' routes compared';
    description = routes.length + ' flight connections to and from ' + country.name + ', compared side by side. Find the cheapest route with Airpiv.';
  } else {
    title = 'Cheap flights to ' + country.name + ' — all destinations';
    description = 'Over ' + routes.length + ' flight connections to ' + country.name + '. Compare all destinations and airlines in real time with Airpiv.';
  }
  var url = 'https://airpiv.com/en/country/' + encodeURIComponent(country.code);
  var deUrl = 'https://airpiv.com/country/' + encodeURIComponent(country.code);

  document.getElementById('page-title').textContent = title + ' | Airpiv';
  document.getElementById('page-description').setAttribute('content', description);
  document.getElementById('page-canonical').setAttribute('href', url);
  document.getElementById('og-title').setAttribute('content', title);
  document.getElementById('og-description').setAttribute('content', description);
  document.getElementById('og-url').setAttribute('content', url);
  document.getElementById('hreflang-de').setAttribute('href', deUrl);
  document.getElementById('hreflang-en').setAttribute('href', url);
  document.getElementById('hreflang-default').setAttribute('href', deUrl);

  var introText = 'Discover all flight connections to and from ' + country.name + '. Airpiv compares hundreds of airlines in real time to find the best price for your trip.';

  var breadcrumbHtml =
    '<nav class="breadcrumb" aria-label="Breadcrumb">' +
      '<a href="/en/">Home</a><span>›</span>' +
      '<span>' + escHtml(country.name) + '</span>' +
    '</nav>';

  var fromRoutes = routes.filter(function(r) { return r.origin_country === country.code; });
  var toRoutes = routes.filter(function(r) { return r.destination_country === country.code; });

  function routeCardHtml(r) {
    return '<a class="country-route-card" href="/en/flights/' + encodeURIComponent(r.slug) + '">' +
      escHtml(r.origin_city) + '<span class="arrow">→</span>' + escHtml(r.destination_city) +
    '</a>';
  }

  var fromSectionHtml = fromRoutes.length
    ? '<section class="country-routes-section"><h2>Flights from ' + escHtml(country.name) + '</h2><div class="country-route-grid">' + fromRoutes.map(routeCardHtml).join('') + '</div></section>'
    : '';
  var toSectionHtml = toRoutes.length
    ? '<section class="country-routes-section"><h2>Flights to ' + escHtml(country.name) + '</h2><div class="country-route-grid">' + toRoutes.map(routeCardHtml).join('') + '</div></section>'
    : '';

  document.getElementById('country-content').innerHTML =
    breadcrumbHtml +
    '<h1>' + escHtml(title) + '</h1>' +
    '<div class="country-hero">' +
      '<div class="country-hero-name">✈ ' + escHtml(country.name) + '</div>' +
      '<div class="country-hero-sub">' + routes.length + ' available ' + (routes.length === 1 ? 'route' : 'routes') + '</div>' +
    '</div>' +
    '<section><p>' + escHtml(introText) + '</p></section>' +
    fromSectionHtml +
    toSectionHtml;

  document.getElementById('country-schema').textContent = JSON.stringify({
    "@context": "https://schema.org",
    "@type": "WebPage",
    "name": title,
    "description": description,
    "url": url,
    "inLanguage": "en",
    "breadcrumb": {
      "@type": "BreadcrumbList",
      "itemListElement": [
        { "@type": "ListItem", "position": 1, "name": "Home", "item": "https://airpiv.com/en/" },
        { "@type": "ListItem", "position": 2, "name": country.name, "item": url }
      ]
    }
  });
}
</script>

</body>
</html>

<script>
var PROXY = 'https://api.airpiv.com';

function escHtml(s) {
  var d = document.createElement('div');
  d.textContent = s || '';
  return d.innerHTML;
}

var params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
var code = params.get('code');
if (!code) {
  var pathMatch = window.location.pathname.match(/\/country\/([^\/]+)\/?$/);
  if (pathMatch) code = decodeURIComponent(pathMatch[1]);
}

if (!code) {
  renderNotFound();
} else {
  fetch(PROXY + '/countries/' + encodeURIComponent(code))
    .then(function(r){ return r.json(); })
    .then(function(j){
      if (!j.ok || !j.country) { renderNotFound(); return; }
      renderCountry(j.country, j.routes || []);
    })
    .catch(function(){ renderNotFound(); });
}

function renderNotFound() {
  document.getElementById('country-content').innerHTML =
    '<a href="/" class="back-link">← Zurück zur Startseite</a>' +
    '<h1>Land nicht gefunden</h1>' +
    '<p style="color:var(--tx3)">Für dieses Land sind aktuell keine Flugrouten verfügbar.</p>' +
    '<a href="/" class="btn-t" style="display:inline-flex;margin-top:12px">← Flüge suchen</a>';
}

// [LOCALIZATION-FIX] نفس قائمة التصحيح المستخدمة في flight-route.html
// بالظبط — بتصحح اسم المدينة بالألماني الصحيح بناءً على كود المطار
// الحقيقي (IATA)، مش تخمين من النص نفسه. أي كود مش موجود في القائمة
// بيسيب النص زي ما هو (آمن).
var GERMAN_CITY_NAMES = {
  BER: 'Berlin', MUC: 'München', FRA: 'Frankfurt', HAM: 'Hamburg', DUS: 'Düsseldorf',
  CGN: 'Köln', STR: 'Stuttgart', HAJ: 'Hannover', LEJ: 'Leipzig', NUE: 'Nürnberg',
  DTM: 'Dortmund', BRE: 'Bremen', VIE: 'Wien', ZRH: 'Zürich', GVA: 'Genf',
  LHR: 'London', LGW: 'London', STN: 'London', LTN: 'London', CDG: 'Paris', ORY: 'Paris',
  FCO: 'Rom', CIA: 'Rom', MXP: 'Mailand', LIN: 'Mailand', VCE: 'Venedig', NAP: 'Neapel',
  MAD: 'Madrid', BCN: 'Barcelona', VLC: 'Valencia', SVQ: 'Sevilla', AGP: 'Málaga',
  LIS: 'Lissabon', OPO: 'Porto', AMS: 'Amsterdam', BRU: 'Brüssel', LUX: 'Luxemburg',
  CPH: 'Kopenhagen', OSL: 'Oslo', ARN: 'Stockholm', HEL: 'Helsinki', DUB: 'Dublin',
  WAW: 'Warschau', KRK: 'Krakau', PRG: 'Prag', BUD: 'Budapest', ATH: 'Athen',
  IST: 'Istanbul', SAW: 'Istanbul', CAI: 'Kairo', DXB: 'Dubai', DOH: 'Doha',
  BKK: 'Bangkok', SIN: 'Singapur', HKG: 'Hongkong', NRT: 'Tokio', HND: 'Tokio',
  JFK: 'New York', EWR: 'New York', LAX: 'Los Angeles', SFO: 'San Francisco',
  MIA: 'Miami', YYZ: 'Toronto', GRU: 'São Paulo', CPT: 'Kapstadt', JNB: 'Johannesburg',
  SYD: 'Sydney', MEL: 'Melbourne', DBV: 'Dubrovnik', SPU: 'Split', ZAG: 'Zagreb',
};
function germanizeCity(name, iata) {
  return (iata && GERMAN_CITY_NAMES[iata]) || name;
}

function renderCountry(country, routes) {
  // [LOCALIZATION-FIX] اسم الدولة نفسه أصلاً بييجي مُصحح من السيرفر
  // (قائمة COUNTRY_NAMES_DE)، لكن أسماء المدن في المسارات المرتبطة
  // (زي "Rome" بدل "Rom") كانت لسه بتيجي زي ما الأدمن كتبها بالظبط.
  routes.forEach(function (r) {
    r.origin_city = germanizeCity(r.origin_city, r.origin_iata);
    r.destination_city = germanizeCity(r.destination_city, r.destination_iata);
  });

  // [CONTENT-VARIATION-FIX] Title/description vary by route count (a
  // real, defensible signal — not arbitrary) rather than one fixed
  // template with only the name substituted. A country with a single
  // route gets specific, route-naming copy; a few routes gets
  // "compare options" framing; many routes gets "explore all
  // destinations" framing — genuinely different wording driven by what's
  // actually true about each country's page, not just its name.
  var title, description;
  if (routes.length === 1) {
    var r = routes[0];
    var otherCity = r.origin_country === country.code ? r.destination_city : r.origin_city;
    title = 'Flug nach ' + country.name + ' — ' + otherCity + ' ↔ ' + country.name;
    description = 'Direktverbindung zwischen ' + otherCity + ' und ' + country.name + ': Preise vergleichen und günstig buchen mit Airpiv.';
  } else if (routes.length <= 4) {
    title = country.name + ' Flüge — ' + routes.length + ' Strecken im Vergleich';
    description = routes.length + ' Flugverbindungen von und nach ' + country.name + ' im direkten Vergleich. Finde die günstigste Strecke mit Airpiv.';
  } else {
    title = 'Günstige Flüge nach ' + country.name + ' — alle Reiseziele';
    description = 'Über ' + routes.length + ' Flugverbindungen nach ' + country.name + '. Vergleiche alle Reiseziele und Airlines in Echtzeit mit Airpiv.';
  }
  var url = 'https://airpiv.com/country/' + encodeURIComponent(country.code);

  document.getElementById('page-title').textContent = title + ' | Airpiv';
  document.getElementById('page-description').setAttribute('content', description);
  document.getElementById('page-canonical').setAttribute('href', url);
  document.getElementById('og-title').setAttribute('content', title);
  document.getElementById('og-description').setAttribute('content', description);
  document.getElementById('og-url').setAttribute('content', url);
  var enUrl = 'https://airpiv.com/en/country/' + encodeURIComponent(country.code);
  document.getElementById('hreflang-de').setAttribute('href', url);
  document.getElementById('hreflang-en').setAttribute('href', enUrl);
  document.getElementById('hreflang-default').setAttribute('href', url);

  var introText = country.intro_text || ('Entdecke alle Flugverbindungen von und nach ' + country.name + '. Airpiv vergleicht in Echtzeit hunderte Airlines und findet den besten Preis für deine Reise.');

  // [BREADCRUMB] Home → Country — the second level of the planned
  // Home → Country → City → Route hierarchy (city pages come next).
  var breadcrumbHtml =
    '<nav class="breadcrumb" aria-label="Breadcrumb">' +
      '<a href="/">Startseite</a><span>›</span>' +
      '<span>' + escHtml(country.name) + '</span>' +
    '</nav>';

  // [COUNTRY-ROUTES] Split into "from" (this country is the origin) and
  // "to" (this country is the destination) — a route where the SAME
  // country is both origin and destination (a domestic route) appears
  // in both sections, which is correct: it's relevant to someone
  // browsing this country's page either way.
  var fromRoutes = routes.filter(function(r) { return r.origin_country === country.code; });
  var toRoutes = routes.filter(function(r) { return r.destination_country === country.code; });

  function routeCardHtml(r) {
    return '<a class="country-route-card" href="/flights/' + encodeURIComponent(r.slug) + '">' +
      escHtml(r.origin_city) + '<span class="arrow">→</span>' + escHtml(r.destination_city) +
    '</a>';
  }

  var fromSectionHtml = fromRoutes.length
    ? '<section class="country-routes-section"><h2>Flüge ab ' + escHtml(country.name) + '</h2><div class="country-route-grid">' + fromRoutes.map(routeCardHtml).join('') + '</div></section>'
    : '';
  var toSectionHtml = toRoutes.length
    ? '<section class="country-routes-section"><h2>Flüge nach ' + escHtml(country.name) + '</h2><div class="country-route-grid">' + toRoutes.map(routeCardHtml).join('') + '</div></section>'
    : '';

  document.getElementById('country-content').innerHTML =
    breadcrumbHtml +
    '<h1>' + escHtml(title) + '</h1>' +
    '<div class="country-hero">' +
      '<div class="country-hero-name">✈ ' + escHtml(country.name) + '</div>' +
      '<div class="country-hero-sub">' + routes.length + ' verfügbare ' + (routes.length === 1 ? 'Flugroute' : 'Flugrouten') + '</div>' +
    '</div>' +
    '<section><p>' + escHtml(introText) + '</p></section>' +
    fromSectionHtml +
    toSectionHtml;

  // [BREADCRUMB-SCHEMA] Matches the visible breadcrumb above —
  // structured data for rich-result breadcrumbs in search.
  document.getElementById('country-schema').textContent = JSON.stringify({
    "@context": "https://schema.org",
    "@type": "WebPage",
    "name": title,
    "description": description,
    "url": url,
    "breadcrumb": {
      "@type": "BreadcrumbList",
      "itemListElement": [
        { "@type": "ListItem", "position": 1, "name": "Startseite", "item": "https://airpiv.com/" },
        { "@type": "ListItem", "position": 2, "name": country.name, "item": url }
      ]
    }
  });
}
</script>

</body>
</html>

==================== FILE: flywise-app/docs/SEO-MASTER-PLAN.md ====================
---

🚀 AIRPIV SEO MASTER PLAN 10/10

الهدف

بناء أكبر شبكة صفحات طيران قابلة للتوسع مع الحفاظ على الجودة والفهرسة وتحقيق نمو طويل المدى في Google دون استخدام أي محتوى أو بيانات مضللة.


---

المبادئ الأساسية

جميع البيانات حقيقية 100%.

ممنوع أي أسعار أو تقييمات أو مراجعات أو أعداد مستخدمين غير موجودة فعلياً.

كل محتوى يجب أن يأتي من:

قاعدة البيانات

بيانات الرحلات

بيانات المطارات

بيانات المدن

محتوى إداري مكتوب يدوياً




---

المرحلة 1 — تحسين صفحات المدن

FAQPage Schema

أسئلة ديناميكية:

ما المطارات التي تخدم [المدينة]؟

كم عدد الوجهات المتاحة من [المدينة]؟

ما أشهر الرحلات من [المدينة]؟

كم مطاراً يخدم [المدينة]؟

هل توجد رحلات دولية من [المدينة]؟

ما أكثر الوجهات شعبية من [المدينة]؟

ما الدول التي يمكن السفر إليها من [المدينة]؟

ما أقصر رحلة من [المدينة]؟

ما أطول رحلة من [المدينة]؟

هل توجد رحلات مباشرة من [المدينة]؟

توسيع FAQ

أسئلة إضافية:

هل توجد رحلات مباشرة؟

ما أرخص أشهر السفر؟

ما أكثر أشهر السفر ازدحاماً؟

هل توجد مطارات بديلة؟

ما أكثر الأيام توفيراً؟

هل توجد رحلات صباحية أو مسائية؟
