<script>
var PROXY = 'https://api.airpiv.com';

function escHtml(s) {
  var d = document.createElement('div');
  d.textContent = s || '';
  return d.innerHTML;
}

var params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
var slug = params.get('slug');
if (!slug) {
  // [ROBUST-SLUG-FIX] Deliberately not tied to one exact prefix pattern
  // (like requiring the path to literally start with "/en/flights/") —
  // that made this fragile to how the host's rewrite rule actually
  // presents the path to the browser. Instead: take the last non-empty
  // path segment, whatever came before it. Works the same whether the
  // real path is "/en/flights/x", "/flight-route-en.html" with the slug
  // still in the visible URL, or any other prefix shape.
  var segments = window.location.pathname.split('/').filter(Boolean);
  var last = segments[segments.length - 1] || '';
  if (last && !/\.html?$/i.test(last)) slug = decodeURIComponent(last);
}

if (!slug) {
  renderNotFound();
} else {
  fetch(PROXY + '/route-pages/' + encodeURIComponent(slug))
    .then(function(r){ return r.json(); })
    .then(function(j){
      if (!j.ok || !j.route) { renderNotFound(); return; }
      renderRoute(j.route);
    })
    .catch(function(){ renderNotFound(); });
}

function renderNotFound() {
  document.getElementById('route-content').innerHTML =
    '<h1>Route not found</h1>' +
    '<p style="color:var(--tx3)">This flight route is not available.</p>' +
    '<a href="/en/" class="btn-t" style="display:inline-flex;margin-top:12px">← Search flights</a>';
}

var ENGLISH_CITY_NAMES = {
  BER: 'Berlin', MUC: 'Munich', FRA: 'Frankfurt', HAM: 'Hamburg', DUS: 'Dusseldorf',
  CGN: 'Cologne', STR: 'Stuttgart', HAJ: 'Hanover', LEJ: 'Leipzig', NUE: 'Nuremberg',
  DTM: 'Dortmund', BRE: 'Bremen', VIE: 'Vienna', ZRH: 'Zurich', GVA: 'Geneva',
  LHR: 'London', LGW: 'London', STN: 'London', LTN: 'London', CDG: 'Paris', ORY: 'Paris',
  FCO: 'Rome', CIA: 'Rome', MXP: 'Milan', LIN: 'Milan', VCE: 'Venice', NAP: 'Naples',
  MAD: 'Madrid', BCN: 'Barcelona', VLC: 'Valencia', SVQ: 'Seville', AGP: 'Malaga',
  LIS: 'Lisbon', OPO: 'Porto', AMS: 'Amsterdam', BRU: 'Brussels', LUX: 'Luxembourg',
  CPH: 'Copenhagen', OSL: 'Oslo', ARN: 'Stockholm', HEL: 'Helsinki', DUB: 'Dublin',
  WAW: 'Warsaw', KRK: 'Krakow', PRG: 'Prague', BUD: 'Budapest', ATH: 'Athens',
  IST: 'Istanbul', SAW: 'Istanbul', CAI: 'Cairo', DXB: 'Dubai', DOH: 'Doha',
  BKK: 'Bangkok', SIN: 'Singapore', HKG: 'Hong Kong', NRT: 'Tokyo', HND: 'Tokyo',
  JFK: 'New York', EWR: 'New York', LAX: 'Los Angeles', SFO: 'San Francisco',
  MIA: 'Miami', YYZ: 'Toronto', GRU: 'São Paulo', CPT: 'Cape Town', JNB: 'Johannesburg',
  SYD: 'Sydney', MEL: 'Melbourne', DBV: 'Dubrovnik', SPU: 'Split', ZAG: 'Zagreb',
};
function anglicizeCity(name, iata) {
  return ENGLISH_CITY_NAMES[iata] || name;
}
var CITY_AIRPORTS = {};
Object.keys(ENGLISH_CITY_NAMES).forEach(function (code) {
  var city = ENGLISH_CITY_NAMES[code];
  if (!CITY_AIRPORTS[city]) CITY_AIRPORTS[city] = [];
  CITY_AIRPORTS[city].push(code);
});
function getAlternativeAirports(cityName, excludeIata) {
  var list = CITY_AIRPORTS[cityName] || [];
  return list.filter(function (c) { return c !== excludeIata; });
}

function renderRoute(route) {
  try { if (typeof gtag === 'function') gtag('event', 'route_page_view', { origin: route.origin_iata, destination: route.destination_iata, slug: route.slug }); } catch (e) {}
  route.origin_city = anglicizeCity(route.origin_city, route.origin_iata);
  route.destination_city = anglicizeCity(route.destination_city, route.destination_iata);

  var title = 'Flights from ' + route.origin_city + ' to ' + route.destination_city;
  var description = 'Find and book cheap flights from ' + route.origin_city + ' (' + route.origin_iata + ') to ' + route.destination_city + ' (' + route.destination_iata + ') — compare prices with Airpiv.';
  var url = 'https://airpiv.com/en/flights/' + encodeURIComponent(route.slug);
  var deUrl = 'https://airpiv.com/flights/' + encodeURIComponent(route.slug);

  document.getElementById('page-title').textContent = title + ' | Airpiv';
  document.getElementById('page-description').setAttribute('content', description);
  document.getElementById('page-canonical').setAttribute('href', url);
  document.getElementById('og-title').setAttribute('content', title);
  document.getElementById('og-description').setAttribute('content', description);
  document.getElementById('og-url').setAttribute('content', url);
  document.getElementById('hreflang-de').setAttribute('href', deUrl);
  document.getElementById('hreflang-en').setAttribute('href', url);
  document.getElementById('hreflang-default').setAttribute('href', deUrl);

  function buildDynamicIntro(r) {
    var hasDistance = r.distance_km != null;
    var isLongHaul = r.haul_type === 'long-haul';
    var distancePhrase = hasDistance
      ? (' The route covers roughly ' + r.distance_km.toLocaleString('en-US') + ' km' + (isLongHaul ? ', making it a long-haul flight.' : ' — a short-haul hop of just a few flying hours.'))
      : '';
    var opening = isLongHaul
      ? ('Looking for a flight from ' + r.origin_city + ' to ' + r.destination_city + '?')
      : ('Planning a trip from ' + r.origin_city + ' to ' + r.destination_city + '?');
    var closing = isLongHaul
      ? ' Airpiv compares hundreds of airlines in real time for this long-haul route, so you see the true total price including all fees — transparent, with no hidden costs.'
      : ' Airpiv compares hundreds of airlines for this route in seconds, so you find the best price for your flight — transparent, with no hidden costs and a best-price guarantee.';
    return opening + distancePhrase + closing;
  }
  var introText = buildDynamicIntro(route);

  var bookingUrl = '/search/' + encodeURIComponent(route.origin_iata) + '-' + encodeURIComponent(route.destination_iata);

  var breadcrumbHtml = '<nav class="breadcrumb" aria-label="Breadcrumb"><a href="/en/">Home</a><span>›</span>';
  if (route.destination_country) {
    breadcrumbHtml += '<a href="/en/country/' + encodeURIComponent(route.destination_country) + '">' + escHtml(route.destination_country) + '</a><span>›</span>';
  }
  if (route.destination_city_slug) {
    breadcrumbHtml += '<a href="/en/city/' + encodeURIComponent(route.destination_city_slug) + '">' + escHtml(route.destination_city) + '</a><span>›</span>';
  }
  breadcrumbHtml += '<span>' + escHtml(route.origin_city) + ' → ' + escHtml(route.destination_city) + '</span></nav>';

  var breadcrumbItems = [{ "@type": "ListItem", "position": 1, "name": "Home", "item": "https://airpiv.com/en/" }];
  var bcPos = 2;
  if (route.destination_country) {
    breadcrumbItems.push({ "@type": "ListItem", "position": bcPos++, "name": route.destination_country, "item": "https://airpiv.com/en/country/" + encodeURIComponent(route.destination_country) });
  }
  if (route.destination_city_slug) {
    breadcrumbItems.push({ "@type": "ListItem", "position": bcPos++, "name": route.destination_city, "item": "https://airpiv.com/en/city/" + encodeURIComponent(route.destination_city_slug) });
  }
  breadcrumbItems.push({ "@type": "ListItem", "position": bcPos++, "name": route.origin_city + ' → ' + route.destination_city, "item": url });
  document.getElementById('breadcrumb-schema').textContent = JSON.stringify({
    "@context": "https://schema.org",
    "@type": "BreadcrumbList",
    "itemListElement": breadcrumbItems
  });

  var airportInfoHtml = '<section class="airport-info-section"><h2>Airport information</h2><div class="airport-info-grid">' +
    '<a class="airport-info-card" href="/en/airport/' + encodeURIComponent(route.origin_iata) + '"><span class="airport-info-code">' + escHtml(route.origin_iata) + '</span><span class="airport-info-city">' + escHtml(route.origin_city) + '</span></a>' +
    '<a class="airport-info-card" href="/en/airport/' + encodeURIComponent(route.destination_iata) + '"><span class="airport-info-code">' + escHtml(route.destination_iata) + '</span><span class="airport-info-city">' + escHtml(route.destination_city) + '</span></a>' +
  '</div></section>';

  var altAirports = getAlternativeAirports(route.destination_city, route.destination_iata);
  var altAirportsHtml = altAirports.length
    ? '<section class="airport-info-section"><h2>Alternative airports in ' + escHtml(route.destination_city) + '</h2><div class="airport-info-grid">' +
      altAirports.map(function (code) {
        return '<a class="airport-info-card" href="/en/airport/' + encodeURIComponent(code) + '"><span class="airport-info-code">' + escHtml(code) + '</span><span class="airport-info-city">' + escHtml(route.destination_city) + '</span></a>';
      }).join('') +
    '</div></section>'
    : '';

  var distanceHtml = '';
  if (route.distance_km != null) {
    var haulLabel = route.haul_type === 'long-haul' ? 'Long-haul flight' : 'Short-haul flight';
    distanceHtml = '<div style="color:rgba(255,255,255,.5);font-size:12px;margin-top:6px">📏 ' + route.distance_km.toLocaleString('en-US') + ' km · ' + haulLabel + '</div>';
  }

  var haulQuestion = route.distance_km != null
    ? { question: 'How far is it from ' + route.origin_city + ' to ' + route.destination_city + '?',
        answer: 'The distance is roughly ' + route.distance_km.toLocaleString('en-US') + ' km — ' + (route.haul_type === 'long-haul' ? 'a long-haul flight.' : 'a short-haul flight.') }
    : { question: 'Which airport serves ' + route.destination_city + '?', answer: 'This route uses ' + route.destination_iata + ' airport. Exact flight times and airlines are shown in the search results.' };
  var bestTimeFaqItem = route.distance_km != null
    ? { question: 'What is the best time to fly from ' + route.origin_city + ' to ' + route.destination_city + '?',
        answer: route.haul_type === 'long-haul'
          ? 'This long-haul route is usually cheapest when booked 2–3 months ahead, outside school holidays and the Christmas/Easter periods.'
          : 'This short-haul route is usually cheapest in the shoulder season (April–May, September–October) and on weekday flights, especially Tuesdays and Wednesdays.' }
    : { question: 'How do I find the cheapest flight from ' + route.origin_city + ' to ' + route.destination_city + '?', answer: 'Airpiv compares hundreds of airlines for this route in real time. The more flexible your travel dates, the better your chance of a great price.' };
  var faqItems = [bestTimeFaqItem, haulQuestion];

  var bestTimeHtml = '';
  if (route.distance_km != null) {
    var isLongHaulBT = route.haul_type === 'long-haul';
    var bestTimeBody = isLongHaulBT
      ? ('For long-haul routes like ' + escHtml(route.origin_city) + ' → ' + escHtml(route.destination_city) + ', it usually pays to book 2–3 months in advance — prices on this distance typically rise noticeably in the last 3–4 weeks before departure. Travelling outside school holidays and the Christmas/Easter periods tends to be cheaper on long-haul routes, as demand drops noticeably during those windows.')
      : ('For short-haul routes like ' + escHtml(route.origin_city) + ' → ' + escHtml(route.destination_city) + ', the shoulder-season months (typically April–May and September–October) are cheaper than peak summer or Christmas. Midweek flights — especially Tuesdays and Wednesdays — also tend to be cheaper than weekend flights, since business-traveller demand drops on weekends.');
    var bookingWindow = isLongHaulBT ? '60–90 days before departure' : '21–45 days before departure';
    bestTimeHtml = '<section class="route-besttime-section"><h2>Best time to fly this route</h2>' +
      '<div class="route-booking-window"><span class="route-booking-window-lbl">Best booking window</span><span class="route-booking-window-val">' + bookingWindow + '</span></div>' +
      '<p>' + bestTimeBody + '</p></section>';
  }

  var faqHtml = faqItems.map(function(f) {
    return '<div class="route-faq-item"><div class="route-faq-q">' + escHtml(f.question) + '</div><div class="route-faq-a">' + escHtml(f.answer) + '</div></div>';
  }).join('');

  document.getElementById('route-content').innerHTML =
    breadcrumbHtml +
    '<h1>' + escHtml(title) + '</h1>' +
    '<div class="route-hero">' +
      '<div class="route-hero-cities">' +
        '<span>' + escHtml(route.origin_city) + '</span>' +
        '<span class="route-hero-arrow">✈</span>' +
        '<span>' + escHtml(route.destination_city) + '</span>' +
      '</div>' +
      distanceHtml +
      '<div class="route-price-box" id="route-price-box">' +
        '<div style="color:rgba(255,255,255,.5);font-size:13px">Loading price…</div>' +
      '</div>' +
      '<div class="route-trust-signal" id="route-trust-signal" style="display:none"></div>' +
      '<a href="' + bookingUrl + '" class="route-cta">Search flights now →</a>' +
    '</div>' +
    '<section><p>' + escHtml(introText) + '</p></section>' +
    bestTimeHtml +
    airportInfoHtml +
    altAirportsHtml +
    '<section id="route-insights-section"></section>' +
    '<section class="route-faq">' +
      '<h2>Frequently asked questions</h2>' +
      faqHtml +
    '</section>' +
    '<section id="related-routes-section"></section>';

  function buildFaqSchema(items) {
    return {
      "@type": "FAQPage",
      "mainEntity": items.map(function(f) {
        return { "@type": "Question", "name": f.question, "acceptedAnswer": { "@type": "Answer", "text": f.answer } };
      })
    };
  }

  document.getElementById('route-schema').textContent = JSON.stringify({
    "@context": "https://schema.org",
    "@type": "WebPage",
    "name": title,
    "description": description,
    "url": url,
    "inLanguage": "en",
    "mainEntity": buildFaqSchema(faqItems)
  });

  fetch(PROXY + '/route-pages/' + encodeURIComponent(route.slug) + '/related')
    .then(function(r){ return r.json(); })
    .then(function(j){
      if (!j.ok || !j.related || !j.related.length) return;
      var section = document.getElementById('related-routes-section');
      section.innerHTML = '<h2>Similar flight routes</h2><div class="related-routes-grid">' +
        j.related.map(function(r) {
          var oCity = anglicizeCity(r.origin_city, r.origin_iata);
          var dCity = anglicizeCity(r.destination_city, r.destination_iata);
          return '<a class="related-route-card" href="/en/flights/' + encodeURIComponent(r.slug) + '">' +
            escHtml(oCity) + ' → ' + escHtml(dCity) +
          '</a>';
        }).join('') +
      '</div>';
    })
    .catch(function(){ /* related routes are a bonus, not critical — fail silently */ });

  fetch(PROXY + '/route-price?from=' + encodeURIComponent(route.origin_iata) + '&to=' + encodeURIComponent(route.destination_iata))
    .then(function(r){ return r.json(); })
    .then(function(j){
      var box = document.getElementById('route-price-box');
      if (j.ok && j.price != null) {
        box.innerHTML = '<div class="route-price-val">from €' + j.price.toFixed(0) + '</div><div class="route-price-lbl">Indicative price · Economy · 1 adult</div>';
        var priceDescription = 'Flights from ' + route.origin_city + ' (' + route.origin_iata + ') to ' + route.destination_city + ' (' + route.destination_iata + ') from €' + j.price.toFixed(0) + ' — compare prices and book with Airpiv.';
        document.getElementById('page-description').setAttribute('content', priceDescription);
        document.getElementById('og-description').setAttribute('content', priceDescription);
        if (j.departure_date) {
          var ctaLink = document.querySelector('.route-cta');
          if (ctaLink) ctaLink.href = ctaLink.getAttribute('href') + '?depart=' + encodeURIComponent(j.departure_date);
        }
      } else {
        box.innerHTML = '<div style="color:rgba(255,255,255,.5);font-size:13px">Current prices available directly in search</div>';
      }

      var trustEl = document.getElementById('route-trust-signal');
      if (trustEl && j.ok && j.checksToday != null && j.checkedAt) {
        var minutesAgo = Math.max(0, Math.round((Date.now() - new Date(j.checkedAt).getTime()) / 60000));
        var agoText = minutesAgo < 1 ? 'just now' : (minutesAgo === 1 ? 'updated 1 minute ago' : 'updated ' + minutesAgo + ' minutes ago');
        trustEl.innerHTML = '<span>✓ ' + j.checksToday + ' prices checked today</span><span>· Last ' + agoText + '</span>';
        trustEl.style.display = '';
      }
      if (j.ok && j.insights) {
        var ins = j.insights;
        function fmtHrsMin(min) {
          var h = Math.floor(min / 60), m = min % 60;
          return h + 'h' + (m > 0 ? ' ' + m + 'm' : '');
        }
        var directLine = ins.allDirect
          ? 'All flights found are direct flights.'
          : (ins.directAvailable ? 'Direct flights are available on this route.' : 'There are currently no direct flights on this route — connections only.');
        var airlinesLine = ins.airlines.length
          ? ('Airlines flying this route: ' + ins.airlines.join(', ') + '.')
          : '';
        var insightsHtml = '<section class="route-insights-section"><h2>Flight data for this route</h2><div class="route-insights-grid">' +
          '<div class="route-insight-card"><div class="route-insight-val">' + fmtHrsMin(ins.avgDurationMin) + '</div><div class="route-insight-lbl">Average total travel time (incl. connections)</div></div>' +
          '<div class="route-insight-card"><div class="route-insight-val">' + fmtHrsMin(ins.minDurationMin) + '</div><div class="route-insight-lbl">Shortest flight time found</div></div>' +
        '</div><p style="margin-top:10px">' + directLine + (airlinesLine ? ' ' + airlinesLine : '') + '</p></section>';
        var insightsTarget = document.getElementById('route-insights-section');
        if (insightsTarget) insightsTarget.outerHTML = insightsHtml;

        var durationFaqHtml = '<div class="route-faq-item"><div class="route-faq-q">How long does the flight from ' + escHtml(route.origin_city) + ' to ' + escHtml(route.destination_city) + ' take?</div><div class="route-faq-a">The average flight time is ' + fmtHrsMin(ins.avgDurationMin) + '. ' + directLine + '</div></div>';
        var faqSection = document.querySelector('.route-faq');
        // [DUPLICATE-FAQ-FIX] Guards against this exact FAQ item being
        // appended twice — happened when this price/insights callback
        // fired more than once for the same page load. The flag makes a
        // second insertion attempt a no-op instead of a visible
        // duplicate question in the FAQ list.
        if (faqSection && !faqSection.dataset.durationFaqAdded) {
          faqSection.insertAdjacentHTML('beforeend', durationFaqHtml);
          faqSection.dataset.durationFaqAdded = '1';
        }

        var durationFaqItem = { question: 'How long does the flight from ' + route.origin_city + ' to ' + route.destination_city + ' take?', answer: 'The average flight time is ' + fmtHrsMin(ins.avgDurationMin) + '. ' + directLine };
        document.getElementById('route-schema').textContent = JSON.stringify({
          "@context": "https://schema.org",
          "@type": "WebPage",
          "name": title,
          "description": description,
          "url": url,
          "inLanguage": "en",
          "mainEntity": buildFaqSchema(faqItems.concat([durationFaqItem]))
        });
      }
    })
    .catch(function(){
      document.getElementById('route-price-box').innerHTML = '<div style="color:rgba(255,255,255,.5);font-size:13px">Current prices available directly in search</div>';
    });
}
</script>

</body>
</html>

  text-align: center;

  align-items: center;

  .airport-info-grid {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

.route-insights-section {
  margin-top: 24px;
}

  margin-top: 24px;
}
.route-besttime-section h2 {
  font-family: "Syne", sans-serif;
  font-size: 1.1rem;
  color: var(--tx);
  margin-bottom: 10px;
}
.route-insights-section h2 {
  font-family: "Syne", sans-serif;
  font-size: 1.1rem;
  color: var(--tx);
  margin-bottom: 10px;
}
.route-insights-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  gap: 10px;
}
.route-insight-card {
  background: var(--bg2);
  border: 1px solid var(--bd);
  border-radius: 10px;
  padding: 13px 15px;
  text-align: center;
}
.route-insight-val {
  font-family: "Syne", sans-serif;
  font-weight: 800;
  color: var(--teal);
  font-size: 1.15rem;
}
.route-insight-lbl {
  font-size: 11.5px;
  color: var(--tx3);
  margin-top: 4px;
}
@media (max-width: 480px) {
  .route-insights-grid {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }
}

<script>
var PROXY = 'https://api.airpiv.com';

function escHtml(s) {
  var d = document.createElement('div');
  d.textContent = s || '';
  return d.innerHTML;
}

// [PRETTY-URL-FIX] كان بيقرأ الـ slug من ?slug= بس — أي redirect
// لرابط "نضيف" زي /flights/berlin-paris (من غير query string خالص)
// كان بيوصل للصفحة دي، بس من غير أي slug يتقرأ، فيظهر "غير موجود"
// فوراً حتى لو الـ redirect نفسه شغال 100%. دلوقتي بيدوّر في شكلين:
// ?slug=X (الأصلي)، أو آخر جزء من المسار لو الرابط شكله
// /flights/xxx أو /flight-route/xxx (أياً كانت طريقة الـ redirect
// اللي أوصلت لنفس الملف ده).
var params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
var slug = params.get('slug');
if (!slug) {
  // [ROBUST-SLUG-FIX] آخر جزء غير فاضي في المسار، أياً كان الجزء اللي
  // قبله بالظبط — مش مربوط بنمط محدد حرفياً زي "/flights/" فقط، عشان
  // يفضل شغال حتى لو شكل التوجيه من الاستضافة اتغيّر أو فيه تفصيلة
  // مش متوقعة في المسار قبل اسم المسار نفسه.
  var segments = window.location.pathname.split('/').filter(Boolean);
  var last = segments[segments.length - 1] || '';
  if (last && !/\.html?$/i.test(last)) slug = decodeURIComponent(last);
}

// [CANONICAL-SEO-FIX] كان الـ canonical بياخد قيمته الصح بس بعد ما
// بيانات المسار توصل من السيرفر (كذا مللي ثانية). لحد وقتها، جوجل
// كان بيشوف قيمة ثابتة غلط (/flight-route.html) في الـ HTML الخام —
// نفس القيمة دي على الألف صفحة، وده بالظبط اللي بيخلي جوجل يفتكر
// إنها كلها نسخ من نفس الصفحة. دلوقتي بيتظبط فوراً من الرابط الحالي
// نفسه (اللي هو صحيح 100% بالتعريف، مش محتاج ننتظر أي بيانات)، قبل
// ما نطلب أي حاجة من السيرفر خالص.
if (slug) {
  var immediateUrl = 'https://airpiv.com/flights/' + encodeURIComponent(slug);
  var immediateEnUrl = 'https://airpiv.com/en/flights/' + encodeURIComponent(slug);
  document.getElementById('page-canonical').setAttribute('href', immediateUrl);
  document.getElementById('og-url').setAttribute('content', immediateUrl);
  document.getElementById('hreflang-de').setAttribute('href', immediateUrl);
  document.getElementById('hreflang-en').setAttribute('href', immediateEnUrl);
  document.getElementById('hreflang-default').setAttribute('href', immediateUrl);

  // [INITIAL-CONTENT-SEO-FIX] كان أول حاجة في الـ HTML الخام (قبل
  // تنفيذ الجافاسكريبت) هي نص "Lade Route…" — نفس الجملة بالظبط على
  // كل الألف صفحة. جوجل بيقرا الـ HTML الخام ده في أول زحف (قبل ما
  // يستنى تنفيذ أي جافاسكريبت)، فكان بيشوف محتوى متطابق فاضي على كل
  // الصفحات. دلوقتي بنولّد عنوان وH1 تقديريين من الرابط نفسه فوراً
  // (مش مثاليين 100%، لكن فريدين وذوي معنى لكل صفحة) — بيتستبدلوا
  // بالبيانات الحقيقية الدقيقة بمجرد ما الطلب من السيرفر يخلص، فمفيش
  // أي تعارض؛ ده بس تحسين لأول لحظة قبل وصول البيانات الكاملة.
  var slugWords = slug.split('-').map(function(w) {
    return w.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + w.slice(1);
  });
  var guessedTitle = 'Flüge: ' + slugWords.join(' – ');
  document.title = guessedTitle + ' | Airpiv';
  document.getElementById('page-description').setAttribute('content', 'Günstige Flüge finden und vergleichen mit Airpiv — echte Preise, transparent und ohne versteckte Kosten.');
  document.getElementById('route-content').innerHTML = '<h1>' + escHtml(guessedTitle) + '</h1><p style="color:var(--tx3)">Lade Route…</p>';
}

if (!slug) {
  renderNotFound();
} else {
  fetch(PROXY + '/route-pages/' + encodeURIComponent(slug))
    .then(function(r){ return r.json(); })
    .then(function(j){
      if (!j.ok || !j.route) { renderNotFound(); return; }
      renderRoute(j.route);
    })
    .catch(function(){ renderNotFound(); });
}

function renderNotFound() {
  // [SOFT-404-FIX] الصفحة دي بترجع دايماً 200 OK (ملف ثابت واحد بيخدم
  // كل روابط /flights/*)، فمفيش طريقة نرجّع 404 حقيقي من غير تدخل
  // السيرفر. أقل حاجة نعملها: نمنع فهرسة الصفحة دي تحديداً — noindex
  // ديناميكي بمجرد ما نتأكد إن المسار مش موجود فعلاً، عشان جوجل
  // مايحطهاش في نتايج البحث كصفحة حقيقية.
  document.getElementById('page-robots').setAttribute('content', 'noindex, follow');
  document.getElementById('route-content').innerHTML =
    '<h1>Route nicht gefunden</h1>' +
    '<p style="color:var(--tx3)">Diese Flugroute ist nicht verfügbar.</p>' +
    '<a href="/" class="btn-t" style="display:inline-flex;margin-top:12px">← Flüge suchen</a>';
}

// [LOCALIZATION-FIX] Was previously whatever free text the admin typed
// when creating the route (city_pages/route_pages.origin_city etc.) —
// nothing enforced German spelling, so "Rome" instead of "Rom" or
// "Vienna" instead of "Wien" could silently end up on a German-language
// page. This is a lookup by the route's own real IATA code (never
// guessed from the text itself, which could be spelled any number of
// ways) against known correct German city names — only overrides when
// we have a confirmed mapping for that code; any airport not in this
// list keeps whatever the admin entered, exactly as before.
var GERMAN_CITY_NAMES = {
  BER: 'Berlin', MUC: 'München', FRA: 'Frankfurt', HAM: 'Hamburg', DUS: 'Düsseldorf',
  CGN: 'Köln', STR: 'Stuttgart', HAJ: 'Hannover', LEJ: 'Leipzig', NUE: 'Nürnberg',
  DTM: 'Dortmund', BRE: 'Bremen', VIE: 'Wien', ZRH: 'Zürich', GVA: 'Genf',
  LHR: 'London', LGW: 'London', STN: 'London', LTN: 'London', CDG: 'Paris', ORY: 'Paris',
  FCO: 'Rom', CIA: 'Rom', MXP: 'Mailand', LIN: 'Mailand', VCE: 'Venedig', NAP: 'Neapel',
  MAD: 'Madrid', BCN: 'Barcelona', VLC: 'Valencia', SVQ: 'Sevilla', AGP: 'Málaga',
  LIS: 'Lissabon', OPO: 'Porto', AMS: 'Amsterdam', BRU: 'Brüssel', LUX: 'Luxemburg',
  CPH: 'Kopenhagen', OSL: 'Oslo', ARN: 'Stockholm', HEL: 'Helsinki', DUB: 'Dublin',
  WAW: 'Warschau', KRK: 'Krakau', PRG: 'Prag', BUD: 'Budapest', ATH: 'Athen',
  IST: 'Istanbul', SAW: 'Istanbul', CAI: 'Kairo', DXB: 'Dubai', DOH: 'Doha',
  BKK: 'Bangkok', SIN: 'Singapur', HKG: 'Hongkong', NRT: 'Tokio', HND: 'Tokio',
  JFK: 'New York', EWR: 'New York', LAX: 'Los Angeles', SFO: 'San Francisco',
  MIA: 'Miami', YYZ: 'Toronto', GRU: 'São Paulo', CPT: 'Kapstadt', JNB: 'Johannesburg',
  SYD: 'Sydney', MEL: 'Melbourne', DBV: 'Dubrovnik', SPU: 'Split', ZAG: 'Zagreb',
};
function germanizeCity(name, iata) {
  return GERMAN_CITY_NAMES[iata] || name;
}
// [ALTERNATIVE-AIRPORTS] Real groupings derived from the SAME trusted
// IATA→city map above — cities genuinely served by more than one
// airport (London: LHR/LGW/STN/LTN, Paris: CDG/ORY, Rome: FCO/CIA,
// Milan: MXP/LIN) surface their other real airport codes. Never
// fabricated: built once from data already vetted for correctness, and
// a city with only one mapped airport simply produces an empty list.
var CITY_AIRPORTS = {};
Object.keys(GERMAN_CITY_NAMES).forEach(function (code) {
  var city = GERMAN_CITY_NAMES[code];
  if (!CITY_AIRPORTS[city]) CITY_AIRPORTS[city] = [];
  CITY_AIRPORTS[city].push(code);
});
function getAlternativeAirports(cityName, excludeIata) {
  var list = CITY_AIRPORTS[cityName] || [];
  return list.filter(function (c) { return c !== excludeIata; });
}

function renderRoute(route) {
  try { if (typeof gtag === 'function') gtag('event', 'route_page_view', { origin: route.origin_iata, destination: route.destination_iata, slug: route.slug }); } catch (e) {}
  // [LOCALIZATION-FIX] يتصحّح مرة واحدة هنا فقط — كل الاستخدامات
  // الأخرى في الدالة دي (العنوان، الوصف، الأسئلة الشائعة، الروابط...)
  // بتاخد القيمة المُصححة تلقائياً من غير ما نلمسها واحدة واحدة.
  route.origin_city = germanizeCity(route.origin_city, route.origin_iata);
  route.destination_city = germanizeCity(route.destination_city, route.destination_iata);

  // [ROUTE-SEO-OVERRIDES] Falls back to the exact same auto-generated
  // text as before when the admin hasn't set a custom override — zero
  // behavior change for any route that doesn't use this field.
  var title = route.custom_title || ('Flüge von ' + route.origin_city + ' nach ' + route.destination_city);
  var description = route.custom_meta_description || ('Günstige Flüge von ' + route.origin_city + ' (' + route.origin_iata + ') nach ' + route.destination_city + ' (' + route.destination_iata + ') finden und buchen — Preise vergleichen mit Airpiv.');
  var url = 'https://airpiv.com/flights/' + encodeURIComponent(route.slug);

  document.getElementById('page-title').textContent = title + ' | Airpiv';
  document.getElementById('page-description').setAttribute('content', description);
  document.getElementById('page-canonical').setAttribute('href', url);
  document.getElementById('og-title').setAttribute('content', title);
  document.getElementById('og-description').setAttribute('content', description);
  document.getElementById('og-url').setAttribute('content', url);
  var enUrl = 'https://airpiv.com/en/flights/' + encodeURIComponent(route.slug);
  document.getElementById('hreflang-de').setAttribute('href', url);
  document.getElementById('hreflang-en').setAttribute('href', enUrl);
  document.getElementById('hreflang-default').setAttribute('href', url);

  // [DYNAMIC-INTRO] Was a single fixed sentence template — only the city
  // names changed, so every route page read almost word-for-word
  // identical (a real thin/duplicate-content risk across hundreds of
  // route pages). Now built from the route's own real, already-available
  // data (distance_km, haul_type) so the wording structurally differs by
  // route category, not just by which two city names get substituted in.
  // Still falls back to the admin's custom intro_text override first,
  // unchanged behavior for any route that already has one set.
  function buildDynamicIntro(r) {
    var hasDistance = r.distance_km != null;
    var isLongHaul = r.haul_type === 'long-haul';
    var distancePhrase = hasDistance
      ? (' Die Strecke ist rund ' + r.distance_km.toLocaleString('de-DE') + ' km lang' + (isLongHaul ? ' und zählt damit zu den Langstreckenflügen.' : ' — ein typischer Kurzstreckenflug innerhalb weniger Flugstunden.'))
      : '';
    var openings = isLongHaul
      ? ('Auf der Suche nach einem Flug von ' + r.origin_city + ' nach ' + r.destination_city + '?')
      : ('Du planst eine Reise von ' + r.origin_city + ' nach ' + r.destination_city + '?');
    var closing = isLongHaul
      ? ' Airpiv vergleicht für diese Langstrecke hunderte Airlines in Echtzeit, damit du den besten Gesamtpreis inklusive aller Gebühren siehst — transparent und ohne versteckte Kosten.'
      : ' Mit Airpiv vergleichst du in Sekunden hunderte Airlines für diese Strecke und findest den besten Preis für deinen Flug — transparent, ohne versteckte Kosten und mit Bestpreisgarantie.';
    return openings + distancePhrase + closing;
  }
  var introText = route.intro_text || buildDynamicIntro(route);

  var bookingUrl = '/search/' + encodeURIComponent(route.origin_iata) + '-' + encodeURIComponent(route.destination_iata);

  // [BREADCRUMB] Home → Country → City → Route — the full chain via the
  // destination side (the more relevant classification for "which
  // country/city is this flight going to"). Each segment degrades
  // independently: a route missing destination_country or
  // destination_city_slug (e.g. created before these columns existed)
  // simply skips that segment rather than showing a broken link.
  var breadcrumbHtml = '<nav class="breadcrumb" aria-label="Breadcrumb"><a href="/">Startseite</a><span>›</span>';
  if (route.destination_country) {
    breadcrumbHtml += '<a href="/country/' + encodeURIComponent(route.destination_country) + '">' + escHtml(route.destination_country) + '</a><span>›</span>';
  }
  if (route.destination_city_slug) {
    breadcrumbHtml += '<a href="/city/' + encodeURIComponent(route.destination_city_slug) + '">' + escHtml(route.destination_city) + '</a><span>›</span>';
  }
  breadcrumbHtml += '<span>' + escHtml(route.origin_city) + ' → ' + escHtml(route.destination_city) + '</span></nav>';

  // [SCHEMA-BREADCRUMB] نفس البيانات بالظبط اللي بنت الـ breadcrumb
  // المرئي فوق — عمداً، عشان الاتنين ميختلفوش أبداً عن بعض. مبني مرة
  // واحدة هنا (مش بيتلمس تاني)، لأن سلسلة الـ breadcrumb معروفة كاملة
  // من أول لحظة يوصل فيها الـ route، على عكس الـ FAQ اللي بتتحدث لاحقاً.
  var breadcrumbItems = [{ "@type": "ListItem", "position": 1, "name": "Startseite", "item": "https://airpiv.com/" }];
  var bcPos = 2;
  if (route.destination_country) {
    breadcrumbItems.push({ "@type": "ListItem", "position": bcPos++, "name": route.destination_country, "item": "https://airpiv.com/country/" + encodeURIComponent(route.destination_country) });
  }
  if (route.destination_city_slug) {
    breadcrumbItems.push({ "@type": "ListItem", "position": bcPos++, "name": route.destination_city, "item": "https://airpiv.com/city/" + encodeURIComponent(route.destination_city_slug) });
  }
  breadcrumbItems.push({ "@type": "ListItem", "position": bcPos++, "name": route.origin_city + ' → ' + route.destination_city, "item": url });
  document.getElementById('breadcrumb-schema').textContent = JSON.stringify({
    "@context": "https://schema.org",
    "@type": "BreadcrumbList",
    "itemListElement": breadcrumbItems
  });

  // [AIRPORT-INFO] Links to both airport pages — what the original
  // report's route-page checklist asked for ("معلومات المطارين"). Kept
  // as a separate in-content section rather than extending the
  // breadcrumb to a 5th level (Airport), which would make it unwieldy —
  // the breadcrumb stays at the planned 4 levels (Home → Country → City
  // → Route).
  var airportInfoHtml = '<section class="airport-info-section"><h2>Flughafeninformationen</h2><div class="airport-info-grid">' +
    '<a class="airport-info-card" href="/airport/' + encodeURIComponent(route.origin_iata) + '"><span class="airport-info-code">' + escHtml(route.origin_iata) + '</span><span class="airport-info-city">' + escHtml(route.origin_city) + '</span></a>' +
    '<a class="airport-info-card" href="/airport/' + encodeURIComponent(route.destination_iata) + '"><span class="airport-info-code">' + escHtml(route.destination_iata) + '</span><span class="airport-info-city">' + escHtml(route.destination_city) + '</span></a>' +
  '</div></section>';

  // [ALTERNATIVE-AIRPORTS] Real, only shown when the destination city is
  // genuinely served by more than one mapped airport — never fabricated
  // for a single-airport city.
  var altAirports = getAlternativeAirports(route.destination_city, route.destination_iata);
  var altAirportsHtml = altAirports.length
    ? '<section class="airport-info-section"><h2>Alternative Flughäfen in ' + escHtml(route.destination_city) + '</h2><div class="airport-info-grid">' +
      altAirports.map(function (code) {
        return '<a class="airport-info-card" href="/airport/' + encodeURIComponent(code) + '"><span class="airport-info-code">' + escHtml(code) + '</span><span class="airport-info-city">' + escHtml(route.destination_city) + '</span></a>';
      }).join('') +
    '</div></section>'
    : '';

  // [ROUTE-PAGES-DISTANCE] Real, server-computed distance — shown only
  // when available (older routes created before this feature, or any
  // route missing coordinates for some reason, simply don't show this
  // line rather than displaying a fabricated/guessed number).
  var distanceHtml = '';
  if (route.distance_km != null) {
    var haulLabel = route.haul_type === 'long-haul' ? 'Langstreckenflug' : 'Kurzstreckenflug';
    distanceHtml = '<div style="color:rgba(255,255,255,.5);font-size:12px;margin-top:6px">📏 ' + route.distance_km.toLocaleString('de-DE') + ' km · ' + haulLabel + '</div>';
  }

  // [ROUTE-FAQ-OVERRIDE] Uses the admin's custom FAQ when set, otherwise
  // falls back to real per-route data — the haul-type/distance question
  // replaces the old route-agnostic "Can I change my booking later?"
  // (flagged in an SEO review as adding no real value since it applies
  // to literally any route). A 4th question about flight duration/direct
  // availability is appended separately once real insights data arrives
  // asynchronously below — never built ahead of time with a placeholder.
  var haulQuestion = route.distance_km != null
    ? { question: 'Wie weit ist es von ' + route.origin_city + ' nach ' + route.destination_city + '?',
        answer: 'Die Entfernung beträgt rund ' + route.distance_km.toLocaleString('de-DE') + ' km — ' + (route.haul_type === 'long-haul' ? 'ein Langstreckenflug.' : 'ein Kurzstreckenflug.') }
    : { question: 'Welcher Flughafen wird in ' + route.destination_city + ' angeflogen?', answer: 'Die Strecke nutzt den Flughafen ' + route.destination_iata + '. Genaue Flugzeiten und Airlines siehst du in den Suchergebnissen.' };
  // [ROUTE-FAQ-OVERRIDE] The old first question ("Wie finde ich den
  // günstigsten Flug...?") was answered with the exact same generic
  // sentence on every single route page — real duplicate content. Now
  // ties directly into the route's own Best-Travel-Time data built just
  // below when available, so the question and its answer are actually
  // specific to this route's haul type rather than universally
  // applicable filler. Falls back to the old generic question only for
  // the rare route still missing distance_km/haul_type.
  var bestTimeFaqItem = route.distance_km != null
    ? { question: 'Wann ist die beste Reisezeit von ' + route.origin_city + ' nach ' + route.destination_city + '?',
        answer: route.haul_type === 'long-haul'
          ? 'Am günstigsten ist diese Langstrecke meist 2–3 Monate im Voraus gebucht, außerhalb der Schulferien sowie der Weihnachts- und Osterzeit.'
          : 'Am günstigsten ist diese Kurzstrecke meist in der Nebensaison (April–Mai, September–Oktober) sowie bei Flügen unter der Woche, besonders dienstags und mittwochs.' }
    : { question: 'Wie finde ich den günstigsten Flug von ' + route.origin_city + ' nach ' + route.destination_city + '?', answer: 'Airpiv vergleicht in Echtzeit hunderte Airlines für diese Strecke. Je flexibler dein Reisedatum, desto größer die Chance auf einen Spitzenpreis.' };
  var faqItems = (route.custom_faq && route.custom_faq.length) ? route.custom_faq : [
    bestTimeFaqItem,
    haulQuestion,
  ];
  // [BEST-TRAVEL-TIME] New section — didn't exist before. Built from the
  // route's own real haul_type/distance_km rather than one fixed block of
  // advice repeated on every page: short-haul and long-haul routes get
  // structurally different guidance (the actual industry-standard advice
  // genuinely differs between the two), and the specific distance/haul
  // label is woven into the text itself so two routes in the same
  // category still don't read as identical boilerplate. Skipped entirely
  // (rather than shown with a fabricated placeholder) for the rare route
  // still missing distance_km/haul_type.
  var bestTimeHtml = '';
  if (route.distance_km != null) {
    var isLongHaulBT = route.haul_type === 'long-haul';
    var bestTimeBody = isLongHaulBT
      ? ('Für Langstreckenflüge wie ' + escHtml(route.origin_city) + ' → ' + escHtml(route.destination_city) + ' lohnt es sich meist, 2–3 Monate im Voraus zu buchen — die Preise steigen auf dieser Distanz typischerweise deutlich in den letzten 3–4 Wochen vor Abflug. Reisen außerhalb der Schulferien sowie außerhalb der Weihnachts- und Osterzeit sind auf Langstrecken erfahrungsgemäß günstiger, da die Nachfrage in diesen Zeiträumen spürbar sinkt.')
      : ('Für Kurzstreckenflüge wie ' + escHtml(route.origin_city) + ' → ' + escHtml(route.destination_city) + ' sind die sogenannten Nebensaison-Monate (meist April–Mai und September–Oktober) günstiger als Hochsommer oder Weihnachten. Flüge unter der Woche — besonders dienstags und mittwochs — sind auf Kurzstrecken erfahrungsgemäß günstiger als Wochenendflüge, da die Nachfrage von Geschäftsreisenden am Wochenende sinkt.');
    // [BEST-BOOKING-WINDOW] Standard industry-guideline ranges (short-haul
    // fares tend to trough 3–7 weeks out; long-haul 2–3 months out) —
    // general, defensible guidance conditioned on real haul_type, not a
    // per-route unique statistic we don't have real booking data for yet.
    var bookingWindow = isLongHaulBT ? '60–90 Tage vor Abflug' : '21–45 Tage vor Abflug';
    bestTimeHtml = '<section class="route-besttime-section"><h2>Beste Reisezeit für diese Strecke</h2>' +
      '<div class="route-booking-window"><span class="route-booking-window-lbl">Beste Buchungszeit</span><span class="route-booking-window-val">' + bookingWindow + '</span></div>' +
      '<p>' + bestTimeBody + '</p></section>';
  }

  var faqHtml = faqItems.map(function(f) {
    return '<div class="route-faq-item"><div class="route-faq-q">' + escHtml(f.question) + '</div><div class="route-faq-a">' + escHtml(f.answer) + '</div></div>';
  }).join('');

  document.getElementById('route-content').innerHTML =
    breadcrumbHtml +
    '<h1>' + escHtml(title) + '</h1>' +
    '<div class="route-hero">' +
      '<div class="route-hero-cities">' +
        '<span>' + escHtml(route.origin_city) + '</span>' +
        '<span class="route-hero-arrow">✈</span>' +
        '<span>' + escHtml(route.destination_city) + '</span>' +
      '</div>' +
      distanceHtml +
      '<div class="route-price-box" id="route-price-box">' +
        '<div style="color:rgba(255,255,255,.5);font-size:13px">Preis wird geladen…</div>' +
      '</div>' +
      '<div class="route-trust-signal" id="route-trust-signal" style="display:none"></div>' +
      '<a href="' + bookingUrl + '" class="route-cta">Jetzt Flüge suchen →</a>' +
    '</div>' +
    '<section><p>' + escHtml(introText) + '</p></section>' +
    bestTimeHtml +
    airportInfoHtml +
    altAirportsHtml +
    '<section id="route-insights-section"></section>' +
    '<section class="route-faq">' +
      '<h2>Häufige Fragen</h2>' +
      faqHtml +
    '</section>' +
    '<section id="related-routes-section"></section>';

  function buildFaqSchema(items) {
    return {
      "@type": "FAQPage",
      "mainEntity": items.map(function(f) {
        return { "@type": "Question", "name": f.question, "acceptedAnswer": { "@type": "Answer", "text": f.answer } };
      })
    };
  }

  document.getElementById('route-schema').textContent = JSON.stringify({
    "@context": "https://schema.org",
    "@type": "WebPage",
    "name": title,
    "description": description,
    "url": url,
    "mainEntity": buildFaqSchema(faqItems)
  });

  // [RELATED-ROUTES] Fetched separately — never blocks the rest of the
  // page from rendering, and the section simply doesn't appear if there
  // are no related routes to show (e.g. the very first route published).
  fetch(PROXY + '/route-pages/' + encodeURIComponent(route.slug) + '/related')
    .then(function(r){ return r.json(); })
    .then(function(j){
      if (!j.ok || !j.related || !j.related.length) return;
      var section = document.getElementById('related-routes-section');
      section.innerHTML = '<h2>Ähnliche Flugrouten</h2><div class="related-routes-grid">' +
        j.related.map(function(r) {
          return '<a class="related-route-card" href="/flights/' + encodeURIComponent(r.slug) + '">' +
            escHtml(r.origin_city) + ' → ' + escHtml(r.destination_city) +
          '</a>';
        }).join('') +
      '</div>';
    })
    .catch(function(){ /* related routes are a bonus, not critical — fail silently */ });

  document.getElementById('route-schema').textContent = JSON.stringify({
    "@context": "https://schema.org",
    "@type": "WebPage",
    "name": title,
    "description": description,
    "url": url,
    "mainEntity": {
      "@type": "FAQPage",
      "mainEntity": [
        {
          "@type": "Question",
          "name": "Wie finde ich den günstigsten Flug von " + route.origin_city + " nach " + route.destination_city + "?",
          "acceptedAnswer": { "@type": "Answer", "text": "Airpiv vergleicht in Echtzeit hunderte Airlines für diese Strecke. Je flexibler dein Reisedatum, desto größer die Chance auf einen Spitzenpreis." }
        },
        {
          "@type": "Question",
          "name": "Welcher Flughafen wird in " + route.destination_city + " angeflogen?",
          "acceptedAnswer": { "@type": "Answer", "text": "Die Strecke nutzt den Flughafen " + route.destination_iata + "." }
        }
      ]
    }
  });

  // Fetch the live indicative price separately — never blocks the rest of
  // the page from rendering if Duffel is briefly slow/unavailable.
  fetch(PROXY + '/route-price?from=' + encodeURIComponent(route.origin_iata) + '&to=' + encodeURIComponent(route.destination_iata))
    .then(function(r){ return r.json(); })
    .then(function(j){
      var box = document.getElementById('route-price-box');
      if (j.ok && j.price != null) {
        box.innerHTML = '<div class="route-price-val">ab ' + j.price.toFixed(0) + ' €</div><div class="route-price-lbl">Indikativer Preis · Economy · 1 Erwachsener</div>';
        // [META-PRICE-FIX] بعد ما السعر الحقيقي يوصل، الوصف بيتحدّث
        // ليشمله فعلياً — بدل وصف عام تقريبي، جوجل بيشوف رقم حقيقي
        // محدد لكل مسار (مش نفس القالب على كل الصفحات).
        if (!route.custom_meta_description) {
          var priceDescription = 'Flüge von ' + route.origin_city + ' (' + route.origin_iata + ') nach ' + route.destination_city + ' (' + route.destination_iata + ') ab ' + j.price.toFixed(0) + ' € — Preise vergleichen und günstig buchen mit Airpiv.';
          document.getElementById('page-description').setAttribute('content', priceDescription);
          document.getElementById('og-description').setAttribute('content', priceDescription);
        }
        // [DATE-MATCH-FIX] Carry the exact date this price was computed
        // for into the search link — clicking "Jetzt Flüge suchen" now
        // lands the customer on a search for that SAME date, instead of
        // defaulting to today (which would likely show a different,
        // probably higher, last-minute fare right after they just saw
        // this indicative price — a bait-and-switch feeling worth
        // avoiding). Only added when a real date actually came back.
        if (j.departure_date) {
          var ctaLink = document.querySelector('.route-cta');
          if (ctaLink) ctaLink.href = ctaLink.getAttribute('href') + '?depart=' + encodeURIComponent(j.departure_date);
        }
      } else {
        box.innerHTML = '<div style="color:rgba(255,255,255,.5);font-size:13px">Aktuelle Preise direkt in der Suche verfügbar</div>';
      }

      // [LIVE-TRUST-SIGNAL] عدّاد حقيقي 100% جاي من السيرفر — بيتحسب من
      // عدد مرات فحص أسعار حقيقية فعلية النهارده، وتوقيت آخر فحص حقيقي.
      // لو Redis مش متاح على السيرفر، الاتنين بيرجعوا null والقسم كله
      // بيتخفي تماماً — أبداً مفيش رقم افتراضي أو مُختلق بديل.
      var trustEl = document.getElementById('route-trust-signal');
      if (trustEl && j.ok && j.checksToday != null && j.checkedAt) {
        var minutesAgo = Math.max(0, Math.round((Date.now() - new Date(j.checkedAt).getTime()) / 60000));
        var agoText = minutesAgo < 1 ? 'gerade eben' : (minutesAgo === 1 ? 'vor 1 Minute' : 'vor ' + minutesAgo + ' Minuten');
        trustEl.innerHTML = '<span>✓ ' + j.checksToday + ' Preise heute geprüft</span><span>· Zuletzt aktualisiert ' + agoText + '</span>';
        trustEl.style.display = '';
      }
      // [ROUTE-INSIGHTS] Real flight facts from the same Duffel offers
      // just fetched for pricing — never invented. Only rendered when
      // insights actually came back; an older cached price entry or a
      // route with zero offers simply skips this section rather than
      // showing fabricated numbers.
      if (j.ok && j.insights) {
        var ins = j.insights;
        function fmtHrsMin(min) {
          var h = Math.floor(min / 60), m = min % 60;
          return h + ' Std' + (m > 0 ? ' ' + m + ' Min' : '');
        }
        var directLine = ins.allDirect
          ? 'Alle gefundenen Flüge sind Direktflüge.'
          : (ins.directAvailable ? 'Direktflüge sind auf dieser Strecke verfügbar.' : 'Auf dieser Strecke gibt es aktuell keine Direktflüge — mit Zwischenstopp.');
        var airlinesLine = ins.airlines.length
          ? ('Fliegende Airlines: ' + ins.airlines.join(', ') + '.')
          : '';
        var insightsHtml = '<section class="route-insights-section"><h2>Flugdaten für diese Strecke</h2><div class="route-insights-grid">' +
          '<div class="route-insight-card"><div class="route-insight-val">' + fmtHrsMin(ins.avgDurationMin) + '</div><div class="route-insight-lbl">Durchschnittliche Gesamtreisezeit (inkl. Umstieg)</div></div>' +
          '<div class="route-insight-card"><div class="route-insight-val">' + fmtHrsMin(ins.minDurationMin) + '</div><div class="route-insight-lbl">Kürzeste gefundene Flugzeit</div></div>' +
        '</div><p style="margin-top:10px">' + directLine + (airlinesLine ? ' ' + airlinesLine : '') + '</p></section>';
        var insightsTarget = document.getElementById('route-insights-section');
        if (insightsTarget) insightsTarget.outerHTML = insightsHtml;

        // [ROUTE-FAQ-OVERRIDE] Append a 4th, real-data FAQ question about
        // duration/direct-flight availability — exactly the route-specific
        // question type asked for ("Gibt es Direktflüge?"), built from
        // real Duffel data for THIS route rather than invented at
        // page-build time. Appended, not replacing the synchronous
        // distance-based questions already shown.
        if (!route.custom_faq || !route.custom_faq.length) {
          var durationFaqHtml = '<div class="route-faq-item"><div class="route-faq-q">Wie lange dauert der Flug von ' + escHtml(route.origin_city) + ' nach ' + escHtml(route.destination_city) + '?</div><div class="route-faq-a">Die durchschnittliche Flugzeit liegt bei ' + fmtHrsMin(ins.avgDurationMin) + '. ' + directLine + '</div></div>';
          var faqSection = document.querySelector('.route-faq');
          // [DUPLICATE-FAQ-FIX] Same guard as the English page — makes a
          // second insertion attempt for this exact item a no-op instead
          // of a visible duplicate question.
          if (faqSection && !faqSection.dataset.durationFaqAdded) {
            faqSection.insertAdjacentHTML('beforeend', durationFaqHtml);
            faqSection.dataset.durationFaqAdded = '1';
          }

          // [ROUTE-FAQ-OVERRIDE] Keep structured data in sync with what's
          // now visible — without this, the schema would still claim
          // only 2 questions while the page visibly shows 3.
          var durationFaqItem = { question: 'Wie lange dauert der Flug von ' + route.origin_city + ' nach ' + route.destination_city + '?', answer: 'Die durchschnittliche Flugzeit liegt bei ' + fmtHrsMin(ins.avgDurationMin) + '. ' + directLine };
          document.getElementById('route-schema').textContent = JSON.stringify({
            "@context": "https://schema.org",
            "@type": "WebPage",
            "name": title,
            "description": description,
            "url": url,
            "mainEntity": buildFaqSchema(faqItems.concat([durationFaqItem]))
          });
        }
      }
    })
    .catch(function(){
      document.getElementById('route-price-box').innerHTML = '<div style="color:rgba(255,255,255,.5);font-size:13px">Aktuelle Preise direkt in der Suche verfügbar</div>';
    });
}
</script>

</body>
</html>

<script type="application/ld+json">
[
  {
    "@context": "https://schema.org",
    "@type": ["Organization", "TravelAgency"],
    "@id": "https://airpiv.com/#organization",
    "name": "Airpiv",
    "url": "https://airpiv.com",

     بس بعد أول بحث فعلي. زائر جديد على الصفحة الرئيسية لسه معندوش
     حاجة تاخده لزرار البحث لو نزل تحت الفورم من غير ما يوصله — الزرار
     ده بيظهر بس في الحالة دي بالظبط (نزل تحت + لسه ما بحثش)، وبيختفي
     تلقائياً لو صفحة نتائج أو أي نافذة تانية مفتوحة.

<!-- FAQ Section -->
<section class="faq-main" aria-label="Häufig gestellte Fragen">
  <div class="faq-wrap">
    <div class="faq-head">
      <h2 class="faq-title">Häufig gestellte Fragen</h2>
      <p class="faq-sub">Alles was du über Airpiv wissen musst</p>
    </div>
    <div class="faq-list">
      <div class="faq-item">
        <button class="faq-q" aria-expanded="false">
          <span>Wie kann ich meine Buchung stornieren?</span>
          <span class="faq-ico">+</span>
        </button>
        <div class="faq-a" hidden>
          <p>Du kannst deine Buchung über unseren Kundenservice stornieren oder direkt gemäß den Tarifbestimmungen deiner Fluggesellschaft. Flexible Tarife ermöglichen eine kostenlose Stornierung bis zu 24 Stunden vor Abflug. Kontaktiere uns unter support@airpiv.com für schnelle Hilfe.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="faq-item">
        <button class="faq-q" aria-expanded="false">
          <span>Welche Zahlungsmethoden werden unterstützt?</span>
          <span class="faq-ico">+</span>
        </button>
        <div class="faq-a" hidden>
          <p>Airpiv unterstützt alle gängigen Zahlungsmethoden: Visa, Mastercard, American Express, PayPal sowie Sofortüberweisung. Alle Transaktionen sind SSL-verschlüsselt und DSGVO-konform gesichert.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="faq-item">
        <button class="faq-q" aria-expanded="false">
          <span>Gibt es versteckte Gebühren bei Airpiv?</span>
          <span class="faq-ico">+</span>
        </button>
        <div class="faq-a" hidden>
          <p>Nein — bei Airpiv gibt es keine versteckten Gebühren. Alle angezeigten Preise enthalten bereits sämtliche Steuern und obligatorischen Gebühren. Was du siehst, ist der Endpreis.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="faq-item">
        <button class="faq-q" aria-expanded="false">
          <span>Wie finde ich die günstigsten Flüge?</span>
          <span class="faq-ico">+</span>
        </button>
        <div class="faq-a" hidden>
          <p>Airpiv vergleicht in Echtzeit hunderte Airlines gleichzeitig. Für die günstigsten Preise empfehlen wir: frühzeitig buchen (6–8 Wochen vor Abflug), flexible Reisedaten nutzen und den Preisalarm aktivieren.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="faq-item">
        <button class="faq-q" aria-expanded="false">
          <span>Ist meine Buchung sofort bestätigt?</span>
          <span class="faq-ico">+</span>
        </button>
        <div class="faq-a" hidden>
          <p>Ja! Nach erfolgreicher Buchung erhältst du sofort eine Bestätigungs-E-Mail mit deiner Buchungsreferenz. Die Buchung wird direkt bei der Airline bestätigt — keine Wartezeit.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="faq-item">
        <button class="faq-q" aria-expanded="false">
          <span>Kann ich für mehrere Personen gleichzeitig buchen?</span>
          <span class="faq-ico">+</span>
        </button>
        <div class="faq-a" hidden>
          <p>Ja, du kannst Flüge für bis zu 9 Personen gleichzeitig buchen — Erwachsene, Kinder und Kleinkinder. Wähle einfach die Anzahl der Reisenden im Suchformular aus.</p>
        </div>
      </div>

     المنشورة فعلياً — عشان صفحات المسارات تبقى متاحة الاكتشاف من
     الصفحة الرئيسية نفسها، مش خريطة الموقع بس.
-->

<div class="pg" id="pg-privacy"><div class="pg-hd"><button class="pg-bk">←</button><h2>Datenschutz</h2></div><div class="pg-b"><div class="ps"><h3>1. Datenschutzerklärung</h3><p>Bei Airpiv legen wir größten Wert auf den Schutz deiner persönlichen Daten. Diese Erklärung informiert dich über Art, Umfang und Zweck der Verarbeitung personenbezogener Daten auf Airpiv.</p></div>
<div class="ps"><h3>2. Welche Daten wir erheben</h3><p>Wir erheben ausschließlich die Daten, die für die Durchführung deiner Buchung notwendig sind:</p>
<ul><li>Vollständiger Name</li><li>Geburtsdatum</li><li>Reisepassnummer (falls von der Airline gefordert)</li><li>E-Mail-Adresse</li><li>Telefonnummer</li></ul></div>
<div class="ps"><h3>3. Zweck der Verarbeitung</h3><p>Wir verwenden deine Daten ausschließlich, um über unseren technischen Partner Duffel Tickets auszustellen und dir Buchungsbestätigungen sowie Updates zu deiner Reise zu senden.</p></div>
<div class="ps"><h3>4. Datenweitergabe</h3><p>Wir verkaufen deine Daten nicht an Dritte. Wir geben Daten ausschließlich weiter an:</p>
<ul><li><strong>Duffel Technologies Ltd.</strong> — zur technischen Abwicklung der Buchung</li><li><strong>Die jeweilige Airline</strong> — zur Ausstellung des Tickets und Bestätigung der Sitzplatzbuchung</li></ul></div>
<div class="ps"><h3>5. Zahlungsdaten</h3><p>Wir speichern keine Kreditkartennummern. Zahlungen werden direkt über die verschlüsselte Zahlungsplattform Stripe gemäß PCI-DSS-Standard abgewickelt.</p></div>
<div class="ps"><h3>6. Cookies und Analyse-Tools</h3><p>Wir verwenden technisch notwendige Cookies (Dark Mode, Cookie-Einstellungen). Zusätzlich nutzen wir Google Analytics 4, um zu verstehen, wie Besucher unsere Website nutzen und sie kontinuierlich zu verbessern. Dabei werden anonymisierte Nutzungsdaten (z. B. besuchte Seiten, Verweildauer) erhoben. Es werden keine Daten zu Werbezwecken an Dritte verkauft.</p></div>
<div class="ps"><h3>7. Deine Rechte</h3><p>Du hast jederzeit das Recht, Auskunft über deine gespeicherten Daten zu verlangen, sie zu berichtigen oder ihre Löschung zu verlangen ("Recht auf Vergessenwerden"). Kontaktiere uns dazu unter <a href="mailto:privacy@airpiv.com">privacy@airpiv.com</a>.</p></div></div></div>

<!-- TERMS & CONDITIONS -->
<div class="pg" id="pg-terms"><div class="pg-hd"><button class="pg-bk">←</button><h2>AGB</h2></div><div class="pg-b">
<div class="ps"><p style="background:#fef3c7;border:1px solid #fbbf24;border-radius:8px;padding:10px;font-size:13px;color:#92400e">Diese Allgemeinen Geschäftsbedingungen müssen vom Kunden vor Abschluss der Zahlung akzeptiert werden.</p></div>
<div class="ps"><h3>1. Art der Dienstleistung</h3><p>Airpiv ist ein Online-Reisevermittler (OTA). Der Beförderungsvertrag besteht direkt zwischen dir und der jeweiligen Fluggesellschaft.</p></div>
<div class="ps"><h3>2. Preise und Steuern</h3><p>Alle angezeigten Preise sind Endpreise und enthalten alle Steuern. Für optionale Leistungen (z. B. Zusatzgepäck oder Sitzplatzwahl) können Airlines zusätzliche Gebühren erheben.</p></div>
<div class="ps"><h3>3. Stornierung und Erstattung</h3><p>Die Stornierungsbedingungen richten sich nach den Bestimmungen der gewählten Fluggesellschaft. Wir unterstützen dich bei der Einreichung von Erstattungsanträgen — die endgültige Entscheidung liegt jedoch beim jeweiligen Carrier.</p></div>
<div class="ps"><h3>4. Richtigkeit der Angaben</h3><p>Du bist allein verantwortlich für die Richtigkeit der Passagierdaten (Namen exakt wie im Reisepass). Fehlerhafte Eingaben können zur Verweigerung des Bordings führen.</p></div>
<div class="ps"><h3>5. Haftung</h3><p>Airpiv haftet nicht für Annullierungen oder Verspätungen durch die Fluggesellschaften. Wir verpflichten uns, dich als Vermittler umfassend zu informieren und über Änderungen auf dem Laufenden zu halten.</p></div>
</div></div>

<div class="dsgvo-ov" id="dsgvo-ov" role="dialog" aria-modal="true" aria-label="Datenschutz und Datensicherheit">
  <div class="dsgvo-box">
    <div class="dsgvo-hd">
      <h3>🔒 Datenschutz & Datensicherheit</h3>
      <button data-cdsg style="background:var(--bg2);border:none;border-radius:7px;width:28px;height:28px;cursor:pointer;font-size:13px;color:var(--tx2)">✕</button>
    </div>
    <div class="dsgvo-body">
      <div class="dsgvo-badge">✓ DSGVO-konform &nbsp;|&nbsp; ✓ PCI-DSS gesichert &nbsp;|&nbsp; ✓ SSL-verschlüsselt</div>

      <div class="dsgvo-section">
        <h4>🛡 Wie wir Ihre Daten schützen</h4>
        <p>Alle sensiblen Daten (Name, Geburtsdatum, Reisepass, Kreditkartendaten) werden ausschließlich verschlüsselt übertragen. Wir verwenden SSL/TLS-Verschlüsselung nach Industriestandard.</p>
      </div>

      <div class="dsgvo-section">
        <h4>✈ Weitergabe an Airlines & Duffel</h4>
        <p>Ihre Passagierdaten werden ausschließlich zur Ticket-Ausstellung an Duffel (unseren Technologiepartner) und die jeweilige Fluggesellschaft weitergegeben. Eine Weitergabe an Dritte erfolgt nicht.</p>
      </div>

      <div class="dsgvo-section">
        <h4>💳 Kreditkartendaten</h4>
        <p>Kreditkartendaten werden nach PCI-DSS-Standard verarbeitet. Wir speichern keine vollständigen Kartendaten auf unseren Servern. Die Zahlungsabwicklung erfolgt ausschließlich über verschlüsselte, zertifizierte Kanäle.</p>
      </div>

      <div class="dsgvo-section">
        <h4>📋 Ihre Rechte (DSGVO)</h4>
        <p>Sie haben das Recht auf Auskunft, Berichtigung, Löschung und Einschränkung der Verarbeitung Ihrer Daten. Kontaktieren Sie uns unter: <a href="mailto:privacy@airpiv.com">privacy@airpiv.com</a></p>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="dsgvo-foot">
      <button class="dsgvo-close-btn" data-cdsg>Verstanden ✓</button>
    </div>

  <section class="cf-faq">
    <h2>Häufig gestellte Fragen zu Last-Minute-Flügen</h2>
    <div class="cf-faq-item"><div class="cf-faq-q">Sind Last-Minute-Flüge wirklich günstiger?</div><div class="cf-faq-a">Das hängt stark von der Strecke und Auslastung ab — manchmal sind kurzfristige Flüge günstiger, weil Airlines freie Plätze noch verkaufen wollen, manchmal teurer, weil die Nachfrage kurz vor Abflug steigt. Die Preise hier sind die echten, aktuellen Preise für die nächsten Tage — vergleiche selbst.</div></div>
    <div class="cf-faq-item"><div class="cf-faq-q">Wie aktuell sind diese Preise?</div><div class="cf-faq-a">Alle Preise werden live von Airpiv abgefragt und regelmäßig aktualisiert. Der finale Preis bei der Buchung kann sich seit der letzten Aktualisierung leicht geändert haben.</div></div>
    <div class="cf-faq-item"><div class="cf-faq-q">Kann ich auch für andere Zeiträume suchen?</div><div class="cf-faq-a">Ja — diese Seite zeigt nur die nächsten Tage. Für ein bestimmtes Datum nutze einfach die normale Flugsuche auf der Startseite.</div></div>
  </section>

<script>
var PROXY = 'https://api.airpiv.com';
var LM_DAYS_AHEAD = 3; // [REAL-NEAR-TERM] 3 أيام من دلوقتي — تاريخ حقيقي قريب فعلاً، مش تقديري بعيد زي باقي الصفحة

function escHtml(s) {
  var d = document.createElement('div');
  d.textContent = s || '';
  return d.innerHTML;
}

function fmtDatePill(d) {
  return d.toLocaleDateString('de-DE', { weekday: 'long', day: 'numeric', month: 'long' });
}
(function () {
  var target = new Date();
  target.setDate(target.getDate() + LM_DAYS_AHEAD);
  document.getElementById('lm-datepill-wrap').innerHTML =
    '<div class="lm-datepill">📅 Preise für ' + fmtDatePill(target) + '</div>';
})();

function fetchPricesInBatches(routes, batchSize, onEach) {
  var i = 0;
  function next() {
    if (i >= routes.length) return Promise.resolve();
    var batch = routes.slice(i, i + batchSize);
    i += batchSize;
    return Promise.all(batch.map(function (r) {
      return fetch(PROXY + '/route-price?from=' + encodeURIComponent(r.origin_iata) + '&to=' + encodeURIComponent(r.destination_iata) + '&days_ahead=' + LM_DAYS_AHEAD)
        .then(function (res) { return res.json(); })
        .then(function (d) { onEach(r, d); })
        .catch(function () { onEach(r, null); });
    })).then(next);
  }
  return next();
}

fetch(PROXY + '/route-pages')
  .then(function (r) { return r.json(); })
  .then(function (j) {
    var grid = document.getElementById('cf-grid');
    if (!j.ok || !j.routes || !j.routes.length) {
      grid.innerHTML = '<p style="color:var(--tx3)">Aktuell sind noch keine Strecken verfügbar — schau bald wieder vorbei!</p>';
      return;
    }
    var routes = j.routes;
    var priced = [];

    grid.innerHTML = routes.map(function (r) {
      return '<a class="cf-card loading" id="cf-card-' + escHtml(r.slug) + '" href="/flights/' + encodeURIComponent(r.slug) + '">' +
        '<div><div class="cf-card-route">' + escHtml(r.origin_city) + ' → ' + escHtml(r.destination_city) + '</div><div class="cf-card-meta">' + escHtml(r.origin_iata) + ' → ' + escHtml(r.destination_iata) + '</div></div>' +
        '<div class="cf-card-price"><div class="cf-card-price-val">…</div><div class="cf-card-price-lbl">wird geladen</div></div>' +
      '</a>';
    }).join('');

    fetchPricesInBatches(routes, 3, function (route, data) {
      var card = document.getElementById('cf-card-' + route.slug);
      if (!card) return;
      card.classList.remove('loading');
      if (data && data.ok && data.price != null) {
        card.querySelector('.cf-card-price-val').textContent = 'ab ' + data.price.toFixed(0) + ' €';
        card.querySelector('.cf-card-price-lbl').textContent = 'pro Person';
        priced.push({ route: route, price: data.price });
      } else {
        card.parentNode.removeChild(card); // [REAL-DATA-ONLY] لو مفيش سعر حقيقي للتاريخ القريب ده، الكارت بيختفي تماماً بدل ما يعرض "—" مضلل
      }
    }).then(function () {
      if (!priced.length) {
        if (!grid.querySelector('.cf-card')) grid.innerHTML = '<p style="color:var(--tx3)">Für die nächsten Tage sind aktuell keine Last-Minute-Preise verfügbar. Bitte versuche es später erneut.</p>';
        return;
      }
      priced.sort(function (a, b) { return a.price - b.price; });
      priced.forEach(function (p, idx) {
        var card = document.getElementById('cf-card-' + p.route.slug);
        if (card) {
          card.querySelector('.cf-card-route').insertAdjacentHTML('afterbegin', '<span class="cf-rank">' + (idx + 1) + '</span>');
          grid.appendChild(card);
        }
      });

      document.getElementById('page-schema').textContent = JSON.stringify({
        "@context": "https://schema.org",
        "@type": "ItemList",
        "itemListElement": priced.map(function (p, idx) {
          return {
            "@type": "ListItem",
            "position": idx + 1,
            "name": p.route.origin_city + ' → ' + p.route.destination_city,
            "url": "https://airpiv.com/flights/" + p.route.slug
          };
        })
      });
    });
  })
  .catch(function () {
    document.getElementById('cf-grid').innerHTML = '<p style="color:var(--tx3)">Preise konnten nicht geladen werden. Bitte versuche es später erneut.</p>';
  });
</script>

</body>
</html>

==================== FILE: flywise-app/popular-routes.js ====================
// [INTERNAL-LINKING-SEO-FIX] الجزء اللي كان ناقص من التنفيذ السابق —
// القسم كان موجود بس فاضي ومخفي (display:none) من غير أي جافاسكريبت
// يملاه. هنا بيجيب مسارات حقيقية منشورة فعلياً ويعرضها كروابط
// <a href="/flights/..."> قابلة للزحف، بعدين يظهر القسم. عمداً
// PROXY محلي هنا (مش المتغير العام في app.js) لأن app.js متحمّل
// بـdefer، يعني بيتنفذ بعد أي <script> عادي زي ده — الاعتماد على
// متغيره العام هنا كان هيبقى خطأ ترتيب تنفيذ.
(function() {
  var PROXY_LOCAL = 'https://api.airpiv.com';
  function escHtmlLocal(s) {
    var d = document.createElement('div');
    d.textContent = s || '';
    return d.innerHTML;
  }
  fetch(PROXY_LOCAL + '/route-pages?limit=24')
    .then(function(r) { return r.json(); })
    .then(function(j) {
      if (!j.ok || !j.routes || !j.routes.length) return;
      var routes = j.routes.slice(0, 24);
      var html = routes.map(function(r) {
        return '<a href="/flights/' + encodeURIComponent(r.slug) + '" ' +
          'style="background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--bd);border-radius:20px;padding:8px 16px;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--tx);text-decoration:none">' +
          escHtmlLocal(r.origin_city) + ' → ' + escHtmlLocal(r.destination_city) +
        '</a>';
      }).join('');
      document.getElementById('popular-routes-links').innerHTML = html;
      document.getElementById('popular-routes-links-section').style.display = '';
    })
    .catch(function() { /* القسم يفضل مخفي بأمان لو الطلب فشل */ });
})();

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="de">
<head>
<!-- Google Analytics 4 -->

<meta name="robots" content="index, follow">
<link rel="canonical" href="https://airpiv.com/privacy.html">

<meta property="og:title" content="Datenschutz | Airpiv">
<meta property="og:description" content="Datenschutzerklärung von Airpiv.">
<meta property="og:url" content="https://airpiv.com/privacy.html">

<nav class="topnav">
  <div class="navi">
    <a href="/" class="logo"><picture>
      <source srcset="/airpiv-logo.webp" type="image/webp">
      <img src="/airpiv-logo.png" alt="Airpiv" width="118" height="38">
    </picture></a>
    <div class="navr">
      <a href="/" class="btn-t">Flüge suchen</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</nav>

<main>
  <a href="/" class="back-link">← Zurück zur Startseite</a>
  <h1>Datenschutz</h1>

  <section>
    <h2>1. Datenschutzerklärung</h2>
    <p>Bei Airpiv legen wir größten Wert auf den Schutz deiner persönlichen Daten. Diese Erklärung informiert dich über Art, Umfang und Zweck der Verarbeitung personenbezogener Daten auf Airpiv.</p>
  </section>

  <section>
    <h2>2. Welche Daten wir erheben</h2>
    <p>Wir erheben ausschließlich die Daten, die für die Durchführung deiner Buchung notwendig sind:</p>
    <ul style="color:var(--tx2);font-size:14.5px;line-height:1.7">
      <li>Vollständiger Name</li>
      <li>Geburtsdatum</li>
      <li>Reisepassnummer (falls von der Airline gefordert)</li>
      <li>E-Mail-Adresse</li>
      <li>Telefonnummer</li>
    </ul>
  </section>

  <section>
    <h2>3. Zweck der Verarbeitung</h2>
    <p>Wir verwenden deine Daten ausschließlich, um über unseren technischen Partner Duffel Tickets auszustellen und dir Buchungsbestätigungen sowie Updates zu deiner Reise zu senden.</p>
  </section>

  <section>
    <h2>4. Datenweitergabe</h2>
    <p>Wir verkaufen deine Daten nicht an Dritte. Wir geben Daten ausschließlich weiter an:</p>
    <ul style="color:var(--tx2);font-size:14.5px;line-height:1.7">
      <li><strong>Duffel Technologies Ltd.</strong> — zur technischen Abwicklung der Buchung</li>
      <li><strong>Die jeweilige Airline</strong> — zur Ausstellung des Tickets und Bestätigung der Sitzplatzbuchung</li>
    </ul>
  </section>

  <section>
    <h2>5. Zahlungsdaten</h2>
    <p>Wir speichern keine Kreditkartennummern. Zahlungen werden direkt über die verschlüsselte Zahlungsplattform Stripe gemäß PCI-DSS-Standard abgewickelt.</p>
  </section>

  <section>
    <h2>6. Cookies und Analyse-Tools</h2>
    <p>Wir verwenden technisch notwendige Cookies (Dark Mode, Cookie-Einstellungen). Zusätzlich nutzen wir <strong>Google Analytics 4</strong>, um zu verstehen, wie Besucher unsere Website nutzen und sie kontinuierlich zu verbessern. Dabei werden anonymisierte Nutzungsdaten (z. B. besuchte Seiten, Verweildauer) erhoben. Es werden keine Daten zu Werbezwecken an Dritte verkauft.</p>
  </section>

  <section>
    <h2>7. Deine Rechte</h2>
    <p>Du hast jederzeit das Recht, Auskunft über deine gespeicherten Daten zu verlangen, sie zu berichtigen oder ihre Löschung zu verlangen ("Recht auf Vergessenwerden"). Kontaktiere uns dazu unter <a class="link" href="mailto:privacy@airpiv.com">privacy@airpiv.com</a>.</p>
  </section>
</main>

<footer><div class="fi2">
  <div class="fgr">
    <div><div class="flo"><span style="display:inline-flex;width:26px;height:26px;border-radius:8px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#12C7B0,#0A9384);align-items:center;justify-content:center"><svg width="17" height="17" viewBox="0 0 64 64" fill="none"><path d="M32 14 L46 46 L32 38 L18 46 Z" fill="#0A1822"/></svg></span>Air<span style="color:var(--teal)">piv</span></div><p class="fdes">Finde Flüge, die sonst niemand findet. 600+ Airlines, beste Preise, volle Garantie.</p></div>
    <div class="fcol"><h4>Unternehmen</h4><ul><li><a href="/about.html">Über uns</a></li><li><a href="/blog.html">Blog</a></li></ul></div>

==================== FILE: flywise-app/shared-layout.css ====================
/* ============================================================
   Airpiv — Shared layout styles for static content pages
   (about.html, contact.html, privacy.html, terms.html, 404.html)
   Colors/fonts extracted directly from index.html's :root and
   header/footer rules — the shared color/radius tokens now live in
   css-tokens.css (imported below) so the two files can't drift out
   of sync; only --pad differs intentionally (flat 20px here vs.
   styles.css's responsive 15/20/22px) and stays local to each file.
   ============================================================ */
@import url("css-tokens.css");
:root {
  --pad: 20px;
}
* {
  box-sizing: border-box;
}
html {
  max-width: 100vw;
  width: 100%;
  overflow-x: hidden;
}
body {
  margin: 0;
  font-family: "Space Grotesk", "Segoe UI", system-ui, sans-serif;
  color: var(--tx);
  background: var(--bg);
  overflow-x: hidden;
  line-height: 1.6;
  width: 100%;
  min-width: 0;
}
a {
  text-decoration: none;
  color: inherit;
}
button {
  font-family: inherit;
  -webkit-appearance: none;
  appearance: none;
}
h1,
h2,

  font-family: "Syne", sans-serif;
  letter-spacing: -0.01em;
}

  <h1>Allgemeine Geschäftsbedingungen</h1>

  <section>
    <p style="background:#fef3c7;border:1px solid #fbbf24;border-radius:8px;padding:12px 14px;font-size:13.5px;color:#92400e">Diese Allgemeinen Geschäftsbedingungen müssen vom Kunden vor Abschluss der Zahlung akzeptiert werden.</p>
  </section>

  <section>
    <h2>1. Art der Dienstleistung</h2>
    <p>Airpiv ist ein Online-Reisevermittler (OTA). Der Beförderungsvertrag besteht direkt zwischen dir und der jeweiligen Fluggesellschaft.</p>
  </section>

  <section>
    <h2>2. Preise und Steuern</h2>
    <p>Alle angezeigten Preise sind Endpreise und enthalten alle Steuern. Für optionale Leistungen (z. B. Zusatzgepäck oder Sitzplatzwahl) können Airlines zusätzliche Gebühren erheben.</p>
  </section>

  <section>
    <h2>3. Stornierung und Erstattung</h2>
    <p>Die Stornierungsbedingungen richten sich nach den Bestimmungen der gewählten Fluggesellschaft. Wir unterstützen dich bei der Einreichung von Erstattungsanträgen — die endgültige Entscheidung liegt jedoch beim jeweiligen Carrier.</p>
  </section>

  <section>
    <h2>4. Richtigkeit der Angaben</h2>
    <p>Du bist allein verantwortlich für die Richtigkeit der Passagierdaten (Namen exakt wie im Reisepass). Fehlerhafte Eingaben können zur Verweigerung des Bordings führen.</p>
  </section>

  <section>
    <h2>5. Haftung</h2>
    <p>Airpiv haftet nicht für Annullierungen oder Verspätungen durch die Fluggesellschaften. Wir verpflichten uns, dich als Vermittler umfassend zu informieren und über Änderungen auf dem Laufenden zu halten.</p>
  </section>
</main>

  "routeBestTimeBodyDomesticShortHaul": "Voor een korte binnenlandse vlucht zoals {origin} → {destination} hangt de prijs vooral af van hoe ver van tevoren je boekt en de dag van de week, minder van het seizoen — doordeweekse vluchten (dinsdag en woensdag) zijn meestal het goedkoopst, en de prijzen stijgen meestal in de laatste 1 tot 2 weken voor vertrek.",
  "routeBestTimeTipDirect": "Alle momenteel gevonden vluchten op deze route zijn directe vluchten — de timing van je boeking draait dus vooral om de prijs, niet om overstaptijden.",
  "routeBestTimeTipConnecting": "Deze route heeft momenteel alleen vluchten met een overstap — het loont dus om bij het boeken ook de overstaptijd te vergelijken naast de prijs.",
  "routeBestTimeTipMixed": "Op deze route zijn zowel directe vluchten als vluchten met overstap beschikbaar — de directe vlucht is bij kortere reizen meestal het prijsverschil waard.",
  "routeBestTimeClosingV1": "Zoals altijd kunnen prijzen van dag tot dag verschillen — het loont om dichter bij je reisdatum nogmaals te controleren.",
  "routeBestTimeClosingV2": "Dit zijn algemene boekingspatronen, geen garantie — de beste manier om het zeker te weten is de actuele prijzen voor jouw exacte data te vergelijken.",
  "routeFaqDirectQuestion": "Zijn er directe vluchten van {origin} naar {destination}?",
  "routeFaqAltAirportsQuestion": "Zijn er andere luchthavens in de buurt van {destination}?",
  "routeFaqAltAirportsAnswer": "{destination} wordt ook bediend door {airports}, wat de moeite waard kan zijn om te vergelijken qua prijs of gemak.",
  "airlineHubLabel": "Hub",
  "airlineMostFlownRoutesLabel": "Meest gevlogen routes",
  "airportTravelerInfoHeading": "Reizigersinformatie",

  "airportTransitOptionsLabel": "Hoe kom je er",
  "airportTerminalInfoLabel": "Terminals",
